papers.title: ProactBench: Beyond What The User Asked For
papers.abstract: Most LLM benchmarks score how well a model responds to explicit requests. They leave unmeasured a different conversational ability: noticing and acting on needs the user has implied but not said. We call this \emph{conversational proactivity}. ProactBench decomposes it into three phase-tied types: \textsc{Emergent}, inference from a single disclosed anchor; \textsc{Critical}, synthesis across multiple anchors; and \textsc{Recovery}, grounded forward-looking value after task completion. We operationalise the benchmark with three agents: a Planner, a User Agent, and an Assistant Model. Their information asymmetries defend against style-confounded scoring, rubric leakage, external-context contamination, and information dumps. The released corpus contains 198 curated dialogues with 624 trigger points across 24 communication styles drawn from a psychometric inventory and audited by an independent LLM judge. Across 16 frontier and open-weight models, \textsc{Recovery} is both difficult and weakly predicted by six standard benchmarks, making it a useful new evaluation signal.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProactBench基准，评估LLM在对话中主动识别并满足用户未明示需求的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM基准仅衡量模型对显式请求的响应能力，忽略了对话中主动识别并满足用户隐含需求的重要能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估LLM对话主动性的标准化基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Recovery类型任务对前沿模型困难，且与六个标准基准弱相关，表明其提供了新的评估信号。
analysis.method: 将对话主动性分解为Emergent、Critical、Recovery三种类型，通过Planner、User Agent、Assistant Model三个代理构建基准，并设计信息不对称防御评分偏差。
contributions: 提出ProactBench基准，系统评估LLM的对话主动性。
构建包含198个对话、624个触发点的语料库，覆盖24种沟通风格。
实验发现Recovery任务困难且与现有基准弱相关，提供新评估信号。
analysis.experiments: 在16个前沿和开源模型上评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 语料库规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有对话场景。
评估依赖独立LLM法官，可能存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProactBench基准，评估LLM在对话中主动识别并满足用户未明示需求的能力。

papers.title: The Art of the Jailbreak: Formulating Jailbreak Attacks for LLM Security Beyond Binary Scoring
papers.abstract: Jailbreak attacks -- adversarial prompts that bypass LLM alignment through purely linguistic manipulation -- pose a growing operational security threat, yet the field lacks large-scale, reproducible infrastructure for generating, categorizing, and evaluating them systematically. This paper addresses that gap with three contributions. (1) Large-scale compositional jailbreak dataset. We construct 114,000 adversarial prompts by applying 912 composing strategies to 125 harmful seed prompts from JailBreakV-28K. Every prompt is assigned to one of 14 cybersecurity attack categories (e.g., malware, phishing, privilege escalation) via a six-model majority-vote pipeline, and each strategy is ranked by effectiveness per category, enabling principled strategy selection grounded in concrete adversarial objectives. (2) Automated jailbreak generation. We instruction-fine-tune category-aware LLMs on Moderate and Optimal subsets, producing models that synthesize fluent jailbreak prompts from a harmful seed at inference time -- no templates, no gradient search. Our generators achieve perplexity 24-39 versus 40-140 for AutoDAN and AmpleGCG, with safety-filter evasion rates of 0.29-0.51 Mal (LlamaPromptGuard-2-86M), enabling controllable, scalable red-teaming under realistic adversarial conditions. (3) OPTIMUS: a training-free jailbreak evaluator. OPTIMUS is a continuous metric J(S,H) that jointly captures semantic similarity between the harmful seed and the jailbreak (S) and harmfulness probability (H) via calibrated penalty functions. Unlike binary attack success rate (ASR), OPTIMUS requires no task-specific training, generalizes across evolving strategies, and exposes a stealth-optimal regime (S*=0.57, H*=0.43) that ASR misses. Experiments across 114,000 prompts confirm that OPTIMUS separates Weak, Moderate, and Optimal jailbreaks with category-level evidence binary evaluation cannot supply.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模组合越狱数据集、自动化生成器和连续评估指标OPTIMUS，系统化提升LLM越狱攻击的生成与评估能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 越狱攻击通过纯语言操纵绕过LLM对齐，构成严重安全威胁，但现有研究缺乏大规模、可复现的生成、分类和评估基础设施。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统化的越狱攻击生成、分类和评估方法，尤其是缺少连续度量替代二值成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建114,000条组合越狱数据集，使用六模型多数投票分类为14种攻击类别；微调类别感知LLM自动生成越狱提示；提出无训练连续评估指标OPTIMUS，结合语义相似度和有害概率。
contributions: 构建大规模组合越狱数据集（114,000条），含14种攻击类别和策略有效性排名。
微调类别感知LLM实现自动化越狱生成，困惑度低于AutoDAN和AmpleGCG。
提出无训练连续评估指标OPTIMUS，揭示二值ASR忽略的隐蔽最优区域。
analysis.experiments: 在114,000条提示上验证OPTIMUS能区分弱、中、强越狱，并提供类别级证据。
limitations: 数据集基于单一种子集，可能限制泛化性。
OPTIMUS的校准函数可能需针对新策略调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模组合越狱数据集、自动化生成器和连续评估指标OPTIMUS，系统化提升LLM越狱攻击的生成与评估能力。

papers.title: CATS: Curvature Aware Temporal Selection for efficient long video understanding
papers.abstract: Understanding long videos with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) requires selecting a small subset of informative frames under strict computational budgets, where exhaustive processing is infeasible and optimal selection is combinatorial. We propose CATS, a curvature-aware frame selection method that explicitly models the temporal geometry of query-frame relevance to identify salient events and their surrounding context. By leveraging temporal curvature to adapt selection density, CATS captures both abrupt transitions and gradually evolving content while suppressing redundant frames. Under a fixed backbone and frame budget, CATS consistently outperforms prior lightweight approaches such as AKS on LongVideoBench and VideoMME. While multi-stage methods such as MIRA achieve higher absolute accuracy, they incur substantial computational overhead; in contrast, CATS retains approximately 93-95% of MIRA's performance while requiring only 3-4% of its preprocessing cost, yielding a favorable efficiency-accuracy trade-off. Beyond answer accuracy, we evaluate description generation using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol, and the obtained results show that CATS produces more coherent and informative outputs, indicating improved grounding in visual evidence. These results position CATS as a computationally efficient and principled approach to long-video understanding.

analysis.tldr: CATS通过曲率感知的时序选择，在极低预处理成本下高效提取长视频关键帧，兼顾突变与渐变内容。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解中，多模态大模型需在严格计算预算下从大量帧中选取信息帧，穷举不可行且最优选择是组合优化问题，现有方法效率或精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定帧预算下，高效且准确地选择长视频中的关键帧，以支持多模态大模型的视频理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出曲率感知的帧选择方法CATS，通过建模查询-帧相关性的时序几何（曲率）来动态调整选择密度，捕获突变和渐变事件，同时抑制冗余帧。
contributions: 提出曲率感知的时序选择方法，显式建模时序几何以识别关键事件及其上下文。
在固定骨干网络和帧预算下，CATS在LongVideoBench和VideoMME上一致优于AKS等轻量方法。
相比多阶段方法MIRA，CATS保留约93-95%性能但预处理成本仅需3-4%，实现高效精度权衡。
通过LLM评判协议评估描述生成，CATS生成更连贯、信息更丰富的输出，表明视觉证据利用更充分。
analysis.experiments: 在LongVideoBench和VideoMME上评估问答准确率，并使用LLM-as-a-judge协议评估描述生成质量。
limitations: 可能对极长视频或复杂场景的泛化性需进一步验证。
曲率计算可能引入额外超参数，需调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CATS通过曲率感知的时序选择，在极低预处理成本下高效提取长视频关键帧，兼顾突变与渐变内容。

papers.title: Detect, Localize, and Explain: Interactive Hierarchical Log Anomaly Analytics with LLM Augmentation
papers.abstract: Logs are ubiquitous in modern systems. Unfortunately, their unstructured nature in flat sequences limits understanding of execution behaviors, hindering effective anomaly diagnosis. To address this, Krone introduces a novel hierarchical log abstraction that transforms flat log sequences into semantically coherent units across entity, action, and status levels. Building on this abstraction, Krone introduces a hierarchical orchestration framework that decomposes flat log sequences into hierarchical execution units and performs modular detection over them. It executes and optimizes the modular detection tasks across levels, enabling precise anomaly detection, localization, and explanation with selective invocation of LLM-based reasoning. In this work, we present Krone-viz, an interactive visualization system based on Krone, which makes hierarchical log analysis interpretable and actionable for software engineers and system operators. Demonstrated on the widely used HDFS benchmark dataset, Krone-viz supports: 1) examining hierarchical decompositions of flat log sequences, 2) inspecting detection results and abnormal segments identified by Krone with LLM-generated explanations, and 3) reusing, reviewing, and revising knowledge generated by LLMs with human-in-the-loop guardrails. The code of Krone-viz is available at https://github.com/LeiMa0324/KRONE_Demo_official, and we deploy a live demo at https://leima0324.github.io/KRONE_Demo_official.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Krone-viz，一种基于层次日志抽象和 LLM 增强的交互式可视化系统，用于异常检测、定位和解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 日志在系统中普遍存在，但其非结构化的扁平序列形式限制了执行行为的理解，阻碍了有效的异常诊断。
analysis.problem: 如何将扁平日志序列转化为语义层次结构，并实现精确的异常检测、定位和可解释分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Krone 层次日志抽象（将扁平序列分解为实体、动作、状态层级的语义单元）和层次编排框架（模块化检测任务，选择性调用 LLM 推理），并构建 Krone-viz 交互式可视化系统。
contributions: 提出 Krone 层次日志抽象方法，将扁平日志序列转化为语义层次结构。
设计层次编排框架，实现模块化异常检测、定位和解释。
开发 Krone-viz 交互式可视化系统，支持层次分解检查、检测结果审查和 LLM 知识复用。
analysis.experiments: 在 HDFS 基准数据集上演示了系统功能，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的推理质量，存在幻觉风险。
层次抽象可能不适用于所有日志类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Krone-viz，一种基于层次日志抽象和 LLM 增强的交互式可视化系统，用于异常检测、定位和解释。

papers.title: The Pokémon Theorem and other Fairness Impossibility Results
papers.abstract: Fairness impossibility results often look like distinct scalar incompatibility statements. We show that several share one RKHS geometry: fairness criteria are linear constraints on conditional mean embeddings, and unequal base rates make the law of total expectation overdetermine those constraints. This view yields four results. The Kleinberg--Mullainathan--Raghavan dichotomy needs only group-conditional unbiasedness, not full calibration. The \emph{Pokémon theorem} shows that a distinct group pair satisfying any finite collection of linear mean-fairness criteria leaves a residual violation witnessed by the MMD, decaying at the Kolmogorov $m$-width rate under spectral regularity. The same tools prove an impossibility for fair feature learning: parity and class-conditional separation in representation space force class collapse under unequal base rates. The approximate relaxations yield signal and error frontiers, allowing a trade-off between real-world estimators and fairness goals. Experiments on standard fairness benchmarks are consistent with our bounds.

analysis.tldr: 公平性不可能性结果可统一为RKHS几何中的线性约束过定问题，并推导出Pokémon定理等新结论。
analysis.research_motivation: 公平性不可能性结果通常表现为不同的标量不兼容性陈述，缺乏统一的理论框架，难以揭示不同公平性准则之间的深层几何关系。
analysis.problem: 如何从RKHS几何角度统一解释和推导多个公平性不可能性结果，并揭示其内在结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公平性准则可转化为条件均值嵌入上的线性约束，当基率不等时，全期望定律导致这些约束过定，从而产生不可能性。
analysis.method: 利用再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的条件均值嵌入，将公平性准则建模为线性约束，通过分析约束的过定性推导不可能性结果。
contributions: 提出Pokémon定理：任意有限个线性均值公平性准则下，不同组对之间仍存在由MMD度量的残差违规，其衰减速率由Kolmogorov m-宽度决定。
证明公平特征学习的不可能性：在基率不等条件下，表示空间中的奇偶性和类条件分离会导致类崩溃。
统一了Kleinberg-Mullainathan-Raghavan二分法、Pokémon定理和公平特征学习不可能性等结果。
给出近似松弛下的信号与误差边界，支持实际估计器与公平性目标之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在标准公平性基准上的实验与理论边界一致。
limitations: 理论结果主要针对线性均值公平性准则，可能不直接适用于非线性或更复杂的公平性定义。
实验部分仅验证了边界的一致性，未提供具体性能指标或与现有方法的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 公平性不可能性结果可统一为RKHS几何中的线性约束过定问题，并推导出Pokémon定理等新结论。

papers.title: Flame3D: Zero-shot Compositional Reasoning of 3D Scenes with Agentic Language Models
papers.abstract: 3D scene understanding spans reasoning about free space, object grounding, hypothetical object insertions, complex geometric relationships, and integrating all of these with external tools and data sources. Existing 3D understanding methods typically rely on large-scale 3D-language training or focus on object grounding and simple spatial relationships. We argue that the broad generalization that motivates 3D-language training can be achieved at inference time, without 3D-specific training. We propose Flame3D, a training-free framework that represents scenes as editable visual-textual 3D memories and exposes them to an off-the-shelf MLLM through composable spatial tools. Flame3D also lets the agent synthesize custom spatial programs at inference time, enabling open-ended reasoning over layouts, empty space, and objects not yet present in the scene. External data and corrections can be added to the memory without retraining. In addition to showing competitive performance to finetuned 3D-LMM methods on ScanQA, we study multi-hop 3D reasoning capabilities of Flame3D by evaluating it on a curated compositional spatial-reasoning benchmark, Compose3D. We find that fixed tools fall short and that the agent's ability to synthesize spatial operations at inference time is essential. These results invite the question: should future progress in 3D scene understanding focus on richer scene memories and expressive compositional abstractions?

analysis.tldr: Flame3D 通过可编辑的视觉-文本 3D 记忆和组合空间工具，无需训练即可实现零样本 3D 场景组合推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 场景理解方法依赖大规模 3D-语言训练或局限于简单空间关系，缺乏泛化性和灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行 3D 特定训练的情况下，实现零样本的 3D 场景组合推理，包括自由空间、假设物体插入和复杂几何关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定工具在组合空间推理中表现不足，而智能体在推理时合成空间操作的能力至关重要。
analysis.method: 将场景表示为可编辑的视觉-文本 3D 记忆，通过组合空间工具暴露给现成的 MLLM，并允许智能体在推理时合成自定义空间程序。
contributions: 提出无需训练的 Flame3D 框架，实现零样本 3D 场景组合推理。
引入可编辑的视觉-文本 3D 记忆和组合空间工具，支持开放推理和外部数据集成。
在 ScanQA 和组合空间推理基准 Compose3D 上展示竞争性能，并揭示推理时空间操作合成的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在 ScanQA 上展示与微调 3D-LMM 方法竞争的性能，并在自建组合空间推理基准 Compose3D 上评估多跳 3D 推理能力。
limitations: 依赖现成 MLLM 的能力，可能受限于基础模型。
组合空间推理基准 Compose3D 为自建，可能缺乏广泛验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Flame3D 通过可编辑的视觉-文本 3D 记忆和组合空间工具，无需训练即可实现零样本 3D 场景组合推理。

papers.title: Learning the Preferences of a Learning Agent
papers.abstract: For AI systems to be useful to humans, they must understand and act in accordance with our values and preferences. Since specifying preferences is a hard task, inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) aims to develop methods that allow for inferring preferences from observed behavior. However, IRL assumes the human to be approximately optimal. This is a big limitation in cases where the human themselves may be learning to act optimally in an environment. In this paper, we formalize the problem of learning the preferences of a learning agent: a predictor observes a learner acting online and tries to infer the underlying reward function being (initially suboptimally) optimized by the learner. We model the learner as either being no-regret, or as converging to an optimal Boltzmann policy over time. In each of these settings, we establish theoretical guarantees for various preference learning algorithms, or otherwise show that such guarantees are impossible.

analysis.tldr: 提出学习学习智能体偏好的问题，并给出理论保证或不可行性结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统逆强化学习假设人类行为近似最优，但现实中人类本身也在学习过程中，行为初始可能非最优，这限制了偏好推断的适用性。
analysis.problem: 如何从在线学习智能体的行为中推断其正在优化的奖励函数（偏好），其中智能体初始行为非最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将学习智能体建模为无遗憾学习或收敛到最优玻尔兹曼策略，并针对每种设置分析偏好学习算法的理论保证或不可行性。
contributions: 形式化了学习学习智能体偏好的问题，放宽了逆强化学习中最优性假设。
在两种学习模型下建立了偏好学习的理论保证或不可行性结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖特定学习模型假设，实际应用中的泛化性未知。
未提供实验验证，实用性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出学习学习智能体偏好的问题，并给出理论保证或不可行性结果。

papers.title: Fast Rates for Offline Contextual Bandits with Forward-KL Regularization under Single-Policy Concentrability
papers.abstract: \emph{Kullback-Leibler} (KL) regularization is ubiquitous in reinforcement learning algorithms in the form of \emph{reverse} or \emph{forward} KL. Recent studies have demonstrated $ε^{-1}$-type fast rates for decision making under reverse KL regularization, in contrast to the standard $ε^{-2}$-type sample complexity. However, for forward-KL-regularized objectives, existing statistical analyses are either not applicable or result in $\tilde{O}(ε^{-2})$ slow rates. We take the first step towards addressing this problem via a streamlined analysis of forward-KL-regularized offline CBs. We give the first $\tilde{O}(ε^{-1})$ upper bounds in tabular and general function approximation settings, both under notions of \emph{single-policy concentrability}. In particular, our convex-analytical pipeline unifies these settings by exploiting the pessimism principle in a novel way and completely bypasses the proof routines in previous works based on the mean value theorem, which might be of independent interest. Moreover, we provide rate-optimal lower bounds, manifesting the tightness of our upper bounds in terms of statistical rates. Our lower bounds also demonstrate that the forward-KL-regularized sample complexity recovers the unregularized slow rate in the low-regularization regime, similarly to the reverse-KL regularization.

analysis.tldr: 首次证明前向KL正则化离线上下文赌博机在单策略可集中性下达到ε⁻¹级快速率。
analysis.research_motivation: 反向KL正则化已实现ε⁻¹级快速率，但前向KL正则化的统计分析要么不适用，要么仅得到ε⁻²级慢速率，存在理论空白。
analysis.problem: 前向KL正则化离线上下文赌博机在单策略可集中性假设下的统计学习速率问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用悲观原则的凸分析框架，统一处理表格和函数逼近设置，完全绕过基于中值定理的证明套路。
contributions: 在表格和一般函数逼近设置下首次给出前向KL正则化离线CB的Õ(ε⁻¹)上界。
提供速率最优的下界，证明上界的紧性，并揭示低正则化下恢复未正则化慢速率的特性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑单策略可集中性假设，可能不适用于更一般的可集中性条件。
理论分析未涉及实际算法实现或计算效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次证明前向KL正则化离线上下文赌博机在单策略可集中性下达到ε⁻¹级快速率。

papers.title: Select-then-differentiate: Solving Bilevel Optimization with Manifold Lower-level Solution Sets
papers.abstract: We study optimistic bilevel optimization when the lower-level problem has a non-isolated manifold of minimizers. In this setting, the hyper-objective may be non-differentiable because the upper-level criterion must choose among multiple lower-level solutions. Under a local Polyak--Łojasiewicz (PŁ) condition, we show that differentiability does not require the lower-level solution set to be a singleton: uniqueness of the optimistic selection is sufficient. This yields an explicit pseudoinverse-based hyper-gradient formula extending the classical singleton-minimizer result. We further characterize the regularity of the hyper-objective: non-degeneracy of the selected minimizer along the solution manifold yields local smoothness, while failure of uniqueness can create many non-differentiable points and failure of non-degeneracy can destroy all positive Hölder regularity of the hyper-gradient. Motivated by this theory, we propose HG-MS, a select-then-differentiate method combining explicit optimistic selection with efficient pseudoinverse-based hyper-gradient computation. Despite the nonconvex nature of optimistic selection over the lower-level solution manifold, we show that HG-MS converges to a stationary point of the optimistic objective with complexity governed by the intrinsic dimension of the solution manifold rather than its ambient dimension. Empirically, we test a practical variant of HG-MS for matched-budget LLM source reweighting. This variant preserves the select-then-differentiate principle and obtains the best GSM8K/MATH scores across the tested backbones, along with competitive or best MT-Bench instruction-following results.

analysis.tldr: 提出HG-MS方法，通过先选择乐观解再微分，解决下层解集为流形的双层优化问题，并在LLM源重加权任务上取得最佳性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有双层优化方法通常假设下层问题有唯一解，但实际中下层解集常为流形，导致超目标不可微，限制了优化效率和应用范围。
analysis.problem: 解决下层问题解集为流形时乐观双层优化的可微性和高效求解问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HG-MS方法，采用先选择乐观解（基于下层解流形上的乐观选择）再微分（利用伪逆计算超梯度）的策略，并证明其收敛性。
contributions: 理论证明在下层满足局部PŁ条件时，乐观选择的唯一性足以保证超目标可微，并给出伪逆超梯度公式。
提出HG-MS算法，收敛复杂度由解流形的内在维度而非环境维度决定，并在LLM源重加权任务上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM源重加权任务上测试HG-MS变体，在GSM8K/MATH和MT-Bench上取得最佳或竞争性结果。
limitations: 理论分析依赖于下层问题的局部PŁ条件，可能不适用于所有场景。
乐观选择本身是非凸优化，实际实现可能依赖启发式方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HG-MS方法，通过先选择乐观解再微分，解决下层解集为流形的双层优化问题，并在LLM源重加权任务上取得最佳性能。

papers.title: RigidFormer: Learning Rigid Dynamics using Transformers
papers.abstract: Learning-based simulation of multi-object rigid-body dynamics remains difficult because contact is discontinuous and errors compound over long horizons. Most existing methods remain tied to mesh connectivity and vertex-level message passing, which limits their applicability to mesh-free inputs such as point clouds and leads to high computational cost. Efficiently modeling high-fidelity rigid-body dynamics from mesh-free representations, therefore, remains challenging. We introduce RigidFormer, an object-centric Transformer-based model that learns mesh-free rigid-body dynamics with controllable integration step sizes. RigidFormer reasons at the object level and advances each object through compact anchors; Anchor-Vertex Pooling enriches these anchors with local vertex features, retaining contact-relevant geometry without dense vertex-level interaction. We propose Anchor-based RoPE to inject anchor geometry into attention while respecting the unordered nature of objects and anchors: object-token processing is permutation-equivariant, and the mean-pooled anchor descriptor is invariant to anchor reindexing while preserving shape extent. RigidFormer further enforces rigidity by projecting updates onto the rigid-body manifold using differentiable Kabsch alignment. On standard benchmarks, RigidFormer outperforms or matches mesh-based baselines using point inputs, runs faster, generalizes to unseen point resolutions and across datasets, and scales to 200+ objects; we also show a preliminary extension to command-conditioned articulated bodies by treating body parts as interacting object-level components.

analysis.tldr: RigidFormer 是一种基于 Transformer 的物体级刚体动力学模型，支持无网格输入和可控积分步长。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于学习的多物体刚体动力学仿真因接触不连续和长期误差累积而困难，现有方法依赖网格连通性和顶点级消息传递，限制了无网格输入（如点云）的适用性且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何从无网格表示高效建模高保真刚体动力学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 RigidFormer，采用物体级 Transformer，通过 Anchor-Vertex Pooling 丰富锚点特征，Anchor-based RoPE 注入几何信息并保持置换等变性，利用可微 Kabsch 对齐将更新投影到刚体流形以强制执行刚性约束。
contributions: 提出 RigidFormer，首个基于 Transformer 的物体级无网格刚体动力学模型，支持可控积分步长。
设计 Anchor-Vertex Pooling 和 Anchor-based RoPE，实现高效几何特征提取与置换等变注意力。
通过可微 Kabsch 对齐强制执行刚性约束，提升物理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，RigidFormer 使用点输入优于或匹配基于网格的基线，运行更快，泛化到未见点分辨率和跨数据集，并扩展到 200+ 物体；还展示了命令条件化铰接体的初步扩展。
limitations: 可能对复杂铰接体或非刚性变形场景的适用性有限。
长期仿真中的误差累积可能仍需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RigidFormer 是一种基于 Transformer 的物体级刚体动力学模型，支持无网格输入和可控积分步长。

papers.title: The Geometry of Forgetting: Temporal Knowledge Drift as an Independent Axis in LLM Representations
papers.abstract: Large language models confidently produce outdated answers, and no existing method can detect them. We show this is not an engineering failure but a structural one: temporal drift, whether a stored fact has changed since training, is encoded as a direction in the residual stream geometrically orthogonal to both correctness and uncertainty. Any method operating on correctness or uncertainty signals is therefore blind to drift by construction. We verify this across six instruction-tuned models. A linear probe trained directly on drift labels achieves AUROC $0.83$--$0.95$; methods based on token entropy, semantic entropy, CCS, and SAPLMA all remain near chance ($0.49$--$0.57$). Five tests confirm the geometric orthogonality: weight cosines ($|\cos| \leq 0.14$), score correlations ($|r| \leq 0.20$), bidirectional null-space projection ($|Δ| \leq 0.008$), iterative null-space projection with $k{=}10$, and difference-of-means dissociation. Mechanistically, the MLP retrieval circuit produces identical dynamics for stale recall and confabulation ($r > 0.81$, six models), explaining why output confidence cannot separate them. A cross-cutoff experiment holds inputs constant and varies only the model: the probe fires on the model whose training predates the fact's transition and stays silent otherwise ($P(A{>}B) = 0.975$--$0.998$, twelve model pairs), confirming it reads model-internal knowledge state rather than input properties. Our code and datasets will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 发现LLM中知识时间漂移是独立于正确性和不确定性的几何方向，现有方法无法检测。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM会自信地输出过时答案，但现有方法无法检测这种时间漂移，这是一个结构性而非工程性问题。
analysis.problem: 检测LLM中存储的知识是否因时间变化而过时（时间漂移）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时间漂移在残差流中编码为与正确性和不确定性正交的几何方向，导致基于正确性或不确定性的方法无法检测。
analysis.method: 训练线性探针直接预测时间漂移标签，并通过几何正交性验证（权重余弦、得分相关、零空间投影等）。
contributions: 发现时间漂移是LLM表示中独立于正确性和不确定性的几何轴。
提出线性探针方法检测时间漂移，AUROC达0.83-0.95，远超现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在六个指令微调模型上验证，线性探针AUROC 0.83-0.95，现有方法（token熵、语义熵、CCS、SAPLMA）接近随机（0.49-0.57）。通过五项几何正交性测试和跨截止实验确认。
limitations: 仅针对时间漂移，未涉及其他类型的知识过时。
线性探针需要漂移标签，可能难以大规模获取。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现LLM中知识时间漂移是独立于正确性和不确定性的几何方向，现有方法无法检测。

papers.title: Evidence Over Plans: Online Trajectory Verification for Skill Distillation
papers.abstract: Agent skills can remarkably improve task success rates by using human-written procedural documents, but their quality is difficult to assess without environment-grounded verification. Existing skill generation methods heavily rely on preference logs rather than direct environment interaction, often yielding negligible or even degraded gains. We identify that it is a fundamental timing bottleneck: robust skills should be posterior-based, distilled from empirical environment interaction rather than prior plans. In this study, we introduce the Posterior Distillation Index (PDI), a trajectory-level metric that quantifies how well a distilled skill is grounded in the task-environment evidence. To operationalize PDI, we present SPARK (Structured Pipelines for Autonomous Runnable tasKs and sKill generation) for preserving task execution evidence towards full trajectory-level analysis. SPARK generates environment-verified trajectories used to compute PDI, and it applies PDI as an online diagnostic and intervention signal to ensure posterior skill formation. Across 86 runnable tasks, SPARK-generated skills consistently surpass no-skill baselines and outperform human-written skills on student models (inference cost up to 1,000x cheaper than teacher models). These findings show that PDI-guided distillation produces efficient and transferable skills grounded in the task-environment interaction. We release our code at https://github.com/EtaYang10th/spark-skills .

analysis.tldr: 提出后验蒸馏指标PDI，通过在线轨迹验证确保技能蒸馏的环境基础性，显著提升技能质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有技能生成方法依赖偏好日志而非环境交互验证，导致技能质量不稳定，存在时序瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何通过环境交互验证来蒸馏出鲁棒、可迁移的智能体技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出基于先验计划的技能生成常导致性能增益微弱甚至下降，而基于后验环境交互的技能更鲁棒。
analysis.method: 提出后验蒸馏指标PDI，并构建SPARK框架生成环境验证轨迹，在线计算PDI作为诊断和干预信号。
contributions: 提出PDI指标量化技能与任务环境证据的契合度
构建SPARK框架实现基于环境验证的技能蒸馏
analysis.experiments: 在86个可运行任务上，SPARK生成的技能一致优于无技能基线和人类编写的技能，且推理成本比教师模型低1000倍。
limitations: 可能依赖任务环境的可交互性
PDI计算可能引入额外开销
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出后验蒸馏指标PDI，通过在线轨迹验证确保技能蒸馏的环境基础性，显著提升技能质量。

papers.title: AQMP: Image compression through Adaptive Quadtree Refinement and Matching Pursuit with Hyperparameter Optimization
papers.abstract: We present AQMP, a novel image codec combining Adaptive Quadtree Refinement with Matching Pursuit. Unlike conventional Matching Pursuit methods that operate on fixed-size sub-images, AQMP dynamically adapts block sizes to local image structure, allocating finer partitions where the image is complex and coarser ones where it is smooth. This adaptivity yields superior compression ratios compared to fixed-size block Matching Pursuit at equivalent image quality, while offering significant parallelization opportunities at both the tree-leaf level and during compression of individual nodes. The algorithm is governed by user-specified accuracy and sparsity parameters alongside a small set of additional hyperparameters. To navigate the trade-off between compression efficiency and visual quality, we perform multi-objective hyperparameter optimization using the Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator, producing comprehensive Pareto fronts. Experimental results show that AQMP achieves up to $4\times$ higher compression rates than JPEG at comparable SSIM values, while maintaining competitive quality across a broad range of compression regimes. Performance evaluation is provided using a representative set of test images. To ensure reproducibility and promote adoption, we have made our implementation publicly available on GitHub under the MIT license.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应四叉树细化与匹配追踪的图像压缩方法，结合超参数优化，相比JPEG实现高达4倍压缩率提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统匹配追踪方法使用固定大小子图像块，无法适应图像局部结构差异，导致压缩效率受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自适应块大小的图像压缩算法，在保持视觉质量的同时提升压缩比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合自适应四叉树细化与匹配追踪，动态调整块大小以适应图像复杂度，并使用树结构Parzen估计器进行多目标超参数优化。
contributions: 提出AQMP图像编解码器，通过自适应四叉树细化提升压缩比。
采用多目标超参数优化生成Pareto前沿，平衡压缩效率与视觉质量。
开源实现（MIT许可）以促进可重复性和采用。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性测试图像上评估，与JPEG相比在相似SSIM下压缩率提升高达4倍。
limitations: 可能未与最新学习型编解码器（如基于CNN的）比较。
超参数优化计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应四叉树细化与匹配追踪的图像压缩方法，结合超参数优化，相比JPEG实现高达4倍压缩率提升。

papers.title: DARE: Difficulty-Adaptive Reinforcement Learning with Co-Evolved Difficulty Estimation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning improves the reasoning ability of large language models but remains costly and sample-inefficient, as many rollouts provide weak learning signals. Difficulty-aware data selection methods attempt to address this by prioritizing moderately difficult prompts, yet our analysis reveals three limitations: difficulty estimates become inaccurate under policy drift, data selection alone yields limited final-performance gains, and inference efficiency remains largely unchanged. These findings suggest that efficient and effective RL requires more than filtering by difficulty: the policy should learn to solve hard tasks while producing concise responses for easy ones. To this end, we propose **Dare**, a unified framework that co-evolves difficulty estimation with the policy via self-normalized importance sampling, maintains diverse difficulty coverage through a symmetric Beta sampling distribution, and applies tailored training strategies across difficulty tiers with adaptive compute allocation. Extensive experiments across multiple models and domains demonstrate that **Dare** consistently outperforms existing methods in training efficiency, final effectiveness, and inference efficiency, producing more concise responses on easy tasks while improving correctness on hard ones. Code is available at https://github.com/EtaYang10th/DARE.

analysis.tldr: DARE 提出一种难度自适应强化学习框架，通过协同进化难度估计与策略，在提升训练和推理效率的同时改善模型在困难任务上的正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习提升大模型推理能力但成本高、样本效率低，现有难度感知数据选择方法存在估计不准、性能增益有限、推理效率未改善等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种统一的强化学习框架，使策略既能高效解决困难任务，又能为简单任务生成简洁回答，同时提升训练和推理效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出三个局限性：难度估计在策略漂移下不准确；仅靠数据选择最终性能提升有限；推理效率基本不变。
analysis.method: 提出 Dare 框架，包含三个组件：通过自归一化重要性采样协同进化难度估计与策略；使用对称 Beta 采样分布维持多样难度覆盖；对不同难度层级应用定制训练策略并自适应分配计算资源。
contributions: 揭示了现有难度感知数据选择方法的三个关键局限性
提出 Dare 框架，统一了难度估计、数据采样和自适应训练策略
在多个模型和领域上验证了训练效率、最终效果和推理效率的显著提升
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和领域上进行实验，结果表明 Dare 在训练效率、最终效果和推理效率上一致优于现有方法，能生成更简洁的回答并提高困难任务的正确性。
limitations: 摘要未提及在极大规模模型上的扩展性验证
对称 Beta 采样分布的超参数敏感性未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DARE 提出一种难度自适应强化学习框架，通过协同进化难度估计与策略，在提升训练和推理效率的同时改善模型在困难任务上的正确性。

papers.title: Emergent Semantic Role Understanding in Language Models
papers.abstract: Understanding how linguistic structure emerges in language models is central to interpreting what these systems learn from data and how much supervision they truly require. In particular, semantic role understanding ("who did what to whom") is a core component of meaning representation, yet it remains unclear whether it arises from pre-training alone or depends on task-specific fine-tuning. We study whether semantic role understanding emerges during language model pre-training or requires task-specific fine-tuning. We freeze decoder-only transformers and train linear probes to extract semantic roles, using performance to infer whether role information is already encoded in pre-training or learned during adaptation. Across model scales, we find that frozen representations contain substantial semantic role information, with performance improving but not fully matching fine-tuned models. This indicates partial but incomplete emergence from pre-training alone. We show that semantic role structure emerges from language modeling objectives, but its internal implementation shifts toward more distributed representations as model scale increases.

analysis.tldr: 冻结的预训练语言模型通过线性探针即可提取语义角色信息，表明语义角色理解在预训练中部分涌现，且随模型规模增大表征更分散。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解语言模型从数据中学习到的语言结构，特别是语义角色（谁对谁做了什么）这一核心意义表征，对于解释模型能力和所需监督程度至关重要。
analysis.problem: 语义角色理解是在语言模型预训练过程中自然涌现，还是依赖于任务特定的微调？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 冻结的预训练表征包含大量语义角色信息，但性能不及微调模型，表明预训练中部分但不完全的涌现；随着模型规模增大，语义角色的内部实现转向更分散的表征。
analysis.method: 冻结decoder-only transformer，训练线性探针提取语义角色，通过探针性能推断角色信息是否在预训练中编码。
contributions: 证明语义角色结构从语言模型预训练目标中涌现，但并非完全。
揭示随着模型规模增大，语义角色的内部表征从局部转向更分散的分布。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用线性探针，可能无法捕获非线性或更复杂的表征。
未探讨不同预训练目标或数据分布的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 冻结的预训练语言模型通过线性探针即可提取语义角色信息，表明语义角色理解在预训练中部分涌现，且随模型规模增大表征更分散。

papers.title: Agentic MIP Research: Accelerated Constraint Handler Generation
papers.abstract: Mixed-integer programming (MIP) research is both mathematically sophisticated and engineering-intensive: testing an algorithmic hypothesis within a branch-and-cut solver requires substantial implementation, debugging, tuning, and large-scale benchmarking. We propose an agentic MIP research framework that shortens this feedback loop by embedding LLM agents into a solver-aware harness for generating, verifying, and evaluating plugins for the open-source solver SCIP. Propagation methods play a central role in accelerating MIP solving by exploiting global constraints. We instantiate our framework on the semantic lifting of MIP formulations into global constraints and the automatic construction of propagation-only SCIP constraint handlers. On the MIPLIB 2017 benchmark set, the framework successfully recovers global constraint structures from constraint programming and generates executable constraint detectors and propagation-only constraint handlers. Furthermore, the framework naturally extends to in-context learning within a sandboxed environment, enabling agents not only to tune and debug generated constraint handlers on real instances, but also to explore global constraint patterns in MIP problems and discover novel propagation strategies not yet implemented in SCIP. This framework allows us to systematically distinguish meaningful algorithmic improvements from low-value or overly costly candidates: the novel propagation methods successfully solved five additional instances within the explored benchmark. Overall, this framework demonstrates that LLM agents can autonomously navigate the complex MIP research loop, paving the way for a more automated solver development process.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于LLM智能体的MIP研究框架，自动生成并验证SCIP求解器的约束处理器，加速算法开发循环。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合整数规划研究既需要数学深度又需要大量工程实现，在分支切割求解器中测试算法假设需要大量实现、调试和基准测试，反馈周期长。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化MIP研究中约束处理器的生成、验证和评估，缩短从算法假设到实验验证的循环。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将LLM智能体嵌入求解器感知的框架中，自动生成、验证和评估SCIP开源求解器的插件，特别关注传播方法，通过语义提升将MIP公式转化为全局约束并自动构建传播约束处理器。
contributions: 提出一个智能体MIP研究框架，利用LLM自动生成和验证SCIP约束处理器。
在MIPLIB 2017基准上成功恢复全局约束结构并生成可执行约束检测器和传播约束处理器。
框架支持上下文学习，使智能体能够调试、调优并发现新的传播策略，解决了五个额外实例。
analysis.experiments: 在MIPLIB 2017基准集上测试，框架成功恢复全局约束结构并生成可执行插件，新传播方法额外解决了五个实例。
limitations: 可能依赖SCIP求解器，泛化到其他求解器需验证。
生成的约束处理器可能仅适用于特定问题类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于LLM智能体的MIP研究框架，自动生成并验证SCIP求解器的约束处理器，加速算法开发循环。

papers.title: Open Ontologies: Tool-Augmented Ontology Engineering with Stable Matching Alignment
papers.abstract: We present Open Ontologies, an open-source ontology engineering system implemented in Rust that integrates LLM-driven construction with formal OWL reasoning and ontology alignment via the Model Context Protocol. Our primary finding is that stable 1-to-1 matching is the dominant factor in ontology alignment quality: on the OAEI Anatomy track, it achieves F1 = 0.832 (P = 0.963, R = 0.733), competitive with state-of-the-art systems and exceeding all in precision. Ablation across five weight configurations shows that signal weights are irrelevant when stable matching is applied (F1 varies by less than 0.004), while removing stable matching drops F1 to 0.728. On the Conference track, the same method achieves F1 = 0.438. On tool-augmented ontology interaction, we find a surprising result: an LLM reading a raw OWL file (F1 = 0.323) performs worse than the same LLM with no file at all (F1 = 0.431), while structured MCP tool access achieves F1 = 0.717. This demonstrates that tool structure provides a qualitatively different mode of access that the LLM cannot replicate by reading raw syntax. The system ships as a single binary under the MIT licence.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于稳定匹配的LLM驱动本体工程系统，在OAEI Anatomy上F1=0.832，发现稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的主导因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 本体工程中，LLM驱动的构建与形式化推理的结合尚不成熟，现有系统在工具增强的LLM交互中缺乏对结构化访问模式的深入理解。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个集成LLM、形式化OWL推理和本体对齐的开源工程系统，并探究影响对齐质量的关键因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的主导因素，信号权重在稳定匹配下几乎无关；LLM读取原始OWL文件性能反而低于无文件访问，而结构化MCP工具访问显著提升性能。
analysis.method: 基于Rust实现的开源本体工程系统，集成LLM驱动构建、形式化OWL推理和通过模型上下文协议（MCP）的本体对齐，采用稳定1对1匹配算法。
contributions: 提出Open Ontologies系统，一个集成LLM、OWL推理和MCP工具访问的开源本体工程工具。
发现稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的主导因素，且信号权重在稳定匹配下无关紧要。
揭示LLM在工具增强交互中，结构化MCP访问优于原始文件读取，表明工具结构提供不同的访问模式。
analysis.experiments: 在OAEI Anatomy和Conference基准上评估，Anatomy上F1=0.832（P=0.963, R=0.733），Conference上F1=0.438；消融实验显示稳定匹配移除后F1降至0.728，工具访问实验中MCP工具访问F1=0.717，原始文件读取F1=0.323，无文件F1=0.431。
limitations: 仅在两个基准上评估，泛化性有待验证。
系统依赖LLM能力，可能受限于模型本身。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于稳定匹配的LLM驱动本体工程系统，在OAEI Anatomy上F1=0.832，发现稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的主导因素。

papers.title: Establishing Robust Retinal Eye Tracking: A Weakly Supervised Algorithmic Framework
papers.abstract: Retinal image-based eye tracking is widely used in ophthalmic imaging and vision science, and is a promising path to deliver higher gaze accuracy than the pupil- and cornea-based approaches commonly used in modern AR/VR devices. Nevertheless, existing retinal tracking algorithms still primarily rely on classical template-matching registration, which can be insufficiently robust to retinal feature variability and real-world imaging conditions. In this work, we propose a novel weakly-supervised, learning-based framework for robust retinal eye tracking. Initial studies demonstrate high accuracy, achieving the 95th-percentile gaze error < 0.45 deg across a cohort of 6 participants.

analysis.tldr: 提出弱监督学习框架实现鲁棒视网膜眼动追踪，精度优于传统模板匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: 视网膜眼动追踪在眼科成像和AR/VR中具有高精度潜力，但现有模板匹配方法对特征变化和真实成像条件鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决传统视网膜追踪算法在视网膜特征变异和真实成像条件下鲁棒性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出弱监督学习框架，利用弱标注数据训练模型进行鲁棒视网膜眼动追踪。
contributions: 首次将弱监督学习应用于视网膜眼动追踪任务
在6名参与者上实现95百分位注视误差<0.45度的高精度
analysis.experiments: 在6名参与者上进行初步研究，报告95百分位注视误差<0.45度。
limitations: 参与者数量较少（仅6人），泛化性待验证
未与多种基线方法对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱监督学习框架实现鲁棒视网膜眼动追踪，精度优于传统模板匹配。

papers.title: Navigating LLM Valley: From AdamW to Memory-Efficient and Matrix-Based Optimizers
papers.abstract: Training large language models requires optimization algorithms that are not only statistically effective, but also computationally and memory efficient at extreme scale. Although Adam remains the dominant optimizer for large-scale language-model pretraining and fine-tuning, recent work has revisited nearly every component of the optimization stack: adaptive moment estimation, decoupled weight decay, memory footprint, curvature approximation, sign-based updates, large-batch stability, low-rank gradient structure, and matrix-wise orthogonalized updates. This survey reviews optimizer design for large language models through a systems-and-optimization lens. We organize the literature into classical first-order optimizers, adaptive optimizers, memory-efficient variants, second-order and curvature-aware methods, sign-based and discovered optimizers, low-rank and projection-based methods, and matrix-based optimizers such as Muon. We also discuss benchmarking methodology, including hyperparameter fairness, scale dependence, wall-clock efficiency, token efficiency, memory overhead, and downstream evaluation. We argue that optimizer research for LLMs is entering a new phase: moving from single-algorithm speedup claims toward rigorous, scale-aware comparisons that jointly evaluate convergence, stability, memory, and implementation complexity.

analysis.tldr: 综述大语言模型优化器设计，从AdamW到内存高效和基于矩阵的优化器，强调系统化、规模感知的比较。
analysis.research_motivation: 训练大语言模型需要统计有效且计算/内存高效的优化算法，但现有优化器研究缺乏系统化、规模感知的比较，导致难以评估实际效果。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地综述和比较适用于大语言模型的各种优化器（从经典一阶到内存高效、二阶、基于矩阵的方法），并建立公平的基准评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过系统-优化视角，将文献组织为经典一阶优化器、自适应优化器、内存高效变体、二阶与曲率感知方法、符号与发现优化器、低秩与投影方法、基于矩阵的优化器（如Muon）等类别，并讨论基准方法（超参数公平性、规模依赖、墙钟效率、token效率、内存开销、下游评估）。
contributions: 提供了大语言模型优化器设计的全面综述，覆盖从AdamW到内存高效和基于矩阵的优化器。
提出了规模感知的基准评估方法论，强调超参数公平性、墙钟效率、内存开销等多维度比较。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新算法或进行新实验。
基准方法论的具体实施细节和验证可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述大语言模型优化器设计，从AdamW到内存高效和基于矩阵的优化器，强调系统化、规模感知的比较。

papers.title: WavesFM: Hierarchical Representation Learning for Longitudinal Wearable Sensor Waveforms
papers.abstract: Wearable sensors enable the continuous acquisition of high-resolution physiological waveforms, such as photoplethysmography and accelerometry, under free-living conditions. However, inferring health-related phenotypes from these signals presents significant challenges due to high sampling frequencies, multimodal dependencies, and extreme sequence lengths (e.g., weeks of recordings), compounded by a scarcity of ground-truth labels. To address these challenges, existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methodologies typically follow two paradigms: (1) learning rich morphological representations from short waveform segments while collapsing longitudinal dynamics through simple aggregation, or (2) modeling behavioral patterns from coarse, hand-crafted features (e.g. heart rate, step counts) spanning longer horizons but foregoing subtle, predictive signatures in raw waveforms. To bridge this gap, we propose WavesFM, a foundation model utilizing a two-stage SSL framework for longitudinal physiological data. Specifically, we decompose the learning problem into two stages: first, a segment-level encoder is pretrained to extract local embeddings from short waveforms; subsequently, a temporal encoder is trained to model the sequence of these embeddings across a multi-day horizon. This hierarchical approach overcomes the computational complexity of high-resolution, long-sequence data, allowing the overall model to capture both local signal semantics and the complex circadian and inter-day variations governing physiological dynamics. Pretrained on over 6.8M hours (N=324k individuals) of recordings for the first stage and 5.3M hours (N=10k) for the second stage, WavesFM demonstrates superior performance across 58 diverse tasks spanning demographics, lifestyle, health conditions, and medications.

analysis.tldr: WavesFM提出两阶段自监督学习框架，从可穿戴传感器波形中分层学习局部形态与长期时序表征，在58项任务上表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 可穿戴传感器产生的高频生理波形数据存在采样率高、模态依赖复杂、序列极长且标注稀缺的问题，现有SSL方法要么关注短时形态但丢失纵向动态，要么使用粗粒度特征建模长期模式但忽略原始波形中的细微预测信号。
analysis.problem: 如何同时从短时波形中学习丰富的形态表征并从多天时间跨度中捕获昼夜和日间变化等纵向动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段自监督学习框架：第一阶段预训练段级编码器从短波形提取局部嵌入；第二阶段训练时序编码器建模多天时间跨度上的嵌入序列。
contributions: 提出WavesFM，一种用于纵向生理波形数据的分层表征学习基础模型。
两阶段SSL框架有效克服了高分辨率长序列数据的计算复杂性，同时捕获局部信号语义和复杂昼夜/日间变化。
在6.8M小时（第一阶段）和5.3M小时（第二阶段）大规模数据上预训练，在58项多样化任务上取得优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在58项任务上评估，涵盖人口统计、生活方式、健康状况和药物，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能对传感器类型和采样率敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
两阶段训练可能引入误差累积。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WavesFM提出两阶段自监督学习框架，从可穿戴传感器波形中分层学习局部形态与长期时序表征，在58项任务上表现优异。

papers.title: Prediction Bottlenecks Don't Discover Causal Structure (But Here's What They Actually Do)
papers.abstract: A Mamba state-space model trained only for next-step prediction appears to recover Granger-causal structure through a simple readout $S = |W_{out} W_{in}|$, with early experiments suggesting the phenomenon generalized across architectures and benefited from interventional data at $p < 10^{-5}$. We package the protocol used to test that claim -- standardized synthetic generators (VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe-style), three intervention semantics ($do(X=c)$, soft-noise, random-forcing), edge-provenance cards on three real datasets, and size-matched control arms -- as a reusable falsification benchmark, and walk the claim through it in five stages. The method-level claim does not survive: (i) a plain linear bottleneck does as well or better; (ii) tuned Lasso beats the bottleneck on synthetic CauseMe-style benchmarks, and on Lorenz-96 (the only real benchmark with unambiguous ground truth) classical PCMCI and Granger lead a tight cluster in which the bottleneck trails; (iii) the headline intervention advantage is roughly 60% a sample-size confound, and the residual disappears under standard $do(X=c)$ interventions, surviving only under a non-standard random-forcing scheme; (iv) even that residual reproduces, with a larger effect, in classical bivariate Granger -- the effect is method-agnostic. What survives is a narrow characterization result; the benchmark is the lasting artifact, and each stage above is one of its control arms.

analysis.tldr: 论文通过可复现的基准测试证明，仅靠预测瓶颈无法可靠发现因果结构，其声称的因果发现能力主要来自样本量混淆和方法无关的统计效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 近期有研究声称Mamba等状态空间模型通过简单线性读出即可从预测任务中恢复Granger因果结构，且该现象跨架构泛化并受益于干预数据。这一主张若成立，将极大简化因果发现流程，但缺乏严格的系统性验证。
analysis.problem: 验证“预测瓶颈能发现因果结构”这一方法级主张是否成立，并揭示其实际行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，声称的因果发现现象在标准化基准测试中无法复现：线性瓶颈表现相当或更好；调优的Lasso在合成基准上优于瓶颈；干预优势约60%来自样本量混淆，剩余效应在标准干预下消失，仅存于非标准随机强制方案中，且该效应在经典双变量Granger因果中也能复现，表明其与方法无关。
analysis.method: 构建可复用的证伪基准测试，包含标准化合成生成器（VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe风格）、三种干预语义、三个真实数据集上的边来源卡片以及规模匹配的控制组，通过五个阶段逐步检验该主张。
contributions: 构建了一个可复用的因果发现证伪基准测试，包含合成和真实数据、多种干预语义及控制组。
通过系统性实验证伪了“预测瓶颈能发现因果结构”的主张，揭示了其实际行为是样本量混淆和方法无关的统计效应。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据（VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe风格）和三个真实数据集上进行了五个阶段的实验，包括与线性瓶颈、调优Lasso、经典PCMCI和Granger方法的对比，以及干预语义和样本量的消融分析。
limitations: 基准测试主要基于Granger因果框架，可能不适用于其他因果定义（如结构因果模型）。
真实数据集缺乏明确因果真值，仅Lorenz-96具有无歧义真值。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文通过可复现的基准测试证明，仅靠预测瓶颈无法可靠发现因果结构，其声称的因果发现能力主要来自样本量混淆和方法无关的统计效应。

papers.title: CIVeX: Causal Intervention Verification for Language Agents
papers.abstract: A valid tool call is not necessarily a valid intervention. Tool-using language agents are guarded by schema validators, policy filters, provenance checks, state predictors, and self-verification, yet such safeguards do not certify that a state-changing action has an identifiable causal effect. In confounded workflows, the action that looks optimal in observational logs can reduce utility when executed. We introduce CIVeX, a causal intervention verifier that maps proposed actions to structural causal queries over a committed action-state graph, checks identifiability, and returns one of four auditable verdicts: EXECUTE, REJECT, EXPERIMENT, or ABSTAIN. Execution requires an assumption-scoped causal certificate carrying graph commitments, an identification argument, a one-sided lower confidence bound (LCB), provenance, and risk limits. On Causal-ToolBench (1,890 instances, 7 seeds), CIVeX yields zero observed false executions across moderate and adversarial confounding. Under adversarial confounding it reaches 84.9% accuracy and 81.1% of oracle utility (+2.23 vs +2.76) and is the only non-oracle method whose constrained utility under a zero-false-execution constraint exceeds the AlwaysAbstain floor. On IHDP and ZOZO Open Bandit (real production logs with uniform-random ground truth), CIVeX matches Oracle correct-execution within 0.1pp and cuts per-execute false-execution by >=50x over naive baselines. A chain-of-thought LLM verifier (Claude Opus, Sonnet) cuts false-execution by an order of magnitude over a terse baseline, yet under adversarial confounding Opus's utility falls to 74% of CIVeX's. Intervention identifiability, not action validity, is the missing primitive for reliable tool use.

analysis.tldr: 提出CIVeX，通过因果干预验证确保语言代理的工具调用具有可识别的因果效应，而非仅语法有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言代理的安全机制（如模式验证、策略过滤）仅保证工具调用的语法有效性，但无法确保状态改变动作具有可识别的因果效应，导致在混杂工作流中看似最优的动作可能降低效用。
analysis.problem: 如何验证语言代理的工具调用是否构成有效的因果干预，而不仅仅是语法正确的调用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，有效的工具调用不一定是有因果效应的干预；在混杂工作流中，基于观测日志的最优动作执行后可能降低效用。
analysis.method: CIVeX将提议的动作映射到结构因果查询，在承诺的动作-状态图上检查可识别性，并返回四种可审计的裁决（EXECUTE, REJECT, EXPERIMENT, ABSTAIN），执行时附带假设范围的因果证书。
contributions: 提出CIVeX，一种因果干预验证器，将工具调用验证从语法有效性扩展到因果可识别性。
在Causal-ToolBench和真实生产日志上验证，CIVeX实现零假执行，并在对抗混杂下达到84.9%准确率和81.1%的oracle效用。
analysis.experiments: 在Causal-ToolBench（1890实例，7种子）上，CIVeX在中等和对抗混杂下实现零假执行；对抗混杂下准确率84.9%，效用为oracle的81.1%。在IHDP和ZOZO Open Bandit真实生产日志上，正确执行率与Oracle相差0.1pp以内，假执行率比基线降低≥50倍。
limitations: 依赖结构因果模型和动作-状态图的构建，可能不适用于动态或未知因果图。
未讨论大规模部署时的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CIVeX，通过因果干预验证确保语言代理的工具调用具有可识别的因果效应，而非仅语法有效。

papers.title: WorldSpeech: A Multilingual Speech Corpus from Around the World
papers.abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) performs well for high-resource languages with abundant paired audio-transcript data, but its accuracy degrades sharply for most languages due to limited publicly available aligned data. To this end, we introduce WorldSpeech, a 24 kHz multilingual speech corpus comprising 65k hours of aligned audio-transcript data across 76 languages, collected from diverse public sources including parliamentary proceedings, international broadcasts, and public-domain audiobooks. For 37 languages, WorldSpeech provides more than 200 hours of aligned speech, with 28 exceeding 500 hours and 24 surpassing 1k hours. Fine-tuning existing ASR models on WorldSpeech results in an average relative Word-Error-Rate reduction of 63.5% across 11 typologically diverse languages.

analysis.tldr: WorldSpeech是一个包含76种语言、6.5万小时对齐音频-文本数据的多语言语音语料库，微调ASR模型后平均相对词错误率降低63.5%。
analysis.research_motivation: 高资源语言的自动语音识别（ASR）性能良好，但大多数语言因缺乏公开的对齐音频-文本数据而导致准确率急剧下降，亟需大规模多语言语料库。
analysis.problem: 现有公开多语言语音数据稀缺，限制了低资源语言的ASR性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从议会记录、国际广播和公共领域有声书等公开来源收集76种语言的6.5万小时24kHz对齐音频-文本数据，构建WorldSpeech语料库。
contributions: 构建了包含76种语言、6.5万小时对齐音频-文本数据的大规模多语言语音语料库WorldSpeech。
在11种语言上微调现有ASR模型，平均相对词错误率降低63.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在11种类型多样的语言上微调现有ASR模型，评估词错误率降低效果。
limitations: 数据来源仅限于公开资源，可能覆盖不全某些语言变体。
未提及对未见语言的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WorldSpeech是一个包含76种语言、6.5万小时对齐音频-文本数据的多语言语音语料库，微调ASR模型后平均相对词错误率降低63.5%。

papers.title: FORTIS: Benchmarking Over-Privilege in Agent Skills
papers.abstract: Large language model agents increasingly operate through an intermediate skill layer that mediates between user intent and concrete task execution. This layer is widely treated as an organizational abstraction, but we argue it is also a privilege boundary that current models routinely exceed. We present \textbf{FORTIS}, a benchmark that evaluates over-privilege in agent skills across two stages: whether a model selects the minimally sufficient skill from a large overlapping library, and whether it executes that skill without expanding into broader tools or actions than the skill permits. Across ten frontier models and three domains, we find that over-privileged behavior is the norm rather than the exception. Models consistently reach for higher-privilege skills and tools than the task requires, failing at both stages at rates that remain high even for the strongest available models. Failure is especially severe under the ordinary conditions of real user interaction: incomplete specification, convenience framing, and proximity to skill boundaries. None of these requires adversarial construction. The results indicate that the skill layer, far from containing agent behavior, is itself a primary source of privilege escalation in current systems.

analysis.tldr: FORTIS 基准测试揭示 LLM Agent 在技能层普遍存在过度特权行为，即使最强模型也难以避免。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent 通过中间技能层协调用户意图与任务执行，但该层被视为组织抽象，其作为特权边界的安全性未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 评估 Agent 技能层中的过度特权问题，即模型是否选择最小必要技能并限制执行范围。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 过度特权行为是常态而非例外；模型在技能选择和执行阶段均频繁失败，尤其在真实用户交互条件下（不完整规范、便利性框架、接近技能边界）更为严重。
analysis.method: 构建 FORTIS 基准，包含两个评估阶段：技能选择（从重叠库中选最小充分技能）和技能执行（不超出技能允许的工具/动作）。
contributions: 提出过度特权概念并形式化为 Agent 安全的关键维度
发布 FORTIS 基准，覆盖十个前沿模型和三个领域
系统揭示技能层是当前系统中特权升级的主要来源
analysis.experiments: 在十个前沿模型和三个领域上评估，发现过度特权行为普遍存在，即使最强模型失败率仍高。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有真实场景
未提供缓解过度特权的具体方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FORTIS 基准测试揭示 LLM Agent 在技能层普遍存在过度特权行为，即使最强模型也难以避免。

papers.title: Do LLMs Experience an Internal Polylogue? Investigating Reasoning through the Lens of Personas
papers.abstract: Recent work shows that large language models (LLMs) encode behavioural traits ("personas") as linear directions in activation space, often called "persona vectors". Prior work has used such directions as static handles for behavioural steering. Building on this, we treat them as dynamic signals instead: probes we can monitor and intervene on as reasoning unfolds. We use the term polylogue to denote the time series of alignments between persona vectors and hidden activations over the course of generation. Experiments across four open-weight models show that polylogue features predict correctness on MMLU-Pro competitively with low-dimensional activation baselines, while remaining interpretable through their associated persona directions. They also suggest concrete steering targets, namely which latent directions to modulate at different stages of a response. We instantiate this as a simple paragraph-conditioned intervention that improves accuracy on three of four models, pointing to stage-aware latent steering as a promising direction for reasoning-time control. Together, this positions the polylogue as an interpretable tool for reasoning-time monitoring and intervention.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM推理过程中的内部状态视为多角色对话（polylogue），通过角色向量动态监控和干预提升推理准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将LLM的行为特质（角色）视为静态方向用于行为控制，但推理过程是动态的，需要更细粒度的监控和干预手段。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM内部角色向量的动态变化来监控和干预推理过程，以提高推理正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出polylogue概念，即角色向量与隐藏激活在生成过程中的时间序列对齐；通过监控polylogue特征预测正确性，并基于段落条件进行潜在方向干预。
contributions: 提出polylogue作为推理过程中可解释的监控工具
证明polylogue特征可预测MMLU-Pro正确性，并指导阶段性干预提升准确率
analysis.experiments: 在四个开源模型上实验，polylogue特征预测正确性竞争力与低维激活基线相当，且段落条件干预在三个模型上提升准确率。
limitations: 仅验证了四个模型，泛化性待确认
干预策略简单，可能不是最优
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM推理过程中的内部状态视为多角色对话（polylogue），通过角色向量动态监控和干预提升推理准确性。

papers.title: Revisiting Mixture Policies in Entropy-Regularized Actor-Critic
papers.abstract: Mixture policies theoretically offer greater flexibility than unimodal policies in continuous action reinforcement learning, but the practical benefits of this complexity remain elusive. Mixture policies are notably absent from most state-of-the-art algorithms, raising a fundamental question: Is the added representational overhead useful? We show that increased flexibility can theoretically enhance solution quality and entropy robustness. Yet standard algorithms like SAC do not leverage these advantages. A core issue is the lack of a low-variance reparameterization trick for mixtures, a luxury Gaussian policies enjoy. We propose a marginalized reparameterization (MRP) estimator to address this, proving it offers lower variance than the standard likelihood-ratio (LR) approach. Our experiments across Gym MuJoCo, DeepMind Control Suite, and MetaWorld show that MRP mixture policies significantly outperform their LR ones, and reach parity (sometimes better) with Gaussian counterparts. In addition, we do find several cases where MRP mixture policies exhibit clear empirical advantages. In this paper, we provide a clearer understanding of the trade-offs involved, elevating MRP mixture policies from theoretical curiosity to a practical tool.

analysis.tldr: 提出边缘化重参数化估计器，使混合策略在熵正则化演员-评论家算法中实用化，性能与高斯策略持平或更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合策略理论上比单峰策略更灵活，但在连续动作强化学习中未被主流算法采用，其实际收益不明确。
analysis.problem: 混合策略在熵正则化演员-评论家算法中缺乏低方差的重参数化技巧，导致其优势无法发挥。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准算法如SAC未利用混合策略的灵活性，主要原因是缺乏低方差的重参数化估计器。
analysis.method: 提出边缘化重参数化（MRP）估计器，通过边缘化混合分量来降低方差，替代标准似然比方法。
contributions: 理论证明混合策略可提升解质量和熵鲁棒性。
提出MRP估计器，证明其方差低于似然比方法。
实验表明MRP混合策略在多个连续控制任务中优于似然比版本，与高斯策略持平或更优。
analysis.experiments: 在Gym MuJoCo、DeepMind Control Suite和MetaWorld上评估，MRP混合策略显著优于似然比版本，部分情况优于高斯策略。
limitations: 未在更复杂任务（如高维动作空间）上验证。
MRP估计器可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出边缘化重参数化估计器，使混合策略在熵正则化演员-评论家算法中实用化，性能与高斯策略持平或更优。

papers.title: Lost in Translation? Exploring the Shift in Grammatical Gender from Latin to Occitan
papers.abstract: The diachronic evolution from Latin to the Romance languages involved a restructuring of the grammatical gender system from a tripartite configuration (masculine, feminine, neuter) to a bipartite one (masculine, feminine). In this work, we introduce an interpretable deep learning framework to investigate this phenomenon at both lexical and contextual levels. First, we show that conventional tokenization strategies are insufficiently robust for this low-resource historical setting, and that our proposed tokenizer improves performance over these baselines. At the lexical level, we evaluate the contribution of morphological features to gender prediction. At the contextual level, we quantify the contributions of different part-of-speech categories to grammatical gender prediction. Together, these analyses characterize the distribution of gender information between the lemma and its sentential context. We make our codebase, datasets, and results publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 用可解释深度学习框架分析拉丁语到奥克语语法性别演变的词汇与上下文因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 拉丁语到罗曼语族的历时演变涉及语法性别系统从三分（阳、阴、中性）到二分（阳、阴）的重构，理解这一过程对历史语言学至关重要，但低资源历史语言设置下现有方法不足。
analysis.problem: 如何量化分析拉丁语到奥克语语法性别演变中词汇形态特征与上下文词性类别的贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出可解释深度学习框架，包含改进的分词器，在词汇层面评估形态特征对性别预测的贡献，在上下文层面量化不同词性类别对性别预测的贡献。
contributions: 提出适用于低资源历史语言场景的可解释深度学习框架。
设计改进的分词器，优于传统分词策略。
量化了词汇形态和上下文词性在语法性别预测中的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对拉丁语到奥克语单一语言对，泛化性未知。
未涉及中性性别消失的具体机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用可解释深度学习框架分析拉丁语到奥克语语法性别演变的词汇与上下文因素。

papers.title: Beyond Self-Play: Hierarchical Reasoning for Continuous Motion in Closed-Loop Traffic Simulation
papers.abstract: Closed-loop traffic simulation requires agents that are both scalable and behaviorally realistic. Recent self-play reinforcement learning approaches demonstrate strong scalability, but their equilibrium strategies fail to capture the socially aware behaviors of real human drivers. We propose a hierarchical architecture that goes beyond self-play by combining high-level multi-agent interaction reasoning with low-level continuous trajectory realization. Specifically, a Stackelberg-style Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) module generates interaction-aware intention commands. These commands condition a low-level continuous motion module, translating the strategic intent into physically consistent, scene-responsive control sequences. To mitigate distribution shift in closed-loop deployment, we introduce a hybrid co-training scheme combining MARL with auxiliary recovery supervision. Experiments on a SUMO-based urban network demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior control smoothness and safety compared to self-play and passive imitation baselines, while maintaining competitive traffic efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层架构，结合Stackelberg博弈推理与连续运动控制，提升闭环交通仿真中智能体的社会意识行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自博弈强化学习方法虽可扩展，但均衡策略无法捕捉真实人类驾驶员的社会意识行为，导致仿真行为不够真实。
analysis.problem: 如何使闭环交通仿真中的智能体既能实现可扩展的自我博弈，又能表现出类似人类的社会意识行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自博弈方法产生的均衡策略缺乏社会意识，而被动模仿学习在闭环部署中存在分布偏移问题。
analysis.method: 分层架构：高层使用Stackelberg多智能体强化学习生成交互感知的意图指令，低层使用连续运动模块将意图转化为物理一致的连续控制序列，并引入混合协同训练（MARL+辅助恢复监督）缓解分布偏移。
contributions: 提出超越自博弈的分层推理架构，结合Stackelberg博弈与连续运动控制。
引入混合协同训练策略，缓解闭环部署中的分布偏移问题。
analysis.experiments: 在SUMO城市网络上的实验表明，所提框架在控制平滑性和安全性上优于自博弈和被动模仿基线，同时保持有竞争力的交通效率。
limitations: 实验仅在SUMO仿真环境进行，未在真实交通场景验证。
Stackelberg博弈的求解可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层架构，结合Stackelberg博弈推理与连续运动控制，提升闭环交通仿真中智能体的社会意识行为。

papers.title: MultiMedVision: Multi-Modal Medical Vision Framework
papers.abstract: Multi-modal medical imaging enables comprehensive diagnostics, yet current foundation models process 2D (e.g. X-ray) and 3D (e.g. CT) data with separate, dimensionality-specific architectures. We present MultiMedVision, a unified framework for joint 2D/3D representation learning built on a Sparse Vision Transformer. Our model uses 3D Rotary Positional Embeddings and variable-length sequence packing to process mixed-modality batches natively within a shared latent space, without modality-specific adapters or treating 3D volumes as 2D slice sequences. Trained with a self-supervised objective on chest X-rays (MIMIC-CXR) and CT scans (CT-RATE), and using a single shared encoder with 5x less data, MultiMedVision achieves competitive performance on both 2D benchmarks (Macro AUROC 0.82 on MIMIC, 0.84 on CheXpert) and 3D tasks (0.85 on CT-RATE). Analysis of the learned representations reveals coexisting modality-specific and shared feature subspaces, demonstrating that unified cross-dimensional representation learning is feasible without sacrificing modality-specific performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一2D/3D医学影像的稀疏视觉Transformer框架，无需模态专用适配器，在减少5倍数据下达到竞争性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学影像基础模型对2D和3D数据使用分离的架构，无法共享表示，导致效率低下且难以跨模态泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的框架，能够同时处理2D和3D医学影像，并在共享潜在空间中学习跨维度的表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于稀疏视觉Transformer，使用3D旋转位置编码和可变长度序列打包，在共享编码器中原生处理混合模态批次，无需模态专用适配器。
contributions: 提出MultiMedVision，首个统一2D/3D医学影像的稀疏ViT框架。
引入3D旋转位置编码和可变长度序列打包，实现混合模态批次的原生处理。
在2D和3D基准上以5倍更少数据达到竞争性能，并揭示模态特定与共享特征子空间共存。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert和CT-RATE上评估，2D任务Macro AUROC 0.82/0.84，3D任务0.85。
limitations: 仅验证了胸部X光和CT，其他模态（如MRI）未测试。
自监督训练可能未充分利用所有可用数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一2D/3D医学影像的稀疏视觉Transformer框架，无需模态专用适配器，在减少5倍数据下达到竞争性能。

papers.title: From Traditional Taggers to LLMs: A Comparative Study of POS Tagging for Medieval Romance Languages
papers.abstract: Part-of-speech (POS) tagging for Medieval Romance languages remains challenging due to orthographic variation, morphological complexity, and limited annotated resources. This paper presents a systematic empirical evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for POS tagging across three medieval varieties: Medieval Occitan, Medieval Catalan, and Medieval French. We compare traditional rule-based and statistical taggers with modern open-source LLMs under zero-shot prompting, few-shot prompting, monolingual fine-tuning, and cross-lingual transfer learning settings. Experiments on historically grounded datasets show that LLM-based approaches consistently outperform traditional taggers, with fine-tuning and multilingual training yielding the largest improvements. In particular, cross-lingual transfer learning substantially benefits under-resourced varieties, while targeted bilingual training can outperform broader multilingual configurations for specific target languages. The results highlight the importance of linguistic proximity and dataset characteristics when designing transfer strategies for historical NLP. These findings provide empirical insights into the applicability of modern neural methods to medieval text processing and provide practical guidance for deploying LLM-based POS tagging pipelines in digital humanities research. All code, models, and processed datasets are released for reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: LLM在三种中世纪罗曼语POS标注上全面超越传统方法，跨语言迁移学习对低资源变体尤其有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 中世纪罗曼语的词性标注因拼写变异、形态复杂和标注资源稀缺而极具挑战，传统方法效果有限，亟需探索现代LLM的适用性。
analysis.problem: 系统评估LLM在中世纪罗曼语（中世纪奥克语、加泰罗尼亚语、法语）POS标注上的表现，并与传统方法对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对比传统规则/统计标注器与开源LLM在零样本、少样本、单语微调、跨语言迁移学习四种设置下的POS标注性能。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM在三种中世纪罗曼语POS标注上的表现，覆盖多种提示和微调策略。
发现跨语言迁移学习对低资源变体有显著提升，且针对性的双语训练可能优于多语配置。
公开代码、模型和处理后的数据集以促进可复现性。
analysis.experiments: 在历史数据集上实验，LLM方法一致优于传统标注器，微调和多语训练提升最大；跨语言迁移学习对低资源变体尤其有效。
limitations: 仅涵盖三种中世纪罗曼语，泛化到其他历史语言需验证。
未讨论LLM推理成本或部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在三种中世纪罗曼语POS标注上全面超越传统方法，跨语言迁移学习对低资源变体尤其有效。

papers.title: Beyond Thinking: Imagining in 360$^\circ$ for Humanoid Visual Search
papers.abstract: Humanoid Visual Search (HVS) requires agents to actively explore immersive 360$^\circ$ environments. While prior methods treat this as a monolithic task relying on cumulative, multi-turn Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, they impose heavy cognitive burdens and require expensive trajectory-level annotations. In this paper, we propose Imagining in 360$^\circ$, a novel framework that decouples the exploration process into a specialized Imaginator and an Actor. The Imaginator functions as a probabilistic predictor of spatial priors; instead of maintaining a cumulative reasoning chain, it infers the semantic layout of both observed and unobserved regions in a single step. By sampling multiple hypotheses within this semantic space, we provide the Actor with a distribution of effective spatial information, offering robust guidance that hedges against uncertainty during active search. This decoupled architecture significantly lowers data engineering costs by eliminating the need for full-trajectory CoT annotations, enabling the generation of over 1.96 million curated training samples. Extensive experiments demonstrate that explicitly modeling semantic spatial priors drastically improves search efficiency and success rates in complex, in-the-wild environments.

analysis.tldr: 将360°人形视觉搜索解耦为空间先验预测与动作执行，大幅提升效率并降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将人形视觉搜索视为单一任务，依赖累积的多轮思维链推理，导致认知负担重且需要昂贵的轨迹级标注，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖完整轨迹思维链标注的情况下，高效引导智能体在360°沉浸式环境中主动搜索目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Imagining in 360°框架，将探索过程解耦为Imaginator（单步预测观测与未观测区域的语义布局，生成多个假设）和Actor（基于空间先验分布进行鲁棒动作决策）。
contributions: 提出解耦式人形视觉搜索框架，将空间先验预测与动作执行分离，降低认知负担。
通过单步语义布局预测和多重假设采样，无需完整轨迹思维链标注，生成超过196万训练样本。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂真实环境中进行大量实验，表明显式建模语义空间先验显著提升搜索效率和成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语义布局预测器，在极端未知场景下先验准确性受限。
框架在动态环境中的适应性尚未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将360°人形视觉搜索解耦为空间先验预测与动作执行，大幅提升效率并降低标注成本。

papers.title: BoostAPR: Boosting Automated Program Repair via Execution-Grounded Reinforcement Learning with Dual Reward Models
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning for program repair is hindered by sparse execution feedback and coarse sequence-level rewards that obscure which edits actually fix bugs. We present BoostAPR, a three-stage framework addressing these challenges: (1) supervised fine-tuning on execution-verified demonstrations with reasoning traces, (2) training dual reward models--a sequence-level assessor and a line-level credit allocator--from execution outcomes, and (3) PPO optimization where the line-level model redistributes rewards to critical edit regions. This line-level credit assignment operates at an intermediate granularity naturally suited to code changes. Trained on SWE-Gym and evaluated on four benchmarks, BoostAPR achieves 40.7% on SWE-bench Verified (+22.9pp over base model), 24.8% on Defects4J (Python-to-Java transfer), 84.5% on HumanEval-Java, and 95.0% on QuixBugs, achieving competitive results among open-source models with strong cross-language generalization.

analysis.tldr: BoostAPR通过执行反馈和双奖励模型实现行级信用分配，显著提升程序修复性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习在程序修复中面临执行反馈稀疏和序列级奖励无法定位关键编辑的问题，导致修复效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用执行反馈设计细粒度奖励机制，引导强化学习模型精准修复代码缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 序列级奖励掩盖了哪些编辑真正修复了缺陷，导致模型难以学习有效修复策略。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：1) 在带执行验证的演示数据上进行监督微调；2) 训练序列级评估器和行级信用分配器双奖励模型；3) 使用PPO优化，行级模型将奖励重新分配到关键编辑区域。
contributions: 提出行级信用分配机制，在代码变更的中间粒度上分配奖励，优于序列级和token级方法。
构建三阶段强化学习框架BoostAPR，在多个基准上取得显著提升，并展示跨语言泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Verified上达到40.7%（+22.9pp），Defects4J上24.8%（Python到Java迁移），HumanEval-Java上84.5%，QuixBugs上95.0%。
limitations: 依赖执行验证的演示数据，可能限制在无执行环境场景的应用。
行级信用分配的有效性可能受代码结构复杂度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BoostAPR通过执行反馈和双奖励模型实现行级信用分配，显著提升程序修复性能。

papers.title: KEPIL: Knowledge-Enhanced Prompt-Image Learning for Prompt-Robust Disease Detection
papers.abstract: Vision--language models (VLMs) show promise for clinical decision support in radiology because they enable joint reasoning over radiological images and clinical text, thereby leveraging complementary clinical information. However, radiological findings are long-tailed in practice, leaving some conditions underrepresented and making zero-shot inference essential. Yet current CLIP-style medical VLMs are sensitive to prompt variations and often lack trustworthy external knowledge at inference time, which hinders reliable clinical deployment. We present \textit{KEPIL}, a prompt-robust framework that integrates curated medical knowledge to stabilize zero-shot generalization. KEPIL comprises: (i) \emph{dynamic prompt enrichment} using ontologies with LLM assistance, (ii) a \emph{semantic-aware contrastive loss} aligning embeddings of equivalent prompt variants via a dual-embedding objective, and (iii) \emph{entity-centric report standardization} to yield ontology-aligned representations. Across seven benchmarks, KEPIL achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot inference performance; under prompt-variation tests, it improves AUC by \(6.37\%\) on \textit{CheXpert} and by \(4.11\%\) on average. These results suggest that structured knowledge and robust prompt design are key to clinically reliable radiology-facing VLMs. Code will be released at https://github.com/Roypic/KEPIL.

analysis.tldr: KEPIL通过知识增强和对比学习提升医学VLM对提示变化的鲁棒性，在零样本疾病检测中达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 放射学中的长尾分布使零样本推理至关重要，但现有CLIP式医学VLM对提示变化敏感且缺乏外部知识，阻碍临床部署。
analysis.problem: 如何提升医学VLM在零样本疾病检测中对提示变化的鲁棒性并融入结构化知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出CLIP式医学VLM对提示变化敏感，且缺乏可信的外部知识，导致零样本泛化不稳定。
analysis.method: KEPIL框架包括：(i) 利用本体和LLM进行动态提示丰富，(ii) 通过双嵌入目标使用语义感知对比损失对齐等价提示变体的嵌入，(iii) 实体中心报告标准化以生成本体对齐表示。
contributions: 提出KEPIL框架，结合动态提示丰富、语义感知对比损失和实体中心报告标准化，提升零样本鲁棒性。
在七个基准上实现零样本SOTA，在CheXpert上AUC提升6.37%，平均提升4.11%。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准上进行零样本推理和提示变化测试，CheXpert上AUC提升6.37%，平均提升4.11%。
limitations: 依赖外部本体和LLM辅助，可能引入额外计算开销。
仅在放射学领域验证，泛化到其他医学模态需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KEPIL通过知识增强和对比学习提升医学VLM对提示变化的鲁棒性，在零样本疾病检测中达到SOTA。

papers.title: MCP-Cosmos: World Model-Augmented Agents for Complex Task Execution in MCP Environments
papers.abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has unified the interface between Large Language Models (LLMs) and external tools, yet a fundamental gap remains in how agents conceptualize the environments within which they operate. Current paradigms are bifurcated: Task-level planning often ignores execution-time dynamics, while reactive execution lacks long-horizon foresight. We present MCP-Cosmos, a framework that infuses generative World Models (WM) into the MCP ecosystem to enable predictive task automation. By unifying three disparate technologies, namely MCP, World Model, and Agent, we demonstrate that a "Bring Your Own World Model" (BYOWM) strategy allows agents to simulate state transitions and refine plans in a latent space before execution. We conducted experiments using two strategies, namely ReAct and SPIRAL with 2 planning models and 3 representative world models over 20+ MCP-Bench tasks. We observed improvements in Agent's environment interaction KPI such as tool success rate and tool parameter accuracy. The framework also offers new metrics such as Execution Quality to generate new insights about the effectiveness of world models compared to baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCP-Cosmos框架，将世界模型注入MCP生态系统，使智能体能在执行前模拟状态转移并优化计划。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前MCP环境中智能体在任务规划与执行之间存在鸿沟：任务级规划忽略执行动态，反应式执行缺乏长远预见，导致工具调用成功率低、参数不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何将生成式世界模型集成到MCP框架中，使智能体具备预测性任务自动化能力，提升工具交互质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MCP-Cosmos框架，采用'自带世界模型'(BYOWM)策略，在潜在空间中模拟状态转移并优化计划，统一MCP、世界模型和智能体。
contributions: 提出MCP-Cosmos框架，将世界模型注入MCP生态系统，实现预测性任务自动化。
引入BYOWM策略，允许智能体在执行前模拟状态转移并优化计划。
在20+ MCP-Bench任务上验证，工具成功率和参数准确性等KPI得到提升。
提出Execution Quality等新指标，用于评估世界模型的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在20+ MCP-Bench任务上，使用ReAct和SPIRAL两种策略，结合2个规划模型和3个代表性世界模型进行实验，观察到工具成功率和参数准确性提升。
limitations: 实验仅在MCP-Bench任务上进行，泛化性有待验证。
世界模型的质量对性能影响较大，BYOWM策略可能依赖外部模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MCP-Cosmos框架，将世界模型注入MCP生态系统，使智能体能在执行前模拟状态转移并优化计划。

papers.title: Data-driven Circuit Discovery for Interpretability of Language Models
papers.abstract: Circuit discovery aims to explain how language models (LMs) implement a specific task by localizing and interpreting a circuit, a computational subgraph responsible for the LM's behavior. Existing circuit discovery methods are hypothesis-driven; they first informally define a task with a dataset, and then apply a circuit discovery algorithm over that dataset to obtain a single circuit. This imposes two strong assumptions: that the LM implements the task with a single circuit, and that the dataset adequately represents the task as humans understand it. We systematically test these assumptions across four previously studied tasks and find that even minor dataset variations that preserve task semantics can produce circuits with low edge overlap and cross-dataset faithfulness. More strikingly, when applied to a mixed dataset with two distinct tasks whose separately discovered circuits have near-zero cross-faithfulness, existing methods still return a single circuit with high faithfulness across both tasks. This indicates that current methods discover dataset-specific circuits, rather than general task circuits. We propose Data-driven Circuit Discovery (DCD), a new discovery framework that drops both assumptions: instead of returning a single circuit for a dataset, DCD first clusters examples in the dataset by how similarly the model processes them and discovers a separate circuit for each group. This allows distinct mechanisms to appear separately rather than merged into a single circuit; each circuit explains its group, not the full task. Experiments show that DCD discovers multiple circuits per dataset, each more faithful to its group than a single circuit discovered by existing methods. Broadly, DCD lets the data reveal mechanistic structure within LMs, rather than relying on human-defined task boundaries that may not align with how models organize their computation.

analysis.tldr: 现有电路发现方法假设单一电路和数据集充分代表任务，但实验表明这些假设不成立；本文提出数据驱动电路发现（DCD），通过聚类示例并发现每个组的独立电路，揭示语言模型中的多种机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有电路发现方法依赖两个强假设：语言模型用单一电路实现任务，且数据集充分代表任务。这些假设可能不成立，导致发现的电路是数据集特定的而非任务通用的，限制了可解释性研究的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不假设单一电路和数据集充分代表任务的前提下，发现语言模型中真实、忠实于模型行为的电路结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 保持任务语义的微小数据集变化会导致电路边缘重叠低和跨数据集忠实度低；2) 混合两个不同任务的数据集时，现有方法仍返回一个高忠实度的单一电路，即使单独发现的电路交叉忠实度接近零。这表明现有方法发现的是数据集特定电路，而非通用任务电路。
analysis.method: 提出数据驱动电路发现（DCD）框架：首先根据模型处理示例的相似性对数据集中的示例进行聚类，然后为每个聚类发现一个独立的电路，从而允许不同机制分开出现，而不是合并为一个电路。
contributions: 系统验证了现有电路发现方法中两个强假设（单一电路、数据集充分代表任务）的不成立性，揭示了数据集特定电路的问题。
提出数据驱动电路发现（DCD）框架，通过聚类和分组电路发现，使数据揭示模型内部的机制结构，而非依赖人类定义的任务边界。
analysis.experiments: 在四个先前研究的任务上进行实验，使用数据集变体和混合数据集，比较DCD与现有方法的电路忠实度。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 聚类方法的选择可能影响结果，摘要未讨论聚类鲁棒性。
DCD可能增加计算开销，因为需要为每个聚类发现电路。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 现有电路发现方法假设单一电路和数据集充分代表任务，但实验表明这些假设不成立；本文提出数据驱动电路发现（DCD），通过聚类示例并发现每个组的独立电路，揭示语言模型中的多种机制。

papers.title: Internal vs. External: Comparing Deliberation and Evolution for Multi-Agent Constitutional Design
papers.abstract: Multi-agent AI systems need behavioral constitutions, but it is unresolved whether such rules should emerge internally through agent self-governance or be discovered externally through optimization. We present the first controlled comparison of internal deliberation and external evolution across three social environments: a coordination grid-world, an iterated public goods game, and a bilateral trading market. Across 180 simulation runs, evolution significantly outperforms deliberation in collective-action settings (p < 0.01), while neither method improves outcomes in bilateral trading. A multiplier ablation reveals that evolution's advantage inverts when incentives shift: at pool multiplier (m = 0.75) the evolved constitution forces value-destroying cooperation and becomes the worst-performing method. Notably, no deliberation run across thirty trials ever proposed punishment -- the canonical cooperation-sustaining mechanism evolution reliably discovers -- suggesting external optimization wins on peaks while internal self-governance trades peaks for structural responsiveness.

analysis.tldr: 在多智能体宪法设计中，外部进化优化在集体行动场景中显著优于内部协商，但惩罚机制的缺失使协商无法达到最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体AI系统需要行为宪法来规范交互，但规则应通过内部自我治理还是外部优化发现尚不明确，缺乏系统比较。
analysis.problem: 比较内部协商与外部进化两种方法在多智能体宪法设计中的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 进化在集体行动场景中显著优于协商；当激励反转时进化优势逆转；协商从未提出惩罚机制，而进化可靠地发现这一经典合作维持机制。
analysis.method: 在三种社会环境中（协调网格世界、迭代公共物品博弈、双边交易市场）进行180次模拟，比较内部协商与外部进化。
contributions: 首次对内部协商和外部进化进行受控比较
揭示进化在集体行动中的优势及其在激励反转时的局限性
发现协商无法自发产生惩罚机制的结构性缺陷
analysis.experiments: 在三种社会环境中进行180次模拟运行，使用统计检验（p<0.01）和乘数消融实验。
limitations: 仅模拟了三种特定社会场景，泛化性有限
协商的具体实现可能影响结果
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在多智能体宪法设计中，外部进化优化在集体行动场景中显著优于内部协商，但惩罚机制的缺失使协商无法达到最优。
