papers.title: A Communication-Theoretic Framework for LLM Agents: Cost-Aware Adaptive Reliability
papers.abstract: Agents built on large language models (LLMs) rely on a range of reliability techniques, including retry, majority voting, and self-consistency, that have been developed in parallel rather than within a common analytical framework. We observe that an LLM sampled at temperature $T$ is a discrete stochastic channel $p(y \mid x)$ in the sense of Shannon's coding theory, and use this identity as the entry point for such a framework grounded in communication theory. Each of these techniques is a special case of one of six classical reliability operators: diversity combining, hybrid retransmission, iterative generator-critic decoding, rateless sampling, structured redundant verification, and difficulty-adaptive routing. Within the framework we give two closed-form results: a noise-variance threshold above which uniform averaging beats quality-weighted averaging, and a contractivity criterion for generator-critic refinement, consistent with a contractive-to-divergent transition we observe between 3B- and 14B-parameter models. We further introduce a cost-aware semantic-nearest-neighbor router whose single Lagrangian knob traverses the quality-cost frontier without retraining. Across six channel configurations spanning local and cloud models on 69 hard tasks, no fixed model-technique-budget choice dominates, motivating per-task allocation. On a 300-item hard split of MMLU, GSM8K, and HumanEval, our router occupies the full empirical Pareto frontier: at matched quality, its normalized cost is ${\approx}56$\% lower than the strongest fixed technique; at matched normalized cost, it improves quality by ${\approx}7$\% ($26$\% over single-shot decoding). These results argue for consolidating these reliability techniques into a single tunable layer informed by channel coding.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM Agent的可靠性技术统一为通信理论框架，提出成本感知的自适应路由方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent的可靠性技术（如重试、多数投票、自一致性）是并行发展的，缺乏统一的分析框架，导致难以系统比较和优化。
analysis.problem: 如何将多种可靠性技术纳入统一理论框架，并实现成本感知的自适应选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到3B到14B参数模型间存在从收缩到发散的现象，以及均匀平均优于质量加权平均的噪声方差阈值。
analysis.method: 基于通信理论，将LLM视为离散随机信道，定义六种经典可靠性算子，并提出成本感知的语义最近邻路由器。
contributions: 建立了LLM Agent可靠性技术的通信理论统一框架
给出了两个闭式结果：噪声方差阈值和收缩性判据
提出了无需重训练即可遍历质量-成本前沿的成本感知路由器
analysis.experiments: 在69个困难任务、6种信道配置（本地和云模型）上评估，在MMLU、GSM8K、HumanEval的300项困难子集上，路由器占据完整经验帕累托前沿：匹配质量时归一化成本降低约56%，匹配成本时质量提升约7%（相比单次解码提升26%）。
limitations: 框架可能未覆盖所有新兴的可靠性技术
路由器依赖语义最近邻，可能受嵌入质量影响
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM Agent的可靠性技术统一为通信理论框架，提出成本感知的自适应路由方法。

papers.title: Personalized Alignment Revisited: The Necessity and Sufficiency of User Diversity
papers.abstract: Personalized alignment aims to adapt large language models to heterogeneous user preferences, yet the precise theoretical conditions for its statistical efficiency have not been formally established. This paper characterizes the conditions under which personalized alignment achieves O(1) online regret and log(1/epsilon) offline sample complexity. We show that these optimal rates depend on a specific user-diversity condition: the population of user-specific heads must span the latent reward directions that can alter the optimal response. We prove that this condition is both necessary and sufficient. When it holds, simple greedy algorithms achieve benchmark efficiency; when it fails, every learner in a natural admissible class incurs at least logarithmic regret. Our results identify user diversity as the fundamental driver of personalized identifiability.

analysis.tldr: 用户多样性是实现个性化对齐最优效率的充要条件。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有个性化对齐方法缺乏理论保证，无法解释为何某些场景下统计效率高而另一些场景低，需要建立严谨的理论条件来指导算法设计。
analysis.problem: 个性化对齐中用户异质性对统计效率（在线遗憾和离线样本复杂度）的理论影响尚未明确，需要刻画实现最优率的充要条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 理论分析：定义用户多样性条件（用户特定头张成潜在奖励方向），证明其对于实现O(1)在线遗憾和log(1/ε)离线样本复杂度的必要性和充分性，并分析条件不满足时所有自然可容许算法至少产生对数遗憾。
contributions: 首次形式化刻画个性化对齐中用户多样性条件，证明其是实现最优统计效率的充要条件。
揭示用户多样性是个性化可识别性的根本驱动力，为算法设计提供理论指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖特定假设（如奖励函数线性、用户头结构），实际场景中条件可能难以验证。
未讨论用户多样性条件不满足时的实用算法或近似方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用户多样性是实现个性化对齐最优效率的充要条件。

papers.title: AI Native Asset Intelligence
papers.abstract: Modern security environments generate fragmented signals across cloud resources, identities, configurations, and third-party security tools. Although AI-native security assistants improve access to this data, they remain largely reactive: users must ask the right questions and interpret disconnected findings. This does not scale in enterprise environments, where signal importance depends on exposure, exploitability, dependencies, and business context. Repeated AI queries may therefore produce unstable prioritization without a structured basis for comparing assets. This paper introduces AI-native asset intelligence, a framework that transforms heterogeneous security data into a structured intelligence layer for consistent, contextual, and proactive asset-level reasoning. The framework combines a modeling layer, representing assets, identities, relationships, controls, attack vectors, and blast-radius patterns, with a scoring layer that converts fragmented signals into a normalized measure of asset importance. The scoring system separates intrinsic exposure, based on misconfigurations and attack-vector evidence, from contextual importance, based on anomaly, blast radius, business criticality, and data criticality. AI contextualization refines severity and business/data classifications, while deterministic aggregation preserves consistency. We evaluate the scoring system on a production snapshot with 131,625 resources across 15 vendors and 178 asset types. Sensitivity analyses and ablations show that severity mappings control finding sensitivity, AI severity adjustment refines prioritization, attack-vector scoring responds to rare exploitability evidence, and contextual modulation selectively modifies exposed resources based on business or data importance. The results support AI-native asset intelligence as a foundation for stable prioritization and proactive security-posture reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI原生资产智能框架，将异构安全数据转化为结构化智能层，实现一致、上下文感知的资产级推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代安全环境信号碎片化，现有AI安全助手反应式且缺乏结构化比较基础，导致优先级不稳定，无法规模化。
analysis.problem: 如何将异构安全数据转化为结构化、一致且可比较的资产重要性度量，以支持主动安全态势推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合建模层（资产、身份、关系、控制、攻击向量、爆炸半径）与评分层（分离内在暴露和上下文重要性），通过AI上下文调整和确定性聚合实现稳定优先级排序。
contributions: 提出AI原生资产智能框架，整合异构安全数据为结构化智能层。
设计双因素评分系统，分离内在暴露与上下文重要性，结合AI调整与确定性聚合。
analysis.experiments: 在生产快照（131,625个资源，15个供应商，178种资产类型）上评估评分系统，进行敏感性分析和消融实验。
limitations: 可能依赖特定安全工具和配置，泛化性需验证。
AI上下文调整的准确性和鲁棒性可能受限于训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI原生资产智能框架，将异构安全数据转化为结构化智能层，实现一致、上下文感知的资产级推理。

papers.title: Contextual Plackett-Luce: An Efficient Neural Model for Probabilistic Sequence Selection under Ambiguity
papers.abstract: Selecting a coherent sequence or subset of elements is a fundamental problem in structured prediction, arising in tasks such as detection, trajectory forecasting, and representative subset selection. In many such settings, the target is inherently ambiguous: each input admits multiple valid outputs, while supervision provides only a single sampled instance. This induces a mismatch between the underlying multi-modal target distribution and the observed training signal. We propose Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL), a structured probabilistic model for sequence selection that extends the classical Plackett-Luce model to a context-dependent setting following an Ising-style parameterization with unary and pairwise interaction terms. CPL can be viewed as a hybrid between fully autoregressive prediction and parallel sequence selection: autoregressive models effectively capture uncertainty but are computationally expensive on modern parallel hardware such as GPUs, while parallel methods are efficient but struggle to represent multi-modal dependencies. CPL combines the strengths of both by constructing the parameters of a probabilistic selection model in a fully parallel manner, followed by a lightweight autoregressive selection process in which each step applies incremental updates to contextual logits. This decoupling of parallel scoring and sequential selection enables efficient computation without sacrificing expressivity. We evaluate CPL on two structured selection tasks: multi-modal path prediction and representative subset selection. CPL achieves improved structural consistency and robustness under ambiguous supervision compared to strong parallel baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出Contextual Plackett-Luce模型，结合并行评分与轻量自回归选择，高效处理序列选择中的多模态歧义。
analysis.research_motivation: 结构化预测中目标存在固有歧义，每个输入对应多个有效输出，但监督信号仅提供单个样本，导致多模态目标分布与训练信号不匹配。现有方法中，自回归模型能捕捉不确定性但计算昂贵，并行方法高效却难以表示多模态依赖。
analysis.problem: 在序列选择任务中，如何在保持计算效率的同时，有效建模多模态目标分布并处理歧义监督。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，采用Ising风格参数化（含一元和成对交互项），通过并行方式构建概率选择模型的参数，再通过轻量自回归选择过程逐步更新上下文logits，实现并行评分与顺序选择的解耦。
contributions: 提出CPL模型，融合并行计算效率与自回归表达力，高效处理序列选择中的多模态歧义。
在多模态路径预测和代表性子集选择两个任务上验证，CPL相比强并行基线在结构一致性和鲁棒性上取得提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多模态路径预测和代表性子集选择两个结构化选择任务上评估，CPL相比强并行基线在结构一致性和鲁棒性上表现更优。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于序列选择类任务，泛化性待验证。
轻量自回归过程仍可能引入顺序依赖，极端长序列下效率可能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Contextual Plackett-Luce模型，结合并行评分与轻量自回归选择，高效处理序列选择中的多模态歧义。

papers.title: When (and How) to Trust the Expert: Diagnosing Query-Time Expert-Guided Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Many continuous-control problems ship with a competent but suboptimal controller (a tuned PID, a hand-designed gait). A growing family of methods uses such controllers as queryable experts during RL, but each method has been proposed in isolation, on a different benchmark, without imperfect-expert testing. We harmonize the comparison on a shared SAC backbone, common HPO and evaluation protocols, 100/50 seeds per (env, method), and a degradation sweep over expert undertuning, action bias, and observation noise. The comparison surfaces three failure modes single-paper evaluations miss: (F1) a critic blind spot under argmax-plus-bootstrap that drags IBRL below no-expert SAC on experts close to the no-expert-RL ceiling (RL-near-ceiling, distinct from the absolute physical ceiling); (F2) residual saturation on far-from-optimal experts; and (F3) warm-start buffer poisoning that collapses training-time-handoff methods under deployment-time expert undertuning. No single method dominates: each wins on one task-structure regime and fails predictably elsewhere; on RL-near-ceiling experts (FourTank, GlassFurnace) no query-time method clears the expert within our 1M-step budget, leaving open whether this is a fundamental wall or a budget effect. We convert the spread into a testable decision rule keyed on three pre-training observables (expert quality, task termination, perturbation type). The benchmark, taxonomy, and decision rule are the primary contribution; we additionally describe EDGE, a softmax-over-ensemble-LCB design point used to demonstrate that both axes the taxonomy points to (gate form, scoring rule) are individually exploitable.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较专家引导强化学习方法，揭示三种失败模式，并提出可测试的决策规则。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多连续控制问题已有次优控制器，但现有专家引导RL方法孤立提出、缺乏统一比较和鲁棒性测试，导致实际部署时失败模式未被发现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对查询时专家引导RL方法的系统比较和鲁棒性分析，以及如何根据专家质量选择合适方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了三种失败模式：F1) 在接近无专家RL上限的专家上，argmax加bootstrap导致评论家盲点，使IBRL性能低于无专家SAC；F2) 在远离最优的专家上存在残差饱和；F3) 部署时专家欠调导致热身缓冲区污染，使训练时交接方法崩溃。此外，在RL-near-ceiling专家上，所有查询时方法在1M步预算内均未超越专家。
analysis.method: 在共享SAC骨干、通用HPO和评估协议下，对多种查询时专家引导RL方法进行统一比较，并基于三个预训练可观测变量（专家质量、任务终止、扰动类型）构建可测试的决策规则。同时提出EDGE（softmax-over-ensemble-LCB）作为设计点。
contributions: 建立了查询时专家引导RL方法的统一比较基准和分类法，涵盖多种专家退化情况。
识别并分析了三种单篇论文未发现的失败模式。
提出了基于预训练可观测变量的可测试决策规则，指导方法选择。
analysis.experiments: 在多个连续控制环境上，使用100/50种子数（环境/方法），对专家欠调、动作偏差和观测噪声进行退化扫描。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验预算为1M步，可能不足以判断RL-near-ceiling专家上的性能墙是否为根本性限制。
决策规则可能仅适用于所测试的环境和方法集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较专家引导强化学习方法，揭示三种失败模式，并提出可测试的决策规则。

papers.title: Token Economics for LLM Agents: A Dual-View Study from Computing and Economics
papers.abstract: As LLM agents evolve, tokens have emerged as the core economic primitives of Agentic AI. However, their exponential consumption introduces severe computational, collaborative, and security bottlenecks. Current surveys remain fragmented across system optimization, architecture design, and trust, lacking a unified framework to evaluate the fundamental trade-off between output quality and economic cost. To bridge this gap, this survey presents the first comprehensive survey of Token Economics. By unifying computer science and economics, we conceptualize tokens as production factors, exchange mediums, and units of account. We synthesize existing literature across a four-dimensional taxonomy: (1) Micro-level (Single Agent): Optimizing budget-constrained factor substitution via neoclassical firm theory. (2) Meso-level (Multi-Agent Systems): Minimizing collaboration friction using transaction cost and principal-agent theories. (3) Macro-level (Agent Ecosystems): Addressing congestion externalities and pricing via mechanism design. (4) Security: Internalizing adversarial threats as endogenous economic constraints. Finally, we outline frontier directions, including differentiable token budgets and dynamic markets, to lay the theoretical foundation for scalable next-generation agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 首次从计算机科学与经济学双重视角系统综述LLM Agent的Token经济学，提出四维分类框架。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent中Token消耗呈指数增长，带来计算、协作和安全瓶颈，现有综述分散在系统优化、架构设计和信任等不同领域，缺乏统一框架来评估输出质量与经济成本之间的基本权衡。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一的框架来理解和优化LLM Agent中Token的经济属性及其在单智能体、多智能体、生态系统和安全维度上的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Token已成为Agentic AI的核心经济原语，但其指数级消耗导致严重的计算、协作和安全瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出四维分类框架：微观（单智能体，基于新古典企业理论优化预算约束下的要素替代）、中观（多智能体系统，利用交易成本和委托代理理论最小化协作摩擦）、宏观（智能体生态系统，通过机制设计解决拥塞外部性和定价）、安全（将对抗威胁内化为内生经济约束）。
contributions: 首次从计算机科学与经济学双重视角系统综述Token经济学。
提出四维分类框架（微观、中观、宏观、安全），统一现有文献。
概述前沿方向，包括可微分Token预算和动态市场，为可扩展的下一代智能体系统奠定理论基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新的算法或实验验证。
四维框架的实用性需在具体系统中进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次从计算机科学与经济学双重视角系统综述LLM Agent的Token经济学，提出四维分类框架。

papers.title: Investigating Anisotropy in Visual Grounding under Controlled Counterfactual Perturbations
papers.abstract: Visual Grounding benchmarks assume that the object described by a referring expression is always present in the image, and grounding models are therefore rarely evaluated under semantically mismatched captions. In such cases, models frequently exhibit approximation behavior, producing a plausible bounding box that satisfies only part of the expression (\eg, preserving the original object while ignoring modified contextual cues). Because mismatched captions represent realistic edge cases, this behavior compromises reliability and raises concerns from an explainability perspective. Identifying its underlying causes is thus essential for improving model faithfulness and interpretability. Adopting a mechanistic interpretability viewpoint, this work examines whether embedding anisotropy contributes to counterfactual failures. A similarity-controlled counterfactual caption generation protocol is introduced to systematically perturb object or contextual components within predefined embedding similarity intervals, enabling a fine-grained analysis of grounding behavior as a function of alignment. Experiments on two Transformer-based models with markedly different embedding geometries (BERT-based TransVG and CLIP-based SwimVG) reveal no meaningful correlation between cosine similarity and approximation. These findings suggest that anisotropy alone does not account for counterfactual errors, and that robustness requires investigating finer-grained geometric properties of the embedding space.

analysis.tldr: 视觉定位模型在语义不匹配描述下常出现近似行为，但嵌入各向异性并非主要原因。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉定位模型在真实场景中常遇到语义不匹配的描述，但现有基准很少评估这种情况，导致模型可靠性存疑。理解其失败原因对提升模型忠实性和可解释性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究嵌入各向异性是否导致视觉定位模型在反事实扰动下产生近似行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在语义不匹配描述下常产生近似边界框，仅满足部分描述（如保留原物体而忽略修改的上下文线索），且嵌入各向异性与近似行为无显著相关性。
analysis.method: 提出一种相似度控制的反事实描述生成协议，在预定义嵌入相似度区间内系统扰动物体或上下文组件，分析定位行为与对齐度的关系。
contributions: 揭示了视觉定位模型在反事实描述下的近似行为模式
通过实验证明嵌入各向异性并非导致反事实错误的主要原因
analysis.experiments: 在两种不同嵌入几何的Transformer模型（BERT-based TransVG和CLIP-based SwimVG）上进行实验，发现余弦相似度与近似行为无有意义的相关性。
limitations: 仅研究了两种特定模型，泛化性有限
未深入探索其他可能的几何属性
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉定位模型在语义不匹配描述下常出现近似行为，但嵌入各向异性并非主要原因。

papers.title: Field-Localized Forgery Detection for Digital Identity Documents
papers.abstract: Digital identity verification systems used in remote onboarding rely on document images to authenticate users, making them vulnerable to localized manipulations of key identity fields such as facial photographs and textual information. Existing forgery detection methods, developed primarily for natural-image forensics, show limited transferability to structured identity documents. We propose FLiD, a lightweight field-localized framework that targets critical identity regions rather than processing full-document images. A fine-tuned object detector first localizes face and text fields; a frozen MobileNetV3-Small backbone then extracts compact field-level embeddings, which are classified by lightweight neural network with only 191K trainable parameters. FLiD achieves AUC scores of 0.880 (face), 0.954 (text), and 0.923 (both-field attacks), with corresponding EERs of 18.05%, 11.61%, and 15.16%, representing absolute reductions of 29-35 percentage points over a full-document baseline trained from scratch. FLiD also consistently outperforms general-purpose manipulation detectors (TruFor, MMFusion, UniVAD) across all attack scenarios while requiring 13x fewer parameters and 21x fewer FLOPs

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级字段定位伪造检测框架FLiD，针对身份证件关键字段实现高效高精度检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 远程身份验证系统依赖证件图像，但关键字段（如人脸、文本）易被局部篡改，现有自然图像伪造检测方法在结构化证件上迁移性差。
analysis.problem: 如何针对数字身份证件中的局部字段伪造进行高效、准确的检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FLiD框架：先使用微调目标检测器定位人脸和文本字段，再用冻结的MobileNetV3-Small提取紧凑字段级嵌入，最后用仅191K可训练参数的轻量神经网络分类。
contributions: 提出字段局部化伪造检测框架FLiD，仅处理关键身份区域而非全图。
在多个攻击场景下显著优于全图基线（AUC提升29-35个百分点）和通用检测器（TruFor等），且参数量减少13倍、FLOPs减少21倍。
analysis.experiments: 在数字身份证件数据集上评估，FLiD在人脸、文本及双字段攻击场景下AUC分别为0.880、0.954、0.923，EER分别为18.05%、11.61%、15.16%。
limitations: 依赖目标检测器的定位精度，可能影响后续分类。
仅针对身份证件，泛化到其他文档类型需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级字段定位伪造检测框架FLiD，针对身份证件关键字段实现高效高精度检测。

papers.title: Constant-Target Energy Matching: A Unified Framework for Continuous and Discrete Density Estimation
papers.abstract: Density estimation is a central primitive in probabilistic modeling, yet continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable domains are often treated by separate objectives, limiting the ability to exploit a common statistical structure across data types. Continuous score-based methods rely on log-density gradients, while discrete extensions typically use concrete score whose unbounded targets become unstable near low-probability states. We introduce Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM), a unified energy-based framework for density estimation on general state spaces. CTEM replaces ordinary density-ratio regression with a bounded energy-difference transform and derives from it a sample-only training objective with the constant target 1. The learned scalar potential recovers log p without partition-function estimation or explicit unbounded ratio regression. Across continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable benchmarks, CTEM substantially improves density estimation over competitive baselines and yields higher-quality samples under standard sampling procedures.

analysis.tldr: CTEM 提出统一框架，通过有界能量差变换实现连续与离散密度估计，无需分区函数估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有密度估计方法对连续、离散和混合变量域采用不同目标，无法利用跨数据类型的共同统计结构，且离散方法中无界目标在低概率状态附近不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的密度估计框架，同时适用于连续、离散和混合变量域，避免无界目标的不稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离散扩展方法使用无界具体分数，在低概率状态附近不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出 Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM)，用有界能量差变换替代密度比回归，推导出以常数1为目标的样本训练目标，学习标量势函数直接恢复 log p。
contributions: 提出统一框架 CTEM，适用于连续、离散和混合变量密度估计。
引入有界能量差变换，避免无界目标的不稳定性，无需分区函数估计。
analysis.experiments: 在连续、离散和混合变量基准上，CTEM 显著优于竞争基线，并在标准采样程序下生成更高质量样本。
limitations: 可能对高维复杂分布的计算开销较大。
未在极大规模数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CTEM 提出统一框架，通过有界能量差变换实现连续与离散密度估计，无需分区函数估计。

papers.title: FactoryNet: A Large-Scale Dataset toward Industrial Time-Series Foundation Models
papers.abstract: We introduce the first universal pretraining corpus for industrial time-series data: FactoryNet. 51M datapoints across 23k end-to-end task executions (13.3k real, 9.8k synthetic) on six embodiments, unified by a shared schema that enables robust zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer and highly parameter-efficient anomaly detection. We introduce a novel schema: Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context (S-E-F-C) underlying the whole pipeline that maps any actuated system into a common representational frame. The corpus spans 27 annotated anomaly types alongside healthy baselines and counterfactual pairs across robotic manipulation and machining domains. Cross-embodiment transfer experiments yield positive results: under bias-aware metrics our model demonstrates fair cross-embodiment transfer capabilities on the evaluated source-target pair, while 24 schema-aligned signals achieves competitive anomaly detection performance compared to high-dimensional baselines. We release FactoryNet as a growing, multi-embodiment dataset to drive progress toward industrial foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向工业时序数据的通用预训练语料库FactoryNet，支持跨实体零样本迁移和高效异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业时序数据缺乏统一的大规模预训练语料，现有方法难以实现跨实体迁移和高效异常检测。
analysis.problem: 构建一个统一的工业时序数据预训练语料库，支持跨实体迁移和高效异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S-E-F-C（Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context）统一模式，将任意驱动系统映射到公共表示框架，构建包含51M数据点、23k任务执行记录的多实体数据集。
contributions: 首个工业时序数据通用预训练语料库FactoryNet，包含51M数据点和23k任务执行记录。
提出S-E-F-C统一模式，支持跨实体零样本迁移和参数高效异常检测。
analysis.experiments: 跨实体迁移实验显示模型在评估的源-目标对上具有公平的跨实体迁移能力；24个模式对齐信号在异常检测上达到与高维基线竞争的性能。
limitations: 数据集主要覆盖机器人操作和加工领域，其他工业场景可能未充分涵盖。
异常检测性能仅在有限信号上评估，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向工业时序数据的通用预训练语料库FactoryNet，支持跨实体零样本迁移和高效异常检测。

papers.title: CauSim: Scaling Causal Reasoning with Increasingly Complex Causal Simulators
papers.abstract: Despite surpassing human performance across mathematics, coding, and other knowledge-intensive tasks, large language models (LLMs) continue to struggle with causal reasoning. A core obstacle is the target data itself: causal systems are complex and often expressed in non-executable forms, while ground-truth answers to causal queries are inherently scarce. We introduce CauSim, a framework that turns causal reasoning from a scarce-label problem into a scalable supervised one. CauSim constructs increasingly complex causal simulators: executable structural causal models (SCMs), incrementally built by LLMs, that scale to globally complex systems while maintaining verifiable answers to causal queries. CauSim operates across representations by formalizing non-executable causal knowledge into code, enabling data augmentation, and translating executable SCMs into natural language, enabling supervision in previously difficult-to-supervise representations. We structure our research into two parts: (1) how to construct increasingly complex causal simulators, and (2) a systematic study of what CauSim enables, demonstrating generalization across representations, consistent gains from curriculum scaling and data volume, LLM self-improvement through self-generated simulators, and data augmentation via formalization of existing domain knowledge.

analysis.tldr: CauSim通过构建可扩展的因果模拟器，将因果推理从稀缺标签问题转化为可监督学习问题。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在因果推理上表现不佳，主要因为因果系统复杂且难以执行，真实答案稀缺，缺乏可扩展的监督数据。
analysis.problem: 如何将因果推理转化为可扩展的监督学习问题，并生成可执行的因果模型以提供大量带标签数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CauSim框架通过LLM逐步构建可执行的结构因果模型（SCM），将非可执行因果知识形式化为代码，实现数据增强，并将SCM翻译为自然语言以提供监督信号。
contributions: 提出CauSim框架，将因果推理转化为可扩展的监督学习问题。
展示了课程缩放、数据量、自生成模拟器和数据增强带来的泛化能力提升。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM构建SCM的质量。
复杂系统的SCM构建可能仍存在瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CauSim通过构建可扩展的因果模拟器，将因果推理从稀缺标签问题转化为可监督学习问题。

papers.title: Robust Multi-Agent LLMs under Byzantine Faults
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly collaborate over peer-to-peer networks to improve their reliability. However, these same interactions can also become a source of vulnerability, as unreliable or Byzantine agents may sway neighboring agents toward incorrect conclusions and degrade overall system performance. Existing methods rely on leader-based coordination or self-reported confidence, both of which are susceptible to adversarial manipulation. We study decentralized LLM multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS) and propose Self-Anchored Consensus (SAC), a fully decentralized iterative filter-and-refine protocol in which agents iteratively exchange responses, locally evaluate and filter unreliable messages, and refine their own outputs. We present $(F{+}1)$-robustness conditions for the communication graph that ensure honest agents preserve and propagate reliable information despite Byzantine influence. Experiments on mathematical and commonsense reasoning benchmarks show that SAC effectively suppresses Byzantine influence and consistently improves performance across diverse communication topologies, whereas prior methods degrade under adversarial conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出自锚共识（SAC）协议，使去中心化多智能体LLM系统在拜占庭故障下保持鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体通过点对点网络协作提升可靠性，但不可靠或拜占庭智能体可能误导邻居并降低系统性能，现有方法依赖领导者或自报置信度，易受对抗操纵。
analysis.problem: 去中心化多智能体LLM系统中，如何抵御拜占庭故障，确保诚实智能体不受恶意影响并传播可靠信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Self-Anchored Consensus (SAC)，一种完全去中心化的迭代过滤-精炼协议，智能体迭代交换响应、本地评估并过滤不可靠消息、精炼自身输出，并给出通信图的(F+1)-鲁棒性条件。
contributions: 提出SAC协议，实现去中心化多智能体LLM系统对拜占庭故障的鲁棒性。
给出通信图的(F+1)-鲁棒性条件，确保诚实智能体在拜占庭影响下保持可靠信息传播。
analysis.experiments: 在数学和常识推理基准上实验，SAC有效抑制拜占庭影响并在多种通信拓扑下持续提升性能，而先前方法在对抗条件下性能下降。
limitations: 可能依赖通信图结构，对高度动态图适应性未知。
未讨论计算开销和通信轮次对效率的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自锚共识（SAC）协议，使去中心化多智能体LLM系统在拜占庭故障下保持鲁棒性。

papers.title: Probability-Flow Distillation: Exact Wasserstein Gradient Flow for High-Fidelity 3D Generation
papers.abstract: Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) and its variants have been widely used for text-to-3D generation by distilling 2D image diffusion priors. However, the standard SDS objective is prone to severe mode collapse, frequently yielding over-smoothed and over-saturated results. Although recent advancements, such as Score Distillation via Inversion (SDI), mitigate these artifacts and produce visually sharper models, they ultimately fail to faithfully capture the full target distribution. In this work, we show that the bottleneck limiting the sampling capacity of SDI stems from its reliance on the posterior mean estimator, which is mathematically equivalent to a single-step Euler approximation of the deterministic reverse DDIM trajectory. To address this, we propose a naturally motivated extension termed Probability-Flow Distillation (PFD). We establish that PFD corresponds exactly to a Wasserstein gradient flow, thereby inducing principled distribution-matching dynamics. Finally, we show that PFD can synthesize 3D assets with fine-grained, high-fidelity details and achieve improved quality compared to existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出概率流蒸馏（PFD），通过精确的Wasserstein梯度流实现高保真3D生成，克服了SDS的模式崩溃和SDI的分布不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法如SDS易产生过平滑和过饱和结果，而SDI虽能生成更锐利的模型但无法忠实捕获完整目标分布，需要一种能实现精确分布匹配的蒸馏方法。
analysis.problem: 解决Score Distillation Sampling（SDS）及其变体在文本到3D生成中存在的模式崩溃和分布不匹配问题，实现高保真3D资产生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SDS目标函数易导致模式崩溃，产生过平滑和过饱和结果；SDI虽缓解了这些伪影，但依赖于后验均值估计器，等价于确定性反向DDIM轨迹的单步欧拉近似，限制了采样能力，无法忠实捕获完整目标分布。
analysis.method: 提出概率流蒸馏（PFD），将其建立为精确的Wasserstein梯度流，从而引入有原则的分布匹配动力学。
contributions: 揭示了SDI的瓶颈在于其后验均值估计器等价于单步欧拉近似，限制了分布匹配能力。
提出了概率流蒸馏（PFD），理论上证明其对应于精确的Wasserstein梯度流，实现了有原则的分布匹配。
实验表明PFD能合成具有细粒度、高保真细节的3D资产，质量优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能计算成本较高，需要进一步优化效率。
可能对初始分布或超参数敏感，需要更多调参分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概率流蒸馏（PFD），通过精确的Wasserstein梯度流实现高保真3D生成，克服了SDS的模式崩溃和SDI的分布不匹配问题。

papers.title: Single-Configuration Attack Success Rate Is Not Enough: Jailbreak Evaluations Should Report Distributional Attack Success
papers.abstract: Many jailbreak attack research papers report attack success rates for a limited number of parameter settings, even though there are many combinations of parameter settings that could be used. Further, when new jailbreak papers are released, they often benchmark results against single configurations of existing attacks. This position paper argues such practices are fundamentally insufficient for characterising the threat posed by parameterised jailbreak attacks, and comparing attacks. Most jailbreak attacks expose multiple internal parameters, system prompt templates, conversation rounds, cipher dispersion, teaching shots, and ASR varies substantially across these parameters. Reporting only the best-case configuration discards two pieces of information that defenders genuinely need: how typical that performance is across the variant space, and how much of the attack surface is missed by selecting a single variant. We propose two new measures for jailbreak attacks: the Variant Sensitivity Measure (VSM) and Union Coverage (UC). VSM quantifies how far the best reported ASR deviates from the mean ASR across the tested variant space, UC is the total fraction of prompts resulting in unsafe responses across all tested configurations. We empirically demonstrate the importance of these measures using two attack families across three open-source target models. For PAIR, the best template reaches 69% ASR on Mistral-7B and 75% on Qwen3-0.6B, while UC rises to 88% and 93%, respectively. For bijection on Mistral-7B, the best variant reaches 81% ASR, but the 36-variant union covers 100% of HarmBench-100 prompts. We argue that distributional reporting, publishing VSM alongside ASR and enumerating variant coverage as fully as compute allows, should become the new minimum standard for parameterised jailbreak evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出变体敏感度（VSM）和联合覆盖率（UC）两个指标，主张在越狱攻击评估中报告分布性攻击成功率而非单一配置。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前越狱攻击研究通常只报告单一参数配置下的攻击成功率，忽略了参数变化对性能的影响，导致对威胁的刻画不充分，且不同攻击之间的比较不公平。
analysis.problem: 现有越狱攻击评估方法仅报告最佳配置下的攻击成功率，无法反映攻击在参数空间中的典型性能和覆盖范围，需要更全面的评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 越狱攻击存在多个内部参数（如系统提示模板、对话轮次、密码分散等），攻击成功率在不同配置下变化显著；仅报告最佳配置会丢失防御者真正需要的信息：性能的典型性和攻击面的覆盖程度。
analysis.method: 提出两个新指标：变体敏感度（VSM）衡量最佳ASR与平均ASR的偏差，联合覆盖率（UC）衡量所有测试配置下导致不安全响应的提示总比例。
contributions: 指出当前越狱攻击评估中仅报告单一配置ASR的不足，并提出分布性报告的必要性。
提出VSM和UC两个新指标，用于量化攻击性能的变体敏感性和覆盖范围。
通过实验验证了这些指标的有效性，并建议将其作为参数化越狱评估的新最低标准。
analysis.experiments: 使用两个攻击家族（PAIR和bijection）在三个开源目标模型（Mistral-7B、Qwen3-0.6B等）上进行实验，展示了VSM和UC的计算结果。
limitations: 实验仅覆盖有限数量的攻击家族和模型，泛化性有待验证。
VSM和UC的计算依赖于对变体空间的采样，采样策略可能影响结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出变体敏感度（VSM）和联合覆盖率（UC）两个指标，主张在越狱攻击评估中报告分布性攻击成功率而非单一配置。

papers.title: Reducing Annotation Burden for Femoral Cartilage Segmentation in Knee MRI via Cross-Sequence Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: Purpose: To develop and evaluate cross-sequence transfer learning for automatic femoral cartilage segmentation, testing bidirectional transfer between dual-echo steady-state (DESS) and sagittal proton density-weighted 3D fast spin-echo (Cube) sequences. Materials and Methods: We optimized a modified 2D U-Net on 507 DESS images from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI). We then established same-sequence baselines using subject-level cross-validation on a subset of 44 OAI DESS images and 44 Cube images acquired at the Istituto Ortopedico Rizzoli, Bologna, Italy. Each subset included 22 non-lesioned and 22 lesioned subjects. Finally, we performed transfer learning across sequences by fine-tuning the pretrained models on the target sequence with increasing training set sizes to study convergence, while keeping validation and test sets fixed. Segmentations were evaluated using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and average surface distance (ASD). Lesion effects were assessed with two-sided Mann-Whitney U tests with Bonferroni correction. Results: Same-sequence training yielded higher accuracy on DESS than Cube (DSC, $0.900$ vs $0.830$; $P < .001$). Cube-to-DESS transfer matched DESS performance (DSC, $0.903 \pm 0.032$ vs $0.900 \pm 0.027$), reaching a performance plateau at 9 training subjects. DESS-to-Cube yielded a lower combined DSC ($0.802 \pm 0.049$ vs $0.830 \pm 0.042$), reaching a plateau at 24 training subjects. Lesions did not affect DESS ($P \ge .39$) but reduced Cube accuracy (DSC, $0.805$ vs $0.856$; $P < .001$). Conclusion: Transfer learning across sequences can substantially reduce target-sequence annotation requirements for femoral cartilage segmentation, but performance is direction- and sequence-dependent, and the effects of lesions on segmentation may vary across MRI sequences.

analysis.tldr: 跨序列迁移学习可大幅减少膝关节MRI股骨软骨分割的标注需求，但效果依赖于迁移方向和序列类型。
analysis.research_motivation: 膝关节MRI中股骨软骨分割需要大量标注数据，不同MRI序列（如DESS和Cube）的标注成本高昂，且现有方法通常针对单一序列，缺乏跨序列泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用已有序列（DESS）的标注数据，通过迁移学习减少目标序列（Cube）的标注需求，同时保持分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：同序列训练中DESS精度高于Cube；Cube→DESS迁移可匹配DESS性能，而DESS→Cube迁移性能低于Cube基线；病变对DESS分割无显著影响，但降低Cube精度。
analysis.method: 使用改进的2D U-Net在507张DESS图像上预训练，然后在目标序列上微调，逐步增加训练集大小以研究收敛性。
contributions: 提出并评估了跨序列迁移学习用于股骨软骨分割，验证了双向迁移的可行性。
揭示了迁移效果的方向依赖性和序列依赖性，以及病变对不同序列分割的影响差异。
analysis.experiments: 在OAI DESS和Rizzoli Cube数据集上进行了同序列基线实验和跨序列迁移实验，使用DSC和ASD评估，并进行了病变影响的统计检验。
limitations: 仅测试了DESS和Cube两种序列，泛化到其他序列需进一步验证。
迁移学习效果受序列相似性影响，未探讨序列差异较大的情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨序列迁移学习可大幅减少膝关节MRI股骨软骨分割的标注需求，但效果依赖于迁移方向和序列类型。

papers.title: Dependency-Aware Discrete Diffusion for Scene Graph Generation
papers.abstract: Scene graphs (SGs) represent objects and their relationships as structured graphs, enabling applications in image generation, robotics, and 3D understanding. Recent work suggests that conditioning image generation on scene graphs improves compositional fidelity compared to text-only prompting. However, since users typically provide text rather than structured graphs, a key challenge is to generate scene graphs from natural language. Prior work on discrete diffusion has demonstrated success in generating generic graphs such as molecules and circuits, but fails to account for the hierarchical structure and strong dependencies between objects, edges, and relations in scene graphs. We address this limitation by introducing a dependency-aware, hierarchically constrained discrete diffusion model for scene graph generation. Our approach decouples structure and semantics across the forward and reverse processes, enabling the model to capture conditional dependencies. At inference time, we perform training-free conditioning to sample text-aligned scene graphs. We evaluate our method on standard SG benchmarks and demonstrate improvements over both continuous and discrete graph generation baselines across graph and layout metrics. When fed to downstream image generation, our approach yields improved compositional alignment compared to text-to-image models, particularly in multi-object scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种依赖感知的层次化离散扩散模型，用于从自然语言生成场景图，提升多目标图像生成的组合对齐性。
analysis.research_motivation: 场景图在图像生成、机器人等领域有重要应用，但用户通常提供文本而非结构化图，因此需要从自然语言生成场景图。现有离散扩散模型在生成通用图（如分子）上成功，但未能处理场景图中对象、边和关系之间的层次结构与强依赖关系。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然语言生成符合场景图层次结构和依赖关系的结构化图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，先前的离散扩散模型在生成通用图时忽略了场景图中对象、边和关系之间的层次结构与强依赖关系，导致生成质量不佳。
analysis.method: 提出依赖感知的层次化约束离散扩散模型，在正向和反向过程中解耦结构与语义，以捕获条件依赖；推理时通过无训练条件采样生成与文本对齐的场景图。
contributions: 提出一种依赖感知的层次化约束离散扩散模型，专门用于场景图生成。
在标准场景图基准上，该方法在图和布局指标上均优于连续和离散图生成基线。
在下游图像生成中，该方法在多目标场景下比文本到图像模型具有更好的组合对齐性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准场景图基准上评估，并与连续和离散图生成基线比较，同时在下游图像生成任务中验证组合对齐性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定场景图数据集，泛化性有待验证。
无训练条件采样可能在某些复杂文本描述下效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种依赖感知的层次化离散扩散模型，用于从自然语言生成场景图，提升多目标图像生成的组合对齐性。

papers.title: Octopus Protocol: One-Shot Hardware Discovery and Control for AI Agents via Infrastructure-as-Prompts
papers.abstract: Recent agentic-robotics systems, from Code-asPolicies to modern vision-language-action (VLA) foundation models, presuppose that drivers, SDKs, or ROS-style primitives for the target hardware already exist. Writing those primitives is the dominant engineering cost of bringing up new hardware for agent control. We present Octopus Protocol, a system that collapses that cost to a single shell command. Given only raw OS access and a language-model API key, a coding agent executes a five-stage pipeline--PROBE, IDENTIFY, INTERFACE, SERVE, DEPLOY--to discover connected devices, infer their capabilities, generate a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server with typed tools, and deploy it as a live HTTP endpoint. A persistent daemon then monitors the system, heals broken code, and perceives physical state through the camera tools it generated for itself. Two architectural principles make this work: protocols are prompts, not code, and the coding agent is the runtime. We validate the system on three heterogeneous platforms (PC/WSL, Apple Silicon macOS, Raspberry Pi 4) and on a commercial 6-DOF robotic arm with USB camera feedback. One command onboards the hardware in ~10-15 minutes and exposes up to 30 MCP tools; an MCP-compliant client then performs closed-loop visual-motor control through tools no human wrote.

analysis.tldr: 提出Octopus Protocol，通过单条命令自动发现硬件、生成控制接口并部署为MCP服务器，消除机器人系统的手动驱动开发成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人系统（如Code-as-Policies、VLA模型）假设目标硬件的驱动、SDK或ROS原语已存在，而编写这些原语是引入新硬件进行智能体控制的主要工程成本，亟需自动化方法降低门槛。
analysis.problem: 如何让AI智能体在仅有原始OS访问权限和语言模型API密钥的条件下，自动发现硬件设备、推断其能力、生成类型化工具接口并部署为实时服务，无需人工编写驱动代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出五阶段流水线（PROBE、IDENTIFY、INTERFACE、SERVE、DEPLOY），由编码智能体执行：探测连接设备、识别能力、生成MCP服务器（含类型化工具）、部署为HTTP端点，并包含持久守护进程监控和自修复。核心原则：协议即提示（protocols are prompts），编码智能体即运行时。
contributions: 提出Octopus Protocol，将硬件发现与控制接口生成成本压缩为单条命令。
在三个异构平台（PC/WSL、Apple Silicon macOS、Raspberry Pi 4）和商用6-DOF机械臂上验证，单命令约10-15分钟即可生成最多30个MCP工具。
analysis.experiments: 在PC/WSL、Apple Silicon macOS、Raspberry Pi 4三个平台以及带USB摄像头反馈的商用6-DOF机械臂上验证，单命令约10-15分钟完成硬件接入，生成最多30个MCP工具，MCP兼容客户端可通过未人工编写的工具执行闭环视觉-运动控制。
limitations: 依赖语言模型API的可用性和质量，可能受限于模型能力。
仅验证了有限硬件平台，对更复杂或非标准硬件的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Octopus Protocol，通过单条命令自动发现硬件、生成控制接口并部署为MCP服务器，消除机器人系统的手动驱动开发成本。

papers.title: LCGNav: Local Candidate-Aware Geometric Enhancement for General Topological Planning in Vision-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Online topological planning has become an effective paradigm for Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE), but existing methods still suffer from two limitations: redundant local depth information and weakened focus on current frontier candidates as the topological graph grows. To address this, we propose LCGNav, a modular local geometric enhancement framework for topological VLN. LCGNav explicitly converts candidate depth views into 3D point clouds and applies physical truncation based on the agent's reachable range, enabling more compact local geometric modeling. It further introduces a dimension-preserving local fusion strategy with transient state degradation, so that geometric enhancement is applied only to the currently relevant ghost nodes without changing the original planner interface. Experiments on R2R-CE and RxR-CE show that LCGNav serves as an effective cross-architecture enhancement module, consistently improving multiple key metrics of representative online topological baselines with low additional training cost. When integrated with ETP-R1, LCGNav achieves the best performance among the compared online topological methods on the val-unseen splits of the R2R-CE and RxR-CE benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/shannanshouyin/LCGNav.

analysis.tldr: LCGNav通过局部几何增强和候选点感知机制，提升了连续环境下视觉语言导航的拓扑规划性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线拓扑规划方法在VLN-CE中存在局部深度信息冗余和拓扑图增长导致当前候选点关注减弱的问题，限制了导航性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个模块化的局部几何增强框架，以紧凑建模局部几何并保持对当前候选点的关注，同时兼容现有拓扑规划器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法存在两个现象：1) 局部深度信息冗余；2) 随着拓扑图增长，对当前前沿候选点的关注减弱。
analysis.method: 提出LCGNav框架，将候选深度视图显式转换为3D点云，基于智能体可达范围进行物理截断，实现紧凑局部几何建模；并引入维度保持的局部融合策略与瞬态状态退化，仅对当前相关幽灵节点施加几何增强，不改变原始规划器接口。
contributions: 提出模块化局部几何增强框架LCGNav，可即插即用于多种在线拓扑基线。
通过3D点云转换和物理截断实现紧凑局部几何建模，减少冗余信息。
引入维度保持局部融合与瞬态状态退化，增强当前候选点关注且不干扰原始规划器。
在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准上验证了跨架构有效性，与ETP-R1集成达到最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准的val-unseen分割上进行了实验，LCGNav作为增强模块一致提升了多个关键指标，与ETP-R1集成达到在线拓扑方法中的最佳性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在连续环境VLN任务上验证，泛化到其他导航任务需进一步测试。
瞬态状态退化策略可能对长距离导航的稳定性有影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LCGNav通过局部几何增强和候选点感知机制，提升了连续环境下视觉语言导航的拓扑规划性能。

papers.title: Automated Robotic Moisture Monitoring in Agricultural Fields
papers.abstract: Monitoring moisture level of land in a large-scale plantation is tedious. The main objective of this project is to use a robotic kit in collaboration with the on-field moisture sensor circuits, thereby creating an efficient and economical moisture monitoring system. A large agriculture field is divided into smaller grids. Each grid is placed with a moisture sensor. Whenever a sensor reports the soil to be dry, the robot goes to the concerned field for inspection. The path to the concerned field is found by applying Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm on the aerial image of the field. Then the total moisture content of the field is calculated by the robot using suitable image processing algorithms and reported accordingly. For developing and testing this work, a small study field was set up above which a camera was mounted at an appropriate height to capture its aerial view. Thus a prototype for an automated system of monitoring agricultural fields' moisture has been developed through this work.

analysis.tldr: 利用机器人配合土壤湿度传感器和图像处理，实现农田湿度自动监测。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模农田湿度监测人工成本高、效率低，现有方法缺乏自动化和经济性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个高效、经济的自动化农田湿度监测系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将农田划分为网格，每个网格部署湿度传感器；当传感器报告干燥时，机器人通过Dijkstra算法规划最短路径前往，并使用图像处理算法计算总湿度。
contributions: 提出了一种结合传感器和机器人的自动化湿度监测方案
利用Dijkstra算法和图像处理实现路径规划与湿度计算
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在小规模实验场测试，未验证大规模场景
未讨论传感器故障或通信延迟等实际问题
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用机器人配合土壤湿度传感器和图像处理，实现农田湿度自动监测。

papers.title: Containment Verification: AI Safety Guarantees Independent of Alignment
papers.abstract: Agentic frameworks are the software layer through which AI agents act in the world. Existing safety methods intervene on the model and therefore remain conditional on unverifiable properties of learned behavior. We introduce containment verification, which locates safety guarantees in the agentic framework itself. Under havoc oracle semantics, the AI is modeled as an unconstrained oracle ranging over the entire typed action space, and the verified containment layer must enforce the boundary policy for every possible AI output. For boundary-enforceable properties, expressed over modeled boundary events, action arguments, and state, we prove a universal guarantee by forward-simulation refinement and mechanize it in Dafny. We instantiate the paradigm by verifying PocketFlow, a minimalist agentic LLM framework, and use an agentic synthesis pipeline to generate the specification, operational model, and refinement proof under an information barrier against tautological specifications. To our knowledge, this is the first deductive formal verification of an agentic framework, and its guarantee is invariant to model capability over the modeled typed action boundary.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在智能体框架层面而非模型层面提供安全保证的“包含验证”方法，并首次对LLM智能体框架进行演绎形式化验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI安全方法依赖于模型对齐，但模型行为无法被形式化验证，导致安全保证不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何在智能体框架层面提供独立于模型对齐的、可形式化验证的安全保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出包含验证范式，将AI建模为无约束预言机，在框架层通过前向仿真精化证明边界可执行属性，并使用Dafny机械验证。
contributions: 首次对智能体框架进行演绎形式化验证，保证独立于模型能力。
提出包含验证范式，将安全保证从模型层转移到框架层。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅验证了边界可执行属性，未覆盖所有安全属性。
依赖信息屏障防止同义反复规范，实际部署中可能难以完全实现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在智能体框架层面而非模型层面提供安全保证的“包含验证”方法，并首次对LLM智能体框架进行演绎形式化验证。

papers.title: Phase Transitions in Affective Meaning Divergence: The Hidden Drift Before the Break
papers.abstract: One partner says "Fine" meaning resolution; the other hears surrender. The word is shared; the affective uptake is not. We formalize this as affective meaning divergence (AMD), the total-variation distance between interlocutors' anchor-conditioned affect distributions. Building on speech-act theory, common-ground accumulation, and entropy-regularized game theory, we derive a logit best-response map whose dynamics undergo a saddle-node bifurcation: when $βα> 4$, a monotone increase in AMD-driven load produces an abrupt, hysteretic collapse of repair coordination. On Conversations Gone Awry (CGA-Wiki; $N=652$), derailing conversations exhibit critical-slowing-down (CSD) signatures across multiple levels: lexical divergence variance ($p<0.001$, $d=0.36$), AMD variance ($p=0.001$, $d=0.26$), and dialog-act repair variance ($p=0.016$, $d=0.20$), all significant after correction and stronger than toxicity and sentiment baselines. AMD provides a distinct temporal signature, with retrospectively measured variance peaking at the bifurcation point while toxicity variance peaks earlier, and is the only indicator grounded in the theoretical framework. Boundary-condition analysis on CGA-CMV ($N=1{,}169$) yields mixed but directionally consistent evidence.

analysis.tldr: 对话中情感意义分歧（AMD）在关系破裂前会出现临界慢化现象，理论模型预测了相变点。
analysis.research_motivation: 日常对话中，同一词语可能被双方赋予不同情感含义，这种分歧若持续累积可能导致关系破裂。现有研究缺乏对分歧动态演化的形式化建模和早期预警信号。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化定义并量化对话中的情感意义分歧（AMD），并预测其何时会引发不可逆的沟通破裂。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，在即将破裂的对话中，AMD方差、词汇分歧方差和修复方差均出现临界慢化（CSD）特征，且AMD方差在分岔点达到峰值，而毒性方差峰值更早出现。
analysis.method: 基于言语行为理论、共同基础积累和熵正则化博弈论，推导出对数几率最佳响应映射，其动力学经历鞍结分岔；当βα>4时，AMD驱动的负荷单调增加会导致修复协调的突然、滞后崩溃。
contributions: 形式化定义了情感意义分歧（AMD）并给出其总变差距离度量
建立了基于分岔理论的对话破裂预测模型，并验证了临界慢化现象
analysis.experiments: 在Conversations Gone Awry数据集（CGA-Wiki, N=652）上，AMD方差、词汇分歧方差和对话行为修复方差均显著高于毒性/情感基线；在CGA-CMV（N=1,169）上边界条件分析结果方向一致但混合。
limitations: 边界条件分析结果混合，可能受数据集规模或标注噪声影响
理论模型假设可能不适用于所有对话类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对话中情感意义分歧（AMD）在关系破裂前会出现临界慢化现象，理论模型预测了相变点。

papers.title: UxSID: Semantic-Aware User Interests Modeling for Ultra-Long Sequence
papers.abstract: Modeling ultra-long user sequences involves a difficult trade-off between efficiency and effectiveness. While current paradigms rely on either item-specific search or item-agnostic compression, we propose UxSID, a framework exploring a third path: semantic-group shared interest memory. By utilizing Semantic IDs (SIDs) and a dual-level attention strategy, UxSID captures target-aware preferences without the heavy cost of item-specific models. This end-to-end architecture balances computational parsimony with semantic awareness, achieving state-of-the-art performance and a 0.337% revenue lift in large-scale advertising A/B test.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义感知用户兴趣建模框架UxSID，通过语义组共享兴趣记忆实现超长序列的高效建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 超长用户序列建模面临效率与效果的权衡，现有方法要么依赖逐项搜索（计算成本高），要么进行与项无关的压缩（丢失语义信息），缺乏兼顾两者的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲语义感知能力的前提下，高效建模超长用户序列中的目标感知偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UxSID框架，利用语义ID（SIDs）和双层注意力策略，通过语义组共享兴趣记忆捕获目标感知偏好，实现端到端架构。
contributions: 提出语义组共享兴趣记忆的新范式，平衡计算简洁性与语义感知能力。
在大规模广告A/B测试中实现0.337%的收入提升，验证了实际应用价值。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模广告A/B测试中取得0.337%收入提升，并达到当前最优性能。
limitations: 语义ID的生成质量可能影响模型效果。
双层注意力机制在极端长序列下的计算开销未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义感知用户兴趣建模框架UxSID，通过语义组共享兴趣记忆实现超长序列的高效建模。

papers.title: SeasonScapes: Learning Large-scale Re-lightable 3D Landscapes with Seasonal Variation from Sparse Webcams
papers.abstract: We introduce SeasonScapes framework and a the SeasonScapes dataset: Swiss Sparse-view Mountain Scenes with Seasonal Changes that covers over 50 km x 60 km, composed of more than 85,000 webcam images captured from 32 different locations across 13 timestamps throughout a full year. By projecting these timestamp-specific images onto a 3D mesh, we construct seasonal 3D landscapes that reflect natural appearance changes over time. To address occlusions and missing data, we leverage conditional diffusion models for image-guided inpainting directly on the mesh. The resulting completed meshes can be further relighted using standard physically-based renderer.

analysis.tldr: 从稀疏网络摄像头图像构建大规模、可重光照的季节性3D景观。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景重建方法难以处理大规模、长时间跨度的自然景观，且缺乏季节性变化和重光照能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏、多视角的网络摄像头图像中重建大规模、可重光照的3D景观，并捕捉其季节性外观变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SeasonScapes框架，将时间戳特定的图像投影到3D网格上，利用条件扩散模型进行图像引导的网格内补全，并使用基于物理的渲染器实现重光照。
contributions: 提出SeasonScapes框架，从稀疏网络摄像头图像重建大规模可重光照的3D景观。
构建SeasonScapes数据集，包含超过85,000张覆盖50km×60km区域的网络摄像头图像，具有季节性变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖网络摄像头图像的质量和覆盖密度。
可能无法处理极端天气或光照条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从稀疏网络摄像头图像构建大规模、可重光照的季节性3D景观。

papers.title: SearchSkill: Teaching LLMs to Use Search Tools with Evolving Skill Banks
papers.abstract: Teaching language models to use search tools is not only a question of whether they search, but also of whether they issue good queries. This is especially important in open-domain question answering, where broad or copied queries often waste retrieval budget and derail later reasoning. We propose \Ours, a framework that makes query planning explicit through reusable search skills. At each step, the model first selects a skill, then generates a search or answer action conditioned on the selected skill card. The skill inventory itself is not fixed: SearchSkill maintains an evolving SkillBank, expands or refines it from recurrent failure patterns, and reconstructs affected trajectories before supervised training. The resulting two-stage SFT recipe aligns training with the inference-time protocol of skill selection followed by skill-grounded execution. Across open-source and closed-source models, SearchSkill improves exact match on knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks and yields better retrieval behavior, including fewer copied first queries, more atomic hop-focused queries, and more correct answers within a small search budget. These results suggest that explicit skill-conditioned query planning is a lightweight alternative to treating search as an undifferentiated action.

analysis.tldr: SearchSkill通过可演化的技能库让LLM学会生成更好的搜索查询，提升开放域问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法只关注LLM是否使用搜索工具，但忽略了查询质量——宽泛或重复的查询浪费检索预算并影响后续推理。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在开放域问答中生成高质量、原子化的搜索查询，避免低效检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，宽泛或复制的查询会浪费检索预算并扰乱推理；通过技能条件化查询规划，可以生成更少复制、更聚焦的查询，在有限搜索预算内获得更多正确答案。
analysis.method: 提出SearchSkill框架，包含可演化的技能库（SkillBank）：模型先选择技能，再根据技能卡生成搜索或回答动作；技能库从失败模式中扩展或精炼，并重构受影响轨迹后进行两阶段SFT训练。
contributions: 提出显式技能条件化查询规划框架，将搜索视为可学习的技能而非无差别动作。
引入可演化的SkillBank，通过失败模式自动扩展和精炼技能，并重构轨迹进行训练。
在多个知识密集型QA基准上，开源和闭源模型均取得精确匹配提升，并改善检索行为。
analysis.experiments: 在知识密集型QA基准上评估，使用开源和闭源模型，报告了精确匹配、查询复制次数、原子跳数查询比例等指标，显示改进。
limitations: 可能依赖初始技能库的质量。
技能演化机制在复杂多跳场景下的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SearchSkill通过可演化的技能库让LLM学会生成更好的搜索查询，提升开放域问答性能。

papers.title: ShadowMerge: A Novel Poisoning Attack on Graph-Based Agent Memory via Relation-Channel Conflicts
papers.abstract: Graph-based agent memory is increasingly used in LLM agents to support structured long-term recall and multi-hop reasoning, but it also creates a new poisoning surface: an attacker can inject a crafted relation into graph memory so that it is later retrieved and influences agent behavior. Existing agent-memory poisoning attacks mainly target flat textual records and are ineffective in graph-based memory because malicious relations often fail to be extracted, merged into the target anchor neighborhood, or retrieved for the victim query. We present SHADOWMERGE, a poisoning attack against graph-based agent memory that exploits relation-channel conflicts. Its key insight is that a poisoned relation can share the same query-activated anchor and canonicalized relation channel as benign evidence while carrying a conflicting value. To realize this, we design AIR, a pipeline that converts the conflict into an ordinary interaction that can be extracted, merged, and retrieved by the graph-memory system. We evaluate SHADOWMERGE on Mem0 and three public real-world datasets: PubMedQA, WebShop, and ToolEmu. SHADOWMERGE achieves 93.8% average attack success rate, improving the best baseline by 50.3 absolute points, while having negligible impact on unrelated benign tasks. Mechanism studies show that SHADOWMERGE overcomes the three key limitations of existing agent-memory poisoning attacks, and defense analysis shows that representative input-side defenses are insufficient to mitigate it. We have responsibly disclosed our findings to affected graph-memory vendors and open sourced SHADOWMERGE.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对图结构智能体记忆的投毒攻击方法，利用关系通道冲突实现高成功率攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 图结构智能体记忆在LLM智能体中广泛应用，但现有投毒攻击主要针对平面文本记录，对图结构记忆无效，存在安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种针对图结构智能体记忆的投毒攻击，使恶意关系能被提取、合并和检索，从而影响智能体行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有攻击在基于图的记忆中失败，因为恶意关系无法被提取、合并到目标锚点邻域或针对受害者查询被检索。
analysis.method: 提出SHADOWMERGE，利用关系通道冲突：使投毒关系与良性证据共享相同的查询激活锚点和规范化关系通道，但携带冲突值；设计AIR管道将冲突转化为可被图记忆系统提取、合并和检索的普通交互。
contributions: 首次提出针对图结构智能体记忆的投毒攻击方法SHADOWMERGE
设计AIR管道实现关系通道冲突的利用
在多个数据集上实现高攻击成功率，且对良性任务影响小
analysis.experiments: 在Mem0和三个真实数据集（PubMedQA、WebShop、ToolEmu）上评估，平均攻击成功率93.8%，比最佳基线提高50.3个百分点，对无关良性任务影响可忽略。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定图记忆系统（如Mem0）
防御分析显示输入侧防御不足，但未探索更复杂的防御机制
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对图结构智能体记忆的投毒攻击方法，利用关系通道冲突实现高成功率攻击。

papers.title: A Quantum Inspired Variational Kernel and Explainable AI Framework for Cross Region Solar and Wind Energy Forecasting
papers.abstract: Reliable short horizon forecasting of solar and wind generation is a structural prerequisite of any modern power system yet most published forecasters are tuned and evaluated on a single climatic regime and most algorithmic novelty has been concentrated either on classical recurrent networks or on monolithic foundation models that combine forecasting and explanation We develop a four stage hybrid framework that separates these concerns The first stage acquires hourly generation irradiance and surface weather records through public application programming interfaces The second stage trains three classical baselines autoregressive integrated moving average gradient boosted regression trees and a two layer long short term memory network and produces a strong point forecast together with a residual error series The third stage corrects the residual through a quantum inspired variational kernel built on a six qubit hardware efficient ansatz with three repeated entangling layers The fourth stage uses generative artificial intelligence strictly as an explainability layer that reads the measured benchmark numbers and produces a structured natural language interpretation Across three regions drawn from open public archives Iberian solar North Sea wind and a mixed Texas trace the proposed configuration stays within one percentage point of the strongest classical baseline on the in domain forecasting task and the quantum inspired kernel separates calm and stormy weather regimes with a Fisher discriminant ratio approximately fifteen fold higher than a tuned radial basis kernel

analysis.tldr: 提出量子启发变分核与可解释AI框架，跨区域太阳能和风能预测，核在区分天气模式上优于经典核。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有太阳能和风能预测模型多针对单一气候区域，且算法创新集中在经典循环网络或结合预测与解释的单一基础模型，缺乏分离关注点的混合框架。
analysis.problem: 跨区域太阳能和风能短期预测中，如何提高残差校正精度并增强模型可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量子启发变分核在区分平静与风暴天气模式时，Fisher判别比约为调优径向基核的15倍。
analysis.method: 四阶段混合框架：1) 数据获取；2) 经典基线预测（ARIMA、GBRT、LSTM）产生点预测和残差；3) 量子启发变分核（6量子比特硬件高效ansatz，3层纠缠）校正残差；4) 生成式AI作为可解释层输出结构化自然语言解释。
contributions: 提出分离预测与解释的混合框架，结合经典模型、量子启发核和生成式AI可解释性。
在三个跨区域数据集上验证，量子启发核在区分天气模式上显著优于经典核。
analysis.experiments: 在伊比利亚太阳能、北海风能、德克萨斯混合三个公开数据集上评估，域内预测任务中与最强经典基线差距在1个百分点内。
limitations: 摘要未提及量子启发核的计算开销或可扩展性。
可解释层仅基于基准数字生成文本，可能缺乏对模型内部机制的深入解释。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量子启发变分核与可解释AI框架，跨区域太阳能和风能预测，核在区分天气模式上优于经典核。

papers.title: When Style Similarity Scores Fail: Diagnosing Raw CSD Cosine in Artist-Style Evaluation
papers.abstract: Raw cosine in the 768-dimensional output space of the Contrastive Style Descriptor (CSD) is now widely read as an absolute, calibrated style-fidelity score for text-to-image and style-imitation evaluation. We introduce the discrimination gap, a corpus-internal, prototype-free and threshold-free diagnostic that tests whether contrastive style cosines admit an absolute same-versus-different interpretation on a candidate artist corpus. On a 1799-artwork, 91-artist public-domain corpus, raw CSD cosine yields negative point-estimate gaps for $23/91$ artists at the pairwise level ($2/91$ robust under bootstrap) and for $15/91$ in the aggregated-pool scoring regime style-fidelity evaluations typically use. CSLS readout on the frozen backbone reduces the aggregated negative-gap count to $4/91$; combined with positional-embedding interpolation to $336$ pixels it raises unsupervised pair-verification AUC from $0.883$ to $0.905$ across $25$ artist-disjoint splits. We refer to this diagnostic-driven readout protocol on the frozen backbone (CSLS as default, pos-interp $336$ as the stronger optional setting) as CSD+, not a new encoder.A cross-backbone check on CLIP-ViT-L/14, SigLIP-large and DINOv2-Large reproduces the same shared-tradition failure pattern, providing evidence that the residual reflects a shared limitation of the four backbones we tested rather than a CSD-specific artefact. Practical implication: before reporting CSD cosine as an absolute style-fidelity score, run the diagnostic on the candidate corpus; CSLS is the minimal correction when it fails.

analysis.tldr: CSD余弦相似度在艺术家风格评估中不可靠，提出诊断方法CSD+并验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前广泛使用CSD余弦作为绝对风格保真度评分，但缺乏对其可靠性的系统诊断，可能导致评估偏差。
analysis.problem: CSD余弦在艺术家风格评估中是否具有绝对的同-异解释能力，以及如何检测和修正其失败情况。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在91位艺术家的1799件作品上，原始CSD余弦在23/91的艺术家对中产生负点估计差距，表明其无法可靠区分相同与不同风格。
analysis.method: 提出诊断指标“判别差距”，并基于CSLS和位置嵌入插值构建改进协议CSD+。
contributions: 引入判别差距作为无原型、无阈值的诊断工具，用于检测对比风格余弦的绝对解释能力。
提出CSD+协议，通过CSLS和位置嵌入插值显著提升风格评估的可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在1799件作品、91位艺术家的公开数据集上验证，CSD+将无监督配对验证AUC从0.883提升至0.905，并在多个骨干网络上复现失败模式。
limitations: CSD+仅在冻结骨干网络上有效，未探索微调或新编码器。
诊断依赖候选语料库，可能不适用于单一样本评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CSD余弦相似度在艺术家风格评估中不可靠，提出诊断方法CSD+并验证其有效性。

papers.title: MedFL-Stress: A Systematic Robustness Evaluation of Federated Brain Tumor Segmentation under Cross-Hospital MRI Appearance Shift
papers.abstract: Federated learning enables hospitals to collaboratively train segmentation models without sharing patient data. However, current evaluation protocols report only average performance across clients, masking failures at individual sites. In clinical deployment, a model that fails consistently at one hospital is a real safety risk that a good mean score can hide entirely. We introduce MedFL-Stress, a controlled stress-testing framework that exposes exactly this failure mode. Using 2D axial slices from BraTS 2020 distributed across four simulated hospital clients, we apply graded MRI appearance shifts (gamma contrast, scale-shift, and noise-plus-blur) reflecting scanner and acquisition variability in real multi-site deployments. Three federated baselines are evaluated: FedAvg, FedProx, and FedBN. Worst-hospital Dice and inter-hospital disparity are treated as primary metrics, not supplementary observations. FedAvg achieves the highest global mean Dice (0.8159) but conceals a 0.0850 gap between its best and worst-performing hospital. FedBN closes that gap by 41% (0.0850 to 0.0503) while sacrificing less than half a Dice point in mean accuracy (0.8159 to 0.8109), and the weakest hospital gains 3.5 Dice points outright (0.7309 to 0.7656). These findings demonstrate that robustness-oriented evaluation protocols are essential for reliable federated medical imaging deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，揭示联邦学习脑肿瘤分割模型在跨医院MRI外观偏移下的单点失败风险，并证明FedBN在牺牲极少平均精度下显著缩小医院间性能差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联邦学习评估仅报告客户端平均性能，掩盖了单个医院模型完全失效的安全风险，临床部署需要暴露这种失败模式的鲁棒性评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估联邦脑肿瘤分割模型在跨医院MRI外观偏移下的最差医院性能与医院间性能差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: FedAvg全局平均Dice最高（0.8159），但最佳与最差医院间差距达0.0850；FedBN将差距缩小41%（至0.0503），平均精度仅下降0.0050，最弱医院Dice提升3.5个点（0.7309→0.7656）。
analysis.method: 构建MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，使用BraTS 2020的2D轴向切片模拟四个医院客户端，施加分级MRI外观偏移（伽马对比度、尺度偏移、噪声加模糊），以最差医院Dice和医院间差异为主要指标评估FedAvg、FedProx、FedBN。
contributions: 提出MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，专门暴露联邦医学图像分割中单点医院失败模式。
通过系统实验证明FedBN在跨医院外观偏移下能有效缩小性能差距，同时保持高平均精度。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS 2020数据集上模拟四个医院客户端，使用三种MRI外观偏移（gamma contrast、scale-shift、noise-plus-blur），评估FedAvg、FedProx、FedBN。
limitations: 仅使用2D轴向切片，未验证3D分割场景。
仅模拟四种医院客户端，实际多中心场景可能更复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，揭示联邦学习脑肿瘤分割模型在跨医院MRI外观偏移下的单点失败风险，并证明FedBN在牺牲极少平均精度下显著缩小医院间性能差距。

papers.title: Relightable Gaussian Splatting for Virtual Production Using Image-Based Illumination
papers.abstract: Virtual production (VP) use LED walls to provide both background imagery and image-based lighting. While this enables on-set compositing, it couples lighting to background and scene appearance, limiting flexibility for downstream editing. In addition, inverse rendering conventionally relies on physically-based rendering to estimates 3D geometry and lighting, using environment maps. However, these maps are typically low-resolution and assume far-field lighting. In VP, with near-field and high-resolution image-based lighting, this can lead to inaccuracies and introduce complexities when editing. Addressing this, we propose a VP-specific framework for 3D reconstruction and relighting using Gaussian Splatting. This uses the known background imagery to condition the relighting process. This avoids relying on environment maps and reduces compositing to a background-image editing task. To realize our framework, we introduce a process (and associated dataset) that captures real VP scenes under varying background content and illumination conditions. This data is used to decompose a 3D scene into fixed appearance and variable lighting components. The variable lighting process simulates light transport by parameterizing each primitive with a UV coordinate, intensity value and resolution modifier. Using mipmaps, these directly sample the background texture in image space - implicitly capturing reflections and refractions without physically-based rendering. Combined with the fixed appearance component, this allows us to render relit scenes using a Gaussian Splatting rasterizer. Compared to baselines, our approach achieves higher-quality 3D reconstruction and controllable relighting. The method is efficient (<3 GB RAM, <5 GB VRAM, <2 hours training, ~35 FPS) and supports rendering useful arbitrary output variables including depth, lighting intensity, lighting color, and unlit renders.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向虚拟制作的基于高斯泼溅的可重光照框架，利用已知背景图像实现高效重光照，无需环境贴图。
analysis.research_motivation: 虚拟制作中LED墙提供背景和光照，但将光照与背景耦合，限制了后期编辑灵活性；传统逆渲染依赖低分辨率环境贴图，在近场高分辨率光照下不准确且编辑复杂。
analysis.problem: 如何在虚拟制作场景中实现高质量3D重建和可控重光照，避免环境贴图的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VP专用框架，使用高斯泼溅，将场景分解为固定外观和可变光照分量；可变光照通过为每个基元分配UV坐标、强度值和分辨率修饰符，利用mipmap直接采样背景纹理，隐式捕获反射和折射。
contributions: 提出面向虚拟制作的3D重建与重光照框架，无需环境贴图，将合成简化为背景图像编辑。
引入捕获真实VP场景的数据集，支持在不同背景内容和光照条件下分解场景。
实现高效渲染（<3GB RAM, <5GB VRAM, <2小时训练, ~35 FPS），支持深度、光照强度、颜色等任意输出变量。
analysis.experiments: 与基线相比，方法在3D重建质量和可控重光照上更优，并报告了资源效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定虚拟制作场景设置，泛化性需验证。
未讨论动态场景或复杂光照传输效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向虚拟制作的基于高斯泼溅的可重光照框架，利用已知背景图像实现高效重光照，无需环境贴图。

papers.title: The Direct Integration Theorem: A Rigorous Framework for Consistent Discrete Solutions of the Inverse Radon Problem
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel Direct Integration Theorem (DIT), derived as a non-trivial corollary of the classical Central Slice Theorem (CST). The DIT provides a mathematically consistent transition from the continuous to the discrete domain - a fundamental challenge in computed tomography - thereby eliminating the need for frequency-domain interpolation without resorting to conventional ramp-filtering. The proposed approach circumvents two principal limitations inherent in traditional methods: (i) the zero-frequency singularity and spectral distortions introduced by the mandatory ramp-filtering step, and (ii) discretization inaccuracies associated with frequency-domain interpolation. Based on the DIT, we develop a rigorous framework for consistent discrete solutions of the inverse Radon problem. Mathematical modeling demonstrates that this approach achieves quasi-exact reconstruction, with errors constrained solely by sampling parameters and grid geometry. Furthermore, while Filtered Back Projection (FBP) inherently distorts the variance of the reconstructed image, the DIT-based algorithm preserves it. Comparative simulations confirm that the proposed method eliminates common artifacts, such as intensity cupping, and consistently outperforms FBP in terms of PSNR, SSIM, and reprojection fidelity, faithfully restoring the original image's statistical characteristics.

analysis.tldr: 提出直接积分定理（DIT），从连续到离散域一致地求解逆拉东问题，无需斜坡滤波和频域插值，实现准精确重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机断层扫描（CT）重建中，传统滤波反投影（FBP）方法存在零频奇异性和频域插值误差，导致重建质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用斜坡滤波和频域插值的情况下，从连续到离散域一致地求解逆拉东问题，实现高精度重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统FBP方法会引入零频奇异性和频谱失真，且频域插值导致离散化误差；此外FBP会扭曲重建图像的方差。
analysis.method: 基于中心切片定理推导直接积分定理（DIT），建立从连续到离散域的一致框架，通过直接积分避免频域操作。
contributions: 提出直接积分定理（DIT），为逆拉东问题提供一致的离散解框架。
消除斜坡滤波和频域插值，避免相关误差和伪影。
理论证明DIT方法实现准精确重建，误差仅受采样参数和网格几何限制。
DIT方法保持重建图像的统计特性（方差不变），优于FBP。
analysis.experiments: 通过对比仿真实验，DIT方法在PSNR、SSIM和重投影保真度上优于FBP，并消除了强度杯状伪影。
limitations: 摘要未讨论计算效率或实时性。
方法可能对采样参数和网格几何敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出直接积分定理（DIT），从连续到离散域一致地求解逆拉东问题，无需斜坡滤波和频域插值，实现准精确重建。

papers.title: Evolutionary Ensemble of Agents
papers.abstract: We introduce Evolutionary Ensemble (EvE), a decentralized framework that organizes existing, highly capable coding agents into a live, co-evolving system for algorithmic discovery. Rather than reinventing the wheel within the "LLMs as optimizers" paradigm, EvE fixes the base agent substrate and focuses entirely on evolving the cumulative guidance and skills that dictate agent behaviors. By maintaining two co-evolving populations, namely functional code solvers and agent guidance states, the system evaluates agents through a synchronous race, updating their empirical Elo ratings based on the marginal gains they contribute to the current solver state. When applied to a research bottleneck in In-Context Operator Networks (ICON), EvE autonomously discovered a robust rescale-then-interpolate mechanism that enables reliable example-count generalization. Crucially, controlled ablations reveal the absolute necessity of stage-dependent agent adaptation to navigate the shifting search landscapes of complex codebases. Compared to variants driven by a fixed initial agent or even a frozen "best-evolved" agent, EvE uniquely avoids phase mismatch, demonstrating that organizing agents into a self-revising ensemble is the fundamental driver for breaking through static performance ceilings.

analysis.tldr: EvE 通过进化式智能体集成，在代码优化中自主发现新机制并突破性能瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在“LLM作为优化器”范式下重复造轮子，缺乏对智能体行为引导和技能的持续进化，导致静态性能天花板。
analysis.problem: 如何通过进化式集成框架，让现有编码智能体在算法发现中自主适应并突破性能上限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，固定初始智能体或冻结的最佳进化智能体均存在阶段失配问题，而自修正集成是突破静态性能天花板的关键。
analysis.method: EvE 维护两个共进化种群（功能代码求解器和智能体引导状态），通过同步竞赛评估智能体，基于边际贡献更新 Elo 评分，并实现阶段依赖的智能体适应。
contributions: 提出 EvE 去中心化框架，将现有编码智能体组织成共进化系统，专注于进化累积引导和技能。
在 ICON 瓶颈中自主发现鲁棒的 rescale-then-interpolate 机制，实现可靠的示例计数泛化。
通过消融实验证明阶段依赖的智能体适应和自修正集成的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始智能体池。
进化过程计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvE 通过进化式智能体集成，在代码优化中自主发现新机制并突破性能瓶颈。

papers.title: CATO: Charted Attention for Neural PDE Operators
papers.abstract: Neural operators have emerged as powerful data-driven solvers for PDEs, offering substantial acceleration over classical numerical methods. However, existing transformer-based operators still face critical challenges when modeling PDEs on complex geometries: directly processing over massive mesh points is computationally expensive, while operating in raw discretization coordinates may obscure the intrinsic geometry where physical interactions are more naturally expressed. To address these limitations, we introduce the Charted Axial Transformer Operator (CATO), a geometry-adaptive and derivative-aware neural operator for PDEs on general geometries. Instead of applying attention directly in the physical coordinate system, CATO learns a continuous latent chart that maps mesh coordinates into a learned chart space, where chart-conditioned axial attention efficiently captures long-range dependencies with reduced computational cost. In addition, CATO introduces a derivative-aware physics loss for steady-state PDEs that jointly supervises solution values, mesh-consistent gradients, and an auxiliary flux-like field, improving physical fidelity and reducing oversmoothing. We further provide a theoretical approximation result showing that, under a favorable chart, charted axial attention can represent low-rank axial solution operators with controlled error, and that small chart perturbations induce bounded approximation degradation. CATO achieves the best performance across all evaluated datasets, yielding an average improvement of approximately 26.76\% over the strongest competing baselines while reducing the number of parameters by 81.98\%. These results highlight the effectiveness of learning geometry-adaptive charts and derivative-aware physical supervision for accurate and efficient PDE operator learning.

analysis.tldr: CATO 通过几何自适应图表和导数感知物理损失，高效求解复杂几何上的 PDE。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 Transformer 的神经算子在处理复杂几何上的 PDE 时，直接处理海量网格点计算成本高，且在原始离散坐标中操作可能掩盖物理交互的固有几何结构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种几何自适应且导数感知的神经算子，以高效且准确地求解一般几何上的 PDE。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Charted Axial Transformer Operator (CATO)，包含：1) 学习连续潜在图表将网格坐标映射到图表空间，并在该空间进行图表条件轴向注意力以高效捕获长程依赖；2) 引入导数感知物理损失，联合监督解值、网格一致梯度和辅助通量场，提高物理保真度并减少过平滑。
contributions: 提出 CATO，一种几何自适应且导数感知的神经算子，用于一般几何上的 PDE。
引入图表条件轴向注意力和导数感知物理损失，显著提升性能并降低参数量。
提供理论近似结果，证明在有利图表下图表轴向注意力可表示低秩轴向解算子，且小图表扰动导致有界近似退化。
analysis.experiments: 在所有评估数据集上，CATO 取得最佳性能，平均比最强基线提升约 26.76%，同时参数量减少 81.98%。
limitations: 可能对图表学习质量敏感，复杂几何下图表可能难以优化。
导数感知损失主要针对稳态 PDE，对瞬态问题可能需要扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CATO 通过几何自适应图表和导数感知物理损失，高效求解复杂几何上的 PDE。

papers.title: Re$^2$Math: Benchmarking Theorem Retrieval in Research-Level Mathematics
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly capable at closed-world mathematical reasoning, but research assistance also requires source-grounded use of the literature. When a proof reaches a non-trivial step, a useful assistant should determine whether the needed tool (e.g., a lemma) already exists, identify a suitable scholarly source, and verify that its assumptions align with the current proof context. To rigorously evaluate such capabilities, we introduce Re$^2$Math, a benchmark for tool-grounded retrieval from partial mathematical proofs. Each instance is built from a candidate instrumental citation in the proof of a main theorem, with hierarchical context and an optional leakage-controlled anchor hint. We also make the task source-grounded yet citation-agnostic in that any admissible theorem sufficient for the proof transition is accepted. Evaluation uses a release-frozen retrieval artifact, ensuring reproducibility, while the benchmark itself supports automatic, continual expansion with newly constructed instances. On the current benchmark test set, the best fixed-judge ToolAcc reaches 7.0%, despite substantially higher rates of source grounding, indicating that current systems often retrieve valid statements but fail to establish their applicability to the local proof step. By decoupling citation recall, grounding, and proof-gap sufficiency, Re$^2$Math transforms literature-grounded mathematical tool use into a controlled diagnostic task.

analysis.tldr: 提出Re$^2$Math基准，用于评估从部分数学证明中检索适用定理的能力，发现当前系统检索有效但难以验证局部适用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在封闭世界数学推理中表现提升，但研究辅助需要基于文献的源引用，现有基准缺乏对工具检索与证明上下文对齐的严格评估。
analysis.problem: 如何评估模型从部分数学证明中检索适用定理（如引理）并验证其与当前证明上下文一致性的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前系统在源引用召回和基础事实匹配上表现较好，但在判断检索到的定理是否适用于局部证明步骤时准确率极低（ToolAcc仅7.0%）。
analysis.method: 构建Re$^2$Math基准，每个实例来自主定理证明中的候选工具引用，提供层次化上下文和可选的泄露控制锚点提示，采用引用无关评估（接受任何充分定理），并使用冻结检索制品保证可复现性。
contributions: 提出Re$^2$Math基准，将文献基础的数学工具使用转化为可控的诊断任务。
通过解耦引用召回、基础事实匹配和证明间隙充分性，揭示当前系统在局部适用性验证上的瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在基准测试集上，最佳固定评判器的ToolAcc达到7.0%，尽管基础事实匹配率更高。
limitations: 基准规模可能有限，依赖自动扩展机制。
仅评估定理检索，未覆盖更广泛的数学推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Re$^2$Math基准，用于评估从部分数学证明中检索适用定理的能力，发现当前系统检索有效但难以验证局部适用性。

papers.title: A Geometric Perspective on Next-Token Prediction in Large Language Models: Three Emerging Phases
papers.abstract: We investigate the geometry of predictive information across the layers of large language models (LLMs). We repurpose representation lenses-learned affine maps trained to predict the next token from intermediate residual streams-as geometric diagnostic tools. Rather than asking what the model predicts at each layer, we ask where predictive information resides and how it evolves across depth. We define at each layer a predictive readout subspace as the dominant k-dimensional singular subspace of such a map on the d-dimensional residual stream (where k is a resolution parameter), and track its trajectory on the Grassmann manifold as a similarity profile across layers. The profile is well described by unimodal distributions exhibiting a rise, near-plateau, and descent; varying k from 1% to 50% of d traces a Pareto frontier between visibility and energy retention, yet the same structure emerges at all scales. Across eight models from two families (Qwen2.5 and OLMo2, 1B-32B), we identify three geometric phases. Updates are approximately orthogonal to the residual stream throughout; what distinguishes the phases is their effect on the effective rank, which expands, stabilizes, and concentrates. In the first, Seeding Multiplexing, feed-forward memories and attention layers seed a candidate set in superposition in family-specific proportions, with the final token rising as leading candidate from 20% to 35% of positions across this phase. In the second, Hoisting Overriding, updates override existing subspaces to concentrate the candidate distribution without expanding the rank. In the third, Focal Convergence, high-energy low-rank updates write the winner into a form aligned with the unembedding direction. Phases 1 and 3 grow slowly with model depth, while Phase 2 expands linearly. The additional capacity of deeper LLMs is largely absorbed by candidate disambiguation.

analysis.tldr: LLM各层预测信息几何结构呈现三个相：播种复用、提升覆盖、聚焦收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解LLM内部预测信息如何逐层演化，有助于揭示其工作机制和设计更高效的模型。
analysis.problem: LLM各层残差流中预测信息的几何结构和演化规律是什么？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预测信息子空间在Grassmann流形上的轨迹呈单峰分布（上升-平台-下降）；不同分辨率参数k下结构一致；更新方向始终近似正交于残差流；三个相的区别在于有效秩的变化（扩展、稳定、集中）。
analysis.method: 利用表示透镜（学习仿射映射预测下一token）作为几何诊断工具，定义预测读出子空间（残差流上映射的k维奇异子空间），在Grassmann流形上追踪其轨迹，分析跨层相似性分布。
contributions: 提出基于Grassmann流形的几何诊断方法，揭示LLM预测信息跨层演化的三个相。
发现三个相（播种复用、提升覆盖、聚焦收敛）及其与模型深度、参数量的关系。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5和OLMo2两个系列共8个模型（1B-32B）上验证，分析不同分辨率参数k下的结构。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅分析两个模型家族，泛化性需更多验证。
分辨率参数k的选择可能影响结果，但摘要显示结构一致。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM各层预测信息几何结构呈现三个相：播种复用、提升覆盖、聚焦收敛。

papers.title: Large Language Models for Sequential Decision-Making: Improving In-Context Learning via Supervised Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable in-context learning (ICL) capabilities, yet their potential for sequential decision-making remains underexplored. In this paper, we study the ICL capabilities of LLMs in sequential decision-making settings, including Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), Partially Observable MDPs (POMDPs), and Ambiguous POMDPs (APOMDPs). We fine-tune pretrained LLMs to perform few-shot decision-making directly from offline, oracle-labeled trajectories. Our framework enables flexible imitation of policies through supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Theoretically, we focus on linear MDPs and interpret a fine-tuned attention layer as implicitly estimating optimal Q-functions from in-context data. Building on this interpretation, we derive an end-to-end suboptimality bound for the induced policy that separates the in-context estimation error from the training-length bias.
