Hence, to overcome the limitations of dilated convolutions, we propose kernel interpolation of SD models for higher-resolution image generation. In this work, we show mathematically that interpolation can correctly scale convolution kernels if multiplied by a constant coefficient and achieve competitive empirical results in generating beyond-training-resolution images with Stable Diffusion using zero training. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method enables interpolation of deep neural networks to adapt to higher-dimensional training data, with a worst-case performance drop of $2.6\%$ in accuracy and F1-Score relative to the baseline. This shows the applicability of our method to be general, where we interpolate fully-connected layers, going beyond convolution layers. We also discuss how we can reduce the memory footprints of training neural networks, using our method up to at least $4\times$.

analysis.tldr: 提出核插值方法，无需微调即可让Stable Diffusion生成超分辨率图像，并推广到全连接层，实现4倍内存压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: Stable Diffusion等扩散模型受限于训练分辨率，生成高分辨率图像时出现物体重复伪影；现有方法如膨胀卷积存在零间隙难以微调，补丁扩散效率不高，亟需一种无需微调、通用且高效的超分辨率生成方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调模型的前提下，消除Stable Diffusion生成超分辨率图像时的物体重复伪影，并推广到其他神经网络层。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Stable Diffusion在生成高于训练分辨率图像时，会一致出现物体重复伪影；膨胀卷积虽有效但零间隙导致微调困难；补丁扩散无法高效解决该问题。
analysis.method: 对Stable Diffusion的卷积核进行插值（如双线性插值），并乘以常数系数以正确缩放卷积核；该方法可推广到全连接层，实现神经网络对更高维训练数据的适应。
contributions: 提出一种基于核插值的零训练超分辨率生成方法，有效消除物体重复伪影。
从数学上证明插值乘以常数系数可正确缩放卷积核，并推广到全连接层，实现通用性。
展示该方法可将神经网络训练内存占用降低至少4倍。
analysis.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion上生成超分辨率图像，取得有竞争力的实证结果；在全连接层上，相对于基线，准确率和F1分数的最差性能下降为2.6%。
limitations: 摘要未提供与其他超分辨率方法（如膨胀卷积）的详细对比实验。
方法在极高分倍率下的表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出核插值方法，无需微调即可让Stable Diffusion生成超分辨率图像，并推广到全连接层，实现4倍内存压缩。

papers.title: MBP-KT: Learning Global Collaborative Information from Meta-Behavioral Pattern for Enhanced Knowledge Tracing
papers.abstract: The emerging collaborative information-based knowledge tracing (KT) has been a promising way to enhance modeling of learners' knowledge states. The core idea is to extract the collaborative information from interaction sequences of other learners to assist the prediction on the target one. Despite effectiveness, existing methods are built on the raw interaction sequences with tailored modules, which inevitably limits their capacity in deeply capturing learning behavioral patterns and generalization. To this end, we propose a general meta-behavioral pattern-aware framework (MBP-KT) for KT. Specifically, MBP-KT introduces a novel meta-behavioral sequence construction to transform the raw interaction sequences into the combinations of different meta-behavioral patterns. In this way, the learning behavioral patterns of learners can be effectively preserved. Then, MBP-KT develops a parameter-free module to extract the global collaborative representations from the constructed meta-behavioral sequences. Moreover, MBP-KT provides general injection strategies to introduce the extracted global collaborative information into various downstream KT models, ensuring the universality of the collaborative information. Extensive results on real-world datasets demonstrate that MBP-KT can consistently boosts the performance of a wide range of KT models.

analysis.tldr: 提出元行为模式框架MBP-KT，通过构造元行为序列提取全局协作信息，提升多种知识追踪模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有协作信息知识追踪方法基于原始交互序列，难以深度捕获学习行为模式且泛化能力有限。
analysis.problem: 如何从学习者交互序列中提取通用且有效的全局协作信息以增强知识追踪模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MBP-KT框架，包括元行为序列构造（将原始交互转换为元行为模式组合）、参数无关的全局协作表示提取模块，以及将协作信息注入下游KT模型的通用策略。
contributions: 提出元行为序列构造方法，有效保留学习行为模式。
设计参数无关的全局协作表示提取模块，并给出通用注入策略，提升多种KT模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界数据集上，MBP-KT一致提升了多种知识追踪模型的性能。
limitations: 元行为模式的构造可能依赖领域知识。
框架在极大规模数据集上的计算效率未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元行为模式框架MBP-KT，通过构造元行为序列提取全局协作信息，提升多种知识追踪模型性能。

papers.title: EditSleuth: A Dataset of Grounded Reasoning Chains for Image-Edit Forensics
papers.abstract: Forensic analysis of AI-edited images requires more than binary real-versus-fake prediction: a useful system should localize the edit, identify its semantic type, and ground its decisions in visual evidence. Existing image-forensics datasets typically emphasize detection or localization, while reasoning-supervised vision-language datasets rarely target image manipulation and often rely on LLM-generated rationales whose faithfulness is difficult to verify. We introduce EditSleuth, a dataset of 257,725 image-edit triplets constructed from existing image-editing corpora for grounded image-edit forensic reasoning. Each example includes an edited image, its source image, a binary edit mask, a 12-class edit taxonomy label, a difficulty score, and a six-step reasoning chain. EditSleuth chains are generated deterministically from triplet-grounded upstream artifacts, with each statement tied to a specific computable source of evidence. Our analysis reveals that a naive four-component difficulty formulation suffers from a rank-2 correlation collapse among magnitude features; a simplified three-component formulation substantially increases score dispersion on both Pico-Banana and MagicBrush. Difficulty also varies meaningfully within most edit categories, indicating that the score is not a proxy for edit type. As an initial learning study, we fine-tune Qwen2-VL-2B with LoRA and find that chain-as-target supervision matches a label-only baseline on classification accuracy among parseable answers, while additionally yielding grounded explanatory prose that label-only supervision cannot produce. We release the dataset, the deterministic construction pipeline, and pilot training scripts.

analysis.tldr: EditSleuth是一个用于图像编辑取证推理的大规模数据集，包含确定性生成的推理链，支持编辑定位、分类和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像取证数据集多关注检测或定位，缺乏推理监督；而视觉-语言数据集中的推理链常由LLM生成，忠实性难以验证。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个包含可验证、可解释推理链的图像编辑取证数据集，以支持编辑定位、语义类型识别和基于视觉证据的决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：一个四组分的难度公式存在秩-2相关性崩溃，简化后的三组分公式显著提高了分数分散度；难度在大多数编辑类别内变化有意义，表明分数不是编辑类型的代理。
analysis.method: 从现有图像编辑语料库构建257,725个图像编辑三元组，每个样本包含编辑图像、源图像、二进制编辑掩码、12类编辑分类标签、难度分数和六步推理链；推理链通过确定性方法从三元组上游工件生成。
contributions: 构建了EditSleuth数据集，包含257,725个图像编辑三元组及确定性推理链，支持可解释的图像编辑取证。
分析了难度公式的缺陷并提出改进，验证了难度分数与编辑类型的独立性。
通过微调Qwen2-VL-2B进行初步学习研究，表明链作为目标监督在分类准确率上与仅标签基线相当，同时能生成可解释的推理文本。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及初步学习研究：微调Qwen2-VL-2B，链作为目标监督在可解析答案的分类准确率上与仅标签基线相当。
limitations: 数据集基于现有编辑语料库，可能覆盖的编辑类型有限。
推理链虽确定性生成，但可能无法涵盖所有真实场景中的编辑变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EditSleuth是一个用于图像编辑取证推理的大规模数据集，包含确定性生成的推理链，支持编辑定位、分类和可解释性。

papers.title: SkillMaster: Toward Autonomous Skill Mastery in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Skills provide an effective mechanism for improving LLM agents on complex tasks, yet in existing agent frameworks, their creation, refinement, and selection are typically governed by external teachers, hand-designed rules, or auxiliary modules. As a result, skills remain external resources to be invoked, rather than capabilities that agents can develop, adapt, and internalize through experience. To endow LLM agents with autonomous skill mastery, we propose SkillMaster, a training framework that teaches agents to create new skills, refine existing skills, and select accumulated skills during task solving. This capability is achieved through three key designs. First, we train agents through trajectory-informed skill review, teaching agents to propose, update, or retain skills based on evidence from completed episodes. Second, each candidate skill edit is designed to be evaluated by its counterfactual utility on related probe tasks, providing a direct learning signal for training skill-editing decisions. Third, we introduce DualAdv-GRPO, which separately estimates advantages for task-solving actions and skill-editing decisions, stabilizing joint training across task solving and skill management. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that SkillMaster improves the overall success rate over state-of-the-art baselines by 8.8% and 9.3%, respectively, achieving the best performance among all compared methods. Further analysis reveals a marked shift in agent capability: agents trained with SkillMaster can identify skill failures, refine procedural knowledge from trajectory evidence, and transfer improvements to future tasks with limited skill-bank edits. Overall, SkillMaster moves LLM agents beyond mere skill use toward self-improving agents capable of developing, adapting, and applying their own skill repertoires.

analysis.tldr: SkillMaster通过轨迹驱动的技能回顾、反事实效用评估和双优势GRPO训练，使LLM智能体自主掌握技能的创建、精炼与选择，在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体框架中，技能的创建、精炼和选择通常依赖外部教师、手工规则或辅助模块，技能被视为外部资源而非智能体可自主发展、适应和内化的能力，限制了智能体的自主性和持续改进能力。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM智能体具备自主技能掌握能力，即能够自主创建新技能、精炼现有技能并在任务解决中选择合适的技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SkillMaster训练框架，包含三个关键设计：1) 轨迹驱动的技能回顾，基于已完成回合的证据训练智能体提出、更新或保留技能；2) 通过反事实效用评估每个候选技能编辑在相关探针任务上的效果，提供直接学习信号；3) 引入DualAdv-GRPO，分别估计任务解决动作和技能编辑决策的优势，稳定联合训练。
contributions: 提出SkillMaster框架，使LLM智能体能够自主创建、精炼和选择技能，实现从技能使用到技能掌握的转变。
设计轨迹驱动的技能回顾和反事实效用评估机制，为技能编辑提供学习信号。
提出DualAdv-GRPO算法，稳定联合训练任务解决和技能管理。
在ALFWorld和WebShop上取得最佳性能，分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld和WebShop两个基准上评估，SkillMaster相比最先进基线分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率，达到所有对比方法中的最佳性能。进一步分析显示智能体能识别技能失败、从轨迹证据中精炼程序性知识，并通过有限的技能库编辑将改进迁移到未来任务。
limitations: 可能依赖探针任务的设计质量，反事实效用评估的有效性可能受探针任务覆盖范围影响。
实验仅在两个模拟环境上进行，在更复杂或真实场景中的泛化能力有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillMaster通过轨迹驱动的技能回顾、反事实效用评估和双优势GRPO训练，使LLM智能体自主掌握技能的创建、精炼与选择，在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率。

papers.title: Structure-Centric Graph Foundation Model via Geometric Bases
papers.abstract: Graph foundation models (GFMs) seek transferable representations across graph domains but are limited by structural heterogeneity and incompatible node feature spaces. We propose Structure-Centric Graph Foundation Models (SCGFM), which treat graph topology as the primary source of transferable knowledge. Modeling graphs as metric measure spaces, SCGFM introduces learnable geometric bases that define a shared structural coordinate system. Graphs are aligned to these bases via Gromov-Wasserstein distances, yielding structure-aligned latent representations that accommodate heterogeneous graph topologies. To address feature incompatibility, SCGFM employs a structure-aware feature re-encoding mechanism that unifies node representations without assuming a fixed feature dimensionality or requiring dataset-specific preprocessing. Experiments on graph- and node-level tasks demonstrate strong in-domain and cross-domain generalization, outperforming existing GFM approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于几何基的结构中心图基础模型，通过Gromov-Wasserstein距离对齐图拓扑，实现跨域泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图基础模型受限于结构异质性和节点特征空间不兼容，难以实现跨域迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个结构中心的图基础模型，使其能够处理不同图域的结构异质性和特征不兼容问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将图建模为度量测度空间，引入可学习的几何基作为共享结构坐标系，通过Gromov-Wasserstein距离对齐图到这些基，得到结构对齐的潜在表示；同时采用结构感知的特征重编码机制统一节点表示。
contributions: 提出结构中心的图基础模型SCGFM，利用几何基实现跨域结构对齐。
设计结构感知的特征重编码机制，解决节点特征维度不固定问题。
analysis.experiments: 在图级和节点级任务上进行了实验，展示了强领域内和跨域泛化能力，优于现有GFM方法。
limitations: 可能依赖几何基的初始化和数量选择。
Gromov-Wasserstein距离计算可能带来较高复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于几何基的结构中心图基础模型，通过Gromov-Wasserstein距离对齐图拓扑，实现跨域泛化。

papers.title: Reconciling Consistency-Based Diagnosis with Actual-Causality-Based Explanations
papers.abstract: We establish, from the point of view of Explainable AI (XAI), connections between Consistency-Based Diagnosis (CBD), on one side, and Actual Causality and Causal Responsibility, on the other. CBD has received little attention from the XAI community. Connections between these two areas could have a fruitful impact on XAI and Explainable Data Management.

analysis.tldr: 将基于一致性的诊断与实际因果解释联系起来，为可解释AI提供新视角。
analysis.research_motivation: 可解释AI（XAI）领域主要关注基于实际因果的解释，而基于一致性的诊断（CBD）方法较少被关注，但两者之间存在潜在联系，建立这种联系可能对XAI和可解释数据管理产生有益影响。
analysis.problem: 建立基于一致性的诊断（CBD）与实际因果及因果责任之间的理论联系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从理论上分析CBD与实际因果和因果责任之间的形式化关系。
contributions: 建立了CBD与实际因果解释之间的形式化联系
为XAI和可解释数据管理提供了新的理论视角

limitations: 可能缺乏实证验证
理论联系的实际应用效果有待进一步研究

papers.title: PrepBench: How Far Are We from Natural-Language-Driven Data Preparation?
papers.abstract: Data preparation is a central and time-consuming stage in data analysis workflows. Traditionally, commercial tools have relied on graphical user interfaces (GUIs) to simplify data preparation, allowing users to define transformations through visual operators and workflows. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) raise the possibility of a paradigm shift toward natural language (NL)-driven data preparation, in which users can specify preparation intents in NL directly. However, it remains unclear how far current LLM-based agents are from this paradigm shift in practice. Existing code generation benchmarks do not capture key characteristics of data preparation, including ambiguous user intents, imperfect real-world data, and the need to translate code into interpretable workflows for validation. To bridge this gap, we present PrepBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate NL-driven data preparation along three core capabilities: interactive disambiguation, prep-code generation, and code-to-workflow translation. We crawl data from the Preppin' Data Challenges, and then extend it into a systematically designed benchmark. The benchmark covers diverse domains, and each task involves 3 to 18 data preparation steps. Nearly half of the tasks require over 100 lines of Python code, and the longest solutions approach 300 lines. Our evaluation shows that, despite recent progress, realizing this paradigm shift remains challenging for state-of-the-art LLMs. PrepBench provides a principled benchmark for measuring this gap and helps identify key challenges toward realizing NL-driven data preparation.

analysis.tldr: PrepBench 评估 LLM 在自然语言驱动的数据准备任务中的表现，发现当前模型仍面临挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据准备是数据分析中耗时且关键的阶段，传统 GUI 工具简化了操作，但大语言模型（LLM）的出现可能推动向自然语言驱动的范式转变。然而，现有代码生成基准未涵盖数据准备的关键特性（如模糊用户意图、不完美的真实数据、代码到工作流的可解释性），因此需要专门的基准来评估这一差距。
analysis.problem: 评估当前 LLM 在自然语言驱动的数据准备任务中的能力，特别是交互式消歧、准备代码生成和代码到工作流翻译三个核心能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出现有基准缺乏对数据准备关键特性的覆盖。
analysis.method: 构建 PrepBench 基准，从 Preppin' Data Challenges 爬取数据并扩展，涵盖多样领域，每个任务包含 3-18 个数据准备步骤，近半数任务需超过 100 行 Python 代码。评估三个核心能力：交互式消歧、准备代码生成、代码到工作流翻译。
contributions: 提出了 PrepBench，一个专门评估自然语言驱动数据准备的基准，涵盖交互式消歧、代码生成和代码到工作流翻译三个核心能力。
通过系统评估揭示了当前最先进 LLM 在实现自然语言驱动数据准备范式转变中的挑战和差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明评估显示当前最先进 LLM 仍面临挑战。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有数据准备场景，如实时流数据或特定领域。
评估仅基于 LLM，未考虑其他可能的方法或工具。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PrepBench 评估 LLM 在自然语言驱动的数据准备任务中的表现，发现当前模型仍面临挑战。

papers.title: Iterative Critique-and-Routing Controller for Multi-Agent Systems with Heterogeneous LLMs
papers.abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems often rely on a controller to coordinate a pool of heterogeneous models, yet existing controllers are typically limited to one-shot routing: they select a model once and return its output directly. Such routing-only designs provide no mechanism to critique intermediate drafts or support iterative refinement. To address this limitation, we propose a critique-and-routing controller that casts multi-agent coordination as a sequential decision problem. At each turn, the controller evaluates the current draft, decides whether to stop or continue, and, if needed, selects the next agent for further refinement. We formulate this process as a finite-horizon Markov Decision Process (MDP) with explicit agent-utilization constraints, design a composite reward for controller decisions across turns, and optimize the controller via policy gradients under a Lagrangian-relaxed objective. Extensive experiments across multiple heterogeneous multi-agent systems and seven reasoning benchmarks show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and substantially narrows the gap to the strongest agent, while using it for fewer than 25% of total calls.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种迭代式批评-路由控制器，将多智能体LLM协调建模为MDP，通过策略梯度优化，在减少强模型调用次数的同时提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多智能体LLM系统的控制器仅支持一次性路由，无法对中间结果进行批评或迭代优化，限制了异构模型协作的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够迭代评估中间输出、决定是否继续优化并选择合适智能体的控制器，以提升多智能体LLM系统的推理质量并降低对强模型的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将多智能体协调建模为有限时域马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），设计包含智能体使用约束的复合奖励函数，通过拉格朗日松弛下的策略梯度优化控制器。
contributions: 提出批评-路由控制器，将多智能体协调转化为序列决策问题，支持迭代式批评与优化。
将问题形式化为带智能体使用约束的有限时域MDP，并设计复合奖励函数。
通过拉格朗日松弛下的策略梯度优化控制器，在多个异构多智能体系统和七个推理基准上取得一致优势。
analysis.experiments: 在多个异构多智能体系统和七个推理基准上进行了实验，方法一致优于现有基线，且将最强智能体的调用次数降至总调用次数的25%以下。
limitations: 可能对MDP状态空间设计敏感，需要合理定义状态表示。
复合奖励函数的设计可能依赖领域知识，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种迭代式批评-路由控制器，将多智能体LLM协调建模为MDP，通过策略梯度优化，在减少强模型调用次数的同时提升推理性能。

papers.title: Event Fields: Learning Latent Event Structure for Waveform Foundation Models
papers.abstract: We propose a new class of waveform foundation models that departs from conventional sequence based representations by modeling physiological time series as realizations of latent event processes. Rather than treating signals as collections of local tokens or patches, our approach assumes that clinically meaningful structure arises from temporally extended, interacting events whose boundaries and dynamics are not directly observed. To capture this structure, we introduce a self supervised learning framework that enforces consistency across stochastic segmentations and time frequency projections of the same waveform, encouraging representations that are invariant to signal level perturbations while preserving event level organization. The resulting model combines a segmentation aware encoder with a latent interaction operator that captures dependencies among inferred events, and naturally extends to multimodal settings by aligning modalities through shared event representations. Across a range of physiological benchmarks, including arrhythmia classification, hemodynamic prediction, and waveform retrieval, the proposed method improves performance, robustness, and label efficiency relative to strong sequence based baselines. These results suggest that shifting from signal centric to event centric representations provides a more appropriate inductive bias for modeling physiological dynamics and offers a complementary path to scaling foundation models in healthcare.

analysis.tldr: 提出事件场表示，将生理时间序列建模为潜在事件过程，提升波形基础模型的性能与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有波形基础模型基于序列表示（如局部token或patch），忽略了生理信号中具有临床意义的事件结构，导致表示效率低、鲁棒性差。
analysis.problem: 如何学习生理时间序列中潜在事件的结构化表示，以替代传统的序列级表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自监督学习框架，通过随机分割和时频投影的一致性约束，结合分割感知编码器和潜在交互算子，学习事件级表示，并支持多模态对齐。
contributions: 提出事件场表示，将波形建模为潜在事件过程，提供更合适的归纳偏置。
设计自监督学习框架，通过分割和时频一致性学习事件级表示。
在心律失常分类、血流动力学预测和波形检索等任务上验证了性能、鲁棒性和标签效率的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在心律失常分类、血流动力学预测和波形检索等生理基准上，与强序列基线相比，方法在性能、鲁棒性和标签效率上均有提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定生理信号类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
事件结构的可解释性未在摘要中明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出事件场表示，将生理时间序列建模为潜在事件过程，提升波形基础模型的性能与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Core-Halo Decomposition: Decentralizing Large-Scale Fixed-Point Problems
papers.abstract: We study solving large-scale fixed-point equation \(x^\star=\bar F(x^\star)\) with decomposition. Standard strict decomposition assigns each agent a disjoint block and evaluates updates using only owned coordinates. For most operators, however, a block update may depend on variables outside the block. Truncating these dependencies by strict decomposition changes the mean operator and creates structural bias that cannot be removed by more samples, smaller stepsizes, or additional consensus. We therefore propose Core-Halo decomposition, which separates write ownership from read-only evaluation context: each agent updates its own core and reads from an overlapping halo. By aligning the Core-Halo decomposition with the block-dependence structure of $\bar F$, the original fixed-point problem can be implemented faithfully in a decentralized multi-agent system. We further characterize the fundamental obstruction faced by strict decomposition through a Bellman closure condition and a blockwise bias lower bound, showing that local-only updates can alter the original fixed-point operator. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments across a range of application settings, and demonstrate that Core-Halo achieves near-centralized performance while retaining the parallelism benefits of decentralization.

analysis.tldr: 提出Core-Halo分解方法，通过分离写所有权与读上下文，实现大规模不动点问题的去中心化忠实求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模不动点问题在分布式系统中求解时，标准严格分解因截断块间依赖引入结构性偏差，且无法通过增加样本或减小步长消除，亟需一种能忠实保持原算子结构的分解方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种去中心化分解方法，使得每个智能体在更新自身变量时能利用必要的跨块依赖信息，从而避免严格分解带来的结构性偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 严格分解因截断依赖导致均值算子改变，产生无法通过更多样本、更小步长或额外共识消除的结构性偏差；通过Bellman闭包条件和块级偏差下界刻画了该根本障碍。
analysis.method: Core-Halo分解：每个智能体拥有写所有权的核心（core）和只读的上下文晕（halo），通过将分解与算子块依赖结构对齐，在去中心化系统中忠实实现原不动点问题。
contributions: 提出Core-Halo分解，分离写所有权与读上下文，消除严格分解的结构性偏差。
通过Bellman闭包条件和块级偏差下界理论刻画严格分解的根本障碍。
实验证明Core-Halo在多种应用中达到接近中心化的性能，同时保留去中心化的并行优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多种应用设置中进行了广泛实验，并表明Core-Halo达到接近中心化的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖算子块依赖结构的先验知识，对未知结构问题适应性有限。
晕的大小与通信开销的权衡未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Core-Halo分解方法，通过分离写所有权与读上下文，实现大规模不动点问题的去中心化忠实求解。

papers.title: Semantic Voting: Execution-Grounded Consensus for LLM Code Generation
papers.abstract: LLM code-generation pipelines often sample multiple candidates and select one final answer without access to a complete oracle. Existing pipelines mix textual voting, ranking, and execution-based agreement, but the relative contribution of each component remains unclear. We study 18 configurations across different models, thinking levels, and benchmarks, comparing output-pattern majority voting, weighted voting, MBR-Exec, and SemanticVote - a method that clusters candidates by execution fingerprints on LLM-generated inputs. Three findings emerge. (1) The best execution-based selector exceeds output-pattern majority voting by 19-52 percentage points on every configuration, with every execution-based selector exceeding it by at least 18 points. (2) Once candidates are executed on diverse inputs, aggregation rule has limited effect: SemanticVote, weighted voting, and MBR-Exec are statistically indistinguishable across all 18 configurations. The largest factor is input quality: sketch-based input generation consistently outperforms direct LLM generation by 0.6-2.1 pp and random fuzzing by up to 11.3 pp. (3) Thinking level interacts differently with selection families: deeper thinking improves majority voting by 12 pp but execution-based methods stay flat or degrade as candidate diversity falls. These results frame inference-time code selection as a signal-quality problem rather than an aggregation-rule problem: when oracles are unavailable, the behavioral evidence matters more than the aggregation rule.

analysis.tldr: LLM代码生成中，执行信号的质量比聚合规则更重要，基于执行指纹的聚类方法SemanticVote显著优于输出模式多数投票。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代码生成管线通常采样多个候选并选择最终答案，但缺乏完整oracle，且文本投票、排序和执行一致性等组件的相对贡献不明确。
analysis.problem: 在无oracle场景下，如何有效利用执行信号从多个候选代码中选择最佳答案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 执行信号质量（输入多样性）比聚合规则更重要；深度思考提升多数投票但降低执行方法效果。
analysis.method: SemanticVote：在LLM生成的输入上执行候选代码，根据执行指纹（如输出、错误类型）聚类，选择代表性候选。
contributions: 系统比较18种配置，揭示执行信号质量比聚合规则更关键
提出SemanticVote方法，基于执行指纹聚类选择代码
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型、思考级别和基准上测试18种配置，比较输出模式多数投票、加权投票、MBR-Exec和SemanticVote。
limitations: 未讨论执行指纹的鲁棒性
输入生成依赖LLM，可能引入偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM代码生成中，执行信号的质量比聚合规则更重要，基于执行指纹的聚类方法SemanticVote显著优于输出模式多数投票。

papers.title: Attention-based graph neural networks: a survey
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) aim to learn well-trained representations in a lower-dimension space for downstream tasks while preserving the topological structures. In recent years, attention mechanism, which is brilliant in the fields of natural language processing and computer vision, is introduced to GNNs to adaptively select the discriminative features and automatically filter the noisy information. To the best of our knowledge, due to the fast-paced advances in this domain, a systematic overview of attention-based GNNs is still missing. To fill this gap, this paper aims to provide a comprehensive survey on recent advances in attention-based GNNs. Firstly, we propose a novel two-level taxonomy for attention-based GNNs from the perspective of development history and architectural perspectives. Specifically, the upper level reveals the three developmental stages of attention-based GNNs, including graph recurrent attention networks, graph attention networks, and graph transformers. The lower level focuses on various typical architectures of each stage. Secondly, we review these attention-based methods following the proposed taxonomy in detail and summarize the advantages and disadvantages of various models. A model characteristics table is also provided for a more comprehensive comparison. Thirdly, we share our thoughts on some open issues and future directions of attention-based GNNs. We hope this survey will provide researchers with an up-to-date reference regarding applications of attention-based GNNs. In addition, to cope with the rapid development in this field, we intend to share the relevant latest papers as an open resource at https://github.com/sunxiaobei/awesome-attention-based-gnns.

analysis.tldr: 对基于注意力的图神经网络进行了系统综述，提出两层次分类法并总结了开放问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 注意力机制在NLP和CV中表现优异，被引入GNN以自适应选择特征和过滤噪声，但缺乏系统性综述。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对基于注意力的GNN的全面分类和比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两层次分类法：上层按发展历史分为图循环注意力网络、图注意力网络和图Transformer三个阶段；下层聚焦各阶段典型架构。
contributions: 提出基于发展历史和架构视角的两层次分类法
详细综述各阶段方法并总结优缺点，提供模型特性表
分享开放问题和未来方向，并维护开源资源

limitations: 可能未涵盖所有最新方法

papers.title: Explanation Fairness in Large Language Models: An Empirical Analysis of Disparities in How LLMs Justify Decisions Across Demographic Groups
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed not only to make decisions but to explain them. While AI decision fairness has been studied extensively, the fairness of AI explanations (whether LLMs justify decisions with equal quality, depth, tone, and linguistic sophistication across demographic groups) has received little attention. This paper introduces the Explanation Fairness Taxonomy (EFT), a framework comprising five formally defined, operationalizable dimensions: Verbosity Disparity, Sentiment Disparity, Epistemic Hedging Disparity, Decision-Linked Explanation Disparity, and Lexical Complexity Disparity. The taxonomy is instantiated in a controlled empirical study across 80 prompt templates, four consequential decision domains (hiring, medical triage, credit assessment, legal judgment), and five LLMs: GPT-4.1, Claude Sonnet, LLaMA 3.3 70B, GPT-OSS 120B, and Qwen3 32B. Two novel black-box metrics are introduced: the Hedging Density Score (HDS) and the Explanation Faithfulness Proxy (EFP), a heuristic indicator of decision-linked explanation variation. Across up to 400 prompt pairs, all eight EFT metrics show statistically significant disparities (Cohen's d ranging from small to large, all p_BH < 10^(-62)). Model choice is strongly associated with disparity magnitude: Qwen3 32B exhibits verbosity disparities 5.9x larger than LLaMA 3.3 70B. Two prompting-based mitigations show significant reductions in EFP disparity (78-95%) but no significant effect on stylistic dimensions, consistent with the hypothesis that stylistic explanation inequalities are encoded in pre-training distributions and are not resolvable through deployment-level instruction alone. A reproducible measurement framework is offered for explanation-level fairness auditing, with implications for AI regulation and deployment practice.

analysis.tldr: LLM 在跨人口群体生成解释时存在系统性不公平，风格差异源于预训练分布，无法通过部署级指令缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 决策公平性已被广泛研究，但 AI 解释的公平性（即 LLM 是否以同等质量、深度、语气和语言复杂度向不同群体解释决策）几乎未被关注。随着 LLM 被用于生成决策解释，解释层面的不公平可能加剧社会偏见。
analysis.problem: 量化并分析 LLM 在跨人口群体（如性别、种族）生成解释时存在的多维不公平现象，并探索缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有八个 EFT 指标均显示统计显著的不公平（Cohen's d 从小到大的效应量，p_BH < 10^(-62)）；模型选择与不公平幅度强相关（如 Qwen3 32B 的冗长差异是 LLaMA 3.3 70B 的 5.9 倍）；基于提示的缓解方法仅能减少决策关联解释差异（78-95%），但对风格维度无显著效果，表明风格解释不平等编码在预训练分布中。
analysis.method: 提出解释公平性分类法（EFT），包含五个维度（冗长、情感、认知不确定性、决策关联、词汇复杂度）和八个可操作指标；引入两个黑盒度量：认知不确定性密度分数（HDS）和解释忠实度代理（EFP）；在 80 个提示模板、四个决策领域、五个 LLM 上进行控制实验。
contributions: 提出解释公平性分类法（EFT），系统定义并操作化 LLM 解释公平性的五个维度。
引入两个新黑盒度量（HDS 和 EFP）用于量化解释公平性。
通过大规模实证研究揭示 LLM 解释存在显著且系统性的跨群体不公平，并发现风格不公平源于预训练分布。
analysis.experiments: 在 80 个提示模板、四个决策领域（招聘、医疗分诊、信用评估、法律判决）和五个 LLM（GPT-4.1、Claude Sonnet、LLaMA 3.3 70B、GPT-OSS 120B、Qwen3 32B）上进行控制实验，使用最多 400 个提示对，所有指标均显示统计显著差异。
limitations: 仅关注英语文本，可能不适用于其他语言或文化背景。
EFT 维度可能未覆盖所有解释公平性方面（如事实准确性差异）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM 在跨人口群体生成解释时存在系统性不公平，风格差异源于预训练分布，无法通过部署级指令缓解。

papers.title: MIND-Skill: Quality-Guaranteed Skill Generation via Multi-Agent Induction and Deduction
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) powered AI agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for autonomous problem-solving, yet they continue to struggle with complex, multi-step real-world tasks that demand domain-specific procedural knowledge. Reusable agent skills, which encapsulate successful problem-solving strategies, offer a natural remedy by enabling agents to build on prior experience. However, curating such skills has largely remained a manual endeavor, requiring human experts to distill rich domain knowledge into actionable guidelines. In this work, we present $\textbf{M}$ulti-agent $\textbf{IN}$duction and $\textbf{D}$eduction for $\textbf{Skill}$s ($\textbf{MIND-Skill}$), a framework that automatically induces generalizable skills from successful trajectories with robust quality guarantees. MIND-Skill consists of an induction agent which is tasked to abstract reusable skills from successful trajectories, and a deduction agent which aims to reconstruct trajectories by following the induced skills. To guarantee the quality of the generated skills, we introduce a reconstruction loss that compares input and reconstructed trajectories, an outcome loss that enforces the correctness of the reconstructed trajectories, and a rubric loss that assesses the documentation quality and regularizes the abstraction level of the generated skills according to predefined criteria. These textual losses are jointly optimized with TextGrad, and the resulting skills are evaluated on held-out tasks unseen during optimization. Experiments on AppWorld and BFCL-v3 show that MIND-Skill consistently outperforms concurrent skill generation methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体归纳与演绎框架MIND-Skill，自动从成功轨迹生成高质量可复用技能，并通过文本损失优化保证质量。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在复杂多步任务中仍缺乏领域特定程序知识，手动整理技能成本高且难以规模化。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从成功轨迹中归纳出可泛化的高质量技能，并保证其质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MIND-Skill框架包含归纳智能体（从轨迹抽象技能）和演绎智能体（按技能重建轨迹），通过重建损失、结果损失和评分损失联合优化技能质量。
contributions: 提出多智能体归纳与演绎框架自动生成可复用技能
引入三种文本损失（重建、结果、评分）联合优化技能质量
在AppWorld和BFCL-v3上超越现有技能生成方法
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld和BFCL-v3基准上评估，MIND-Skill持续优于同期技能生成方法。
limitations: 可能依赖初始轨迹质量
文本损失优化计算成本较高
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体归纳与演绎框架MIND-Skill，自动从成功轨迹生成高质量可复用技能，并通过文本损失优化保证质量。

papers.title: IPAD-CLIP: Teaching CLIP to Detect Image Local Perceptual Artifacts
papers.abstract: Current image quality assessment methods are heavily biased towards global distortions (e.g., noise, blur), neglecting local perceptual artifacts such as ghosting, lens flare, and moire effects. Although significant progress has been made in artifact removal, the fundamental problem of automatic artifact detection remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we formalize the Image Perceptual Artifact Detection (IPAD) task to address this gap. We contribute a benchmark dataset comprising 3,520 artifact images, including 520 real-captured and 3,000 synthetic samples, each paired with pixel-level masks across three representative artifact categories. The core challenge of IPAD lies in the localized, subtle, and semantically weak nature of these artifacts, which makes them prone to missed detection. To overcome this, we introduce IPAD-CLIP, a novel framework built upon CLIP that enhances artifact discrimination in both textual and visual spaces while preserving generalization capabilities. Our key insight is that local artifacts often exhibit strong correlations with specific semantic contexts. Accordingly, we learn artifact-aware text embeddings to explicitly model the object-artifact relationships, resulting in enhanced representations that clear differentiate between clean and artifact prompts. These text embeddings are then used as anchors to shift the visual encoder's attention from high-level semantics to subtle, low-level artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IPAD-CLIP offers a resource-efficient adaptation of CLIP for detection, significantly outperforming advanced image anomaly detection and manipulation detection methods on our benchmark. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study addressing multi-class local perceptual artifact detection in terms of both dataset and model.

analysis.tldr: 提出IPAD-CLIP框架，利用CLIP检测图像局部感知伪影，并构建了首个多类局部伪影检测基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法主要关注全局失真，忽略了鬼影、镜头光晕等局部感知伪影，而自动检测这些伪影的问题尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 解决图像中局部、细微、语义弱的感知伪影的自动检测问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 局部伪影具有局部性、细微性和语义弱的特点，容易被漏检，且与特定语义上下文存在强相关性。
analysis.method: 基于CLIP，学习伪影感知文本嵌入以显式建模物体-伪影关系，并用这些文本嵌入作为锚点，将视觉编码器的注意力从高层语义转移到低层伪影。
contributions: 形式化了图像感知伪影检测（IPAD）任务，并构建了包含3520张伪影图像（含真实和合成样本）及像素级掩码的基准数据集。
提出IPAD-CLIP框架，通过伪影感知文本嵌入和注意力转移机制，实现了资源高效的局部伪影检测。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准上，IPAD-CLIP显著优于先进的图像异常检测和操作检测方法。
limitations: 仅覆盖三种代表性伪影类别，可能无法泛化到更多类型。
依赖CLIP的预训练知识，对未见过的伪影类型可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IPAD-CLIP框架，利用CLIP检测图像局部感知伪影，并构建了首个多类局部伪影检测基准。

papers.title: CAST: Channel-Aware Spatial Transfer Learning with Pseudo-Image Radar for Sign Language Recognition
papers.abstract: We propose CAST, a dual-stream architecture that utilizes channel-aware spatial transfer learning for isolated sign language recognition addressing the challenges of magnitude-only 60~GHz radar Range-Time Maps (RTM). The proposed framework combines three physics-aware architectures with pretrained vision backbones, which operate under radar-only constraints across clinical and alphabetical gestures. First, an explicit decibel-to-linear inversion is combined with a windowed fast Fourier transform that extracts Cadence Velocity Diagrams (CVD) while avoiding the harmonic artifacts that arise from the spectral analysis of log-compressed signals. Second, a cross-antenna spatial attention module applies attention to raw antenna channels before the convolution, preserving inter-receiver amplitude covariance. Third, an asymmetric cross-attention mechanism fuses representations from parallel ConvNeXt-Tiny (CVD) and EfficientNetV2-S (RTM) backbones. Extensive experiments reveal that the architecture achieves a Top-1 accuracy of 80.5% under 5-fold cross-validation, establishing a 3.3% improvement over the best single-model baseline (77.2%). The findings suggest that physics-aware signal representations form a promising direction for radar-only sign language recognition under constrained sensor modalities. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Shakhoyat/CAST-at-SignEval2026.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAST双流架构，利用物理感知信号表示和预训练视觉骨干，在60GHz雷达手语识别中达到80.5% Top-1准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有雷达手语识别方法受限于仅幅度信息的Range-Time Maps，缺乏相位信息，且传统信号处理引入谐波伪影，导致识别精度低。
analysis.problem: 在仅使用60GHz雷达幅度数据（无相位）的条件下，实现孤立手语识别的高精度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CAST双流架构，包含：1) 显式dB-to-linear逆变换结合窗函数FFT提取Cadence Velocity Diagrams (CVD)避免谐波伪影；2) 跨天线空间注意力模块在卷积前处理原始天线通道，保持接收器间幅度协方差；3) 非对称交叉注意力融合ConvNeXt-Tiny (CVD)和EfficientNetV2-S (RTM)双骨干网络。
contributions: 提出物理感知的CVD提取方法，避免对数压缩信号的谐波伪影。
设计跨天线空间注意力模块，利用多通道雷达数据。
在雷达手语识别任务上达到80.5% Top-1准确率，超越最佳单模型基线3.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在临床和字母手势数据集上进行5折交叉验证，Top-1准确率80.5%，相比最佳单模型基线77.2%提升3.3%。
limitations: 仅针对孤立手语识别，未涉及连续手语。
依赖特定60GHz雷达硬件，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAST双流架构，利用物理感知信号表示和预训练视觉骨干，在60GHz雷达手语识别中达到80.5% Top-1准确率。

papers.title: Sketch-and-Verify: Structured Inference-Time Scaling via Program Sketching
papers.abstract: SKETCHVERIFY is a within-tier cost-performance policy, not a universal accuracy improvement. The operational question: a practitioner stuck with a small, cheap code model (here, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite) for latency, deployment, or budget reasons -- how should they spend a small amount of extra test-time compute? SKETCHVERIFY factorizes the search space: the LLM enumerates K distinct algorithmic strategies, writes a program sketch for each (a partial program with ?? holes), and fills each sketch M times, producing K x M structurally diverse candidates that are verified by execution and selected by fingerprint clustering. Each extra sketch is guaranteed to explore a different algorithm; each extra flat sample likely duplicates an existing one. Our central evidence is a cost-quality Pareto plot on HumanEval+ across three Gemini tiers (Lite, Flash, Pro), and a reanalysis of the 19 problems where Lite greedy fails. Two findings: (1) Within-tier, sketching dominates flat sampling at matched candidate count. On the hard subset, Lite Sketch K=2, M=5 recovers 11/19 (58%) vs. flat N=10 at 5/19 (26%, +32pp); Lite Sketch K=10, M=10 recovers 15/19 (79%) vs. flat N=100 at 10/19 (53%, +26pp). Flat cannot close the gap even at ~3x the budget: flat N=50 still loses to Sketch K=2, M=5 by +11pp. (2) Cross-tier, sketching does not replace upgrading. Pro greedy (89%) dominates Lite Sketch K=10, M=10 (79%) on both pass@1 and dollar cost. Practitioner rule: if a stronger tier is available, use greedy on it; otherwise sketching is the cost-effective way to spend extra compute. We characterize the K-vs-M trade-off via a Flash Lite scaling sweep, report HumanEval+ saturation on Flash and Pro, and show the method composes cleanly with execution-based selection from the concurrent Semantic Voting line of work.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Sketch-and-Verify 策略，通过程序草图枚举与填充在固定小模型上以更少预算超越同模型平采样，但无法替代升级更强模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 实践中因延迟、部署或预算限制只能使用小代码模型，如何在有限额外测试时计算下最大化性能提升是核心痛点。
analysis.problem: 给定一个固定的小代码模型，如何分配少量额外测试时计算（候选数）以最有效地提升代码生成正确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 平采样在候选数增加时存在大量重复结构，而草图枚举能保证每个额外草图探索不同算法，从而在相同候选数下获得更高覆盖率。
analysis.method: SKETCHVERIFY：LLM 先枚举 K 种不同算法策略，为每种策略编写一个带 ?? 孔的程序草图，然后对每个草图填充 M 次，得到 K×M 个结构多样候选，通过执行验证和指纹聚类选择最终答案。
contributions: 提出 Sketch-and-Verify 推理时扩展框架，通过程序草图枚举保证候选结构多样性。
在 HumanEval+ 上系统比较了草图采样与平采样在相同候选数下的成本-质量帕累托曲线，并给出跨层级模型的使用建议。
analysis.experiments: 在 HumanEval+ 上使用 Gemini 三个层级（Lite, Flash, Pro）进行实验，报告了 Lite 模型上草图采样与平采样的通过率对比，以及跨层级对比。
limitations: 仅适用于代码生成任务，且依赖执行验证。
不能替代升级更强模型，跨层级时强模型贪心解码仍占优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Sketch-and-Verify 策略，通过程序草图枚举与填充在固定小模型上以更少预算超越同模型平采样，但无法替代升级更强模型。

papers.title: Fitting Multilinear Polynomials for Logic Gate Networks
papers.abstract: We study learnable logic gate networks that stack layers of 2-input Boolean gates to build combinational circuits. Every 2-input gate has a unique multilinear polynomial with 4 coefficients, so the 16 Boolean gates form a codebook of prototypes in a 4-dimensional space, reducing training to a vector-quantization problem. The baseline method, Soft-Mix, learns a 16-dimensional softmax over gate identities, but the codebook has rank~4: 11 of 15 simplex directions carry nullspace gradient, and at uniform initialization the backward signal vanishes exactly. We prove that no affine product reparameterization fixes the resulting interaction-coefficient starvation under STE, and show that the covariance Jacobian of soft-VQ selection bypasses it by coupling the starved coefficient to the always-active constant channel. Working in the 4-dimensional polynomial space reduces each neuron from 16 to 4 parameters. On seven datasets, at least one 4-parameter method matches or exceeds Soft-Mix on every dataset; the CovJac advantage over STE grows monotonically with interaction demand across all seven datasets. At depth, Soft-Mix collapses ($-37.3$pp on CIFAR-10 at 12 layers) while CovJac holds ($-0.5$pp on CIFAR-10, stable on MNIST).

analysis.tldr: 将逻辑门网络训练转化为4维多项式空间中的向量量化问题，提出CovJac方法解决梯度消失和交互系数饥饿问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 可学习的逻辑门网络在构建组合电路时，现有Soft-Mix方法存在梯度消失和交互系数饥饿问题，限制了深层网络的训练效果。
analysis.problem: 逻辑门网络中，基于16维softmax的基线方法在4维多项式空间中存在大量无效梯度方向，导致训练信号消失和交互系数无法更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出Soft-Mix的码本秩为4，15个单纯形方向中有11个梯度为零，均匀初始化时反向信号完全消失；且仿射乘积重参数化无法解决STE下的交互系数饥饿问题。
analysis.method: 提出CovJac方法，通过soft-VQ选择的协方差雅可比将饥饿系数与常激活通道耦合，在4维多项式空间中直接学习，每个神经元参数从16减至4。
contributions: 揭示了逻辑门网络训练中交互系数饥饿的根本原因，并证明仿射重参数化无法解决。
提出CovJac方法，通过协方差雅可比耦合解决梯度消失，在7个数据集上匹配或超越Soft-Mix，且深层网络稳定性显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在7个数据集上比较了多种4参数方法与Soft-Mix，CovJac在深层网络（如CIFAR-10 12层）上保持稳定（-0.5pp），而Soft-Mix崩溃（-37.3pp）。
limitations: 摘要未提及方法在更大规模或更复杂任务上的表现。
仅针对2输入布尔门网络，可能不直接推广到其他类型逻辑门或连续值网络。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将逻辑门网络训练转化为4维多项式空间中的向量量化问题，提出CovJac方法解决梯度消失和交互系数饥饿问题。

papers.title: C2L-Net: A Data-Driven Model for State-of-Charge Estimation of Lithium-Ion Batteries During Discharge
papers.abstract: Accurate state-of-charge (SOC) estimation is critical for the safe and efficient operation of lithium-ion batteries in battery management systems (BMS). Although data-driven approaches can effectively capture nonlinear battery dynamics, many existing methods rely on long historical input sequences, resulting in high computational cost and introducing padding-induced positional bias at the beginning of drive cycles. To address these limitations, we propose C2L-Net, a novel context-to-latest data-driven framework for realistic online SOC estimation using only a short historical window (20 s). Unlike existing short-receptive-field or long-history models, the proposed framework explicitly separates contextual encoding from latest-measurement updating, enabling both efficient temporal modeling and rapid adaptation to dynamic battery states. The proposed model incorporates a chunk-based feature extraction mechanism that combines Theta Attention Pooling with a Fourier-based Seasonality Basis to capture local temporal patterns while reducing sequence length. A causal context encoder, integrating a gated recurrent unit (GRU) with Causal Cosine Attention, models temporal dependencies without information leakage. Furthermore, a latest-measurement decoder, inspired by recursive filtering, updates the contextual state using the most recent measurement, enhancing responsiveness to dynamic operating conditions. Extensive experiments on a public lithium-ion battery drive-cycle dataset under multiple fixed-temperature conditions demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive accuracy while significantly improving computational efficiency. In particular, C2L-Net achieves up to 60 times faster inference and requires fewer parameters than recent data-driven baselines, while maintaining robust performance across unseen driving profiles.

analysis.tldr: 提出C2L-Net，仅用20秒短历史窗口实现锂离子电池荷电状态高效在线估计，推理速度提升60倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据驱动SOC估计方法依赖长历史输入序列，计算成本高且存在填充引入的位置偏差，难以满足实时在线需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高精度的同时，用短历史窗口实现低计算成本的在线SOC估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出C2L-Net框架，包含基于分块的特征提取（Theta Attention Pooling + 傅里叶季节基）、因果上下文编码器（GRU + Causal Cosine Attention）和最新测量解码器（递归滤波启发），仅用20秒历史窗口。
contributions: 提出上下文到最新（Context-to-Latest）框架，分离上下文编码与最新测量更新，实现高效时序建模与快速适应。
设计分块特征提取与因果注意力机制，减少序列长度并避免信息泄露。
在公开数据集上达到SOTA或竞争精度，推理速度提升60倍，参数更少。
analysis.experiments: 在公开锂离子电池驱动循环数据集上，多固定温度条件下进行实验，与多种基线对比，验证了精度和效率优势。
limitations: 仅针对放电过程，充电或其他工况未验证。
固定温度条件，实际变温场景性能需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出C2L-Net，仅用20秒短历史窗口实现锂离子电池荷电状态高效在线估计，推理速度提升60倍。

papers.title: Privacy-Aware Video Anomaly Detection through Orthogonal Subspace Projection
papers.abstract: Video anomaly detection (VAD) systems often prioritize accuracy while overlooking privacy concerns, limiting their suitability for real-world deployment. We propose the Orthogonal Projection Layer (OPL), a lightweight module that removes task-irrelevant variations to produce representations focused on anomaly-relevant cues. To address privacy risks in human-centered scenarios, we introduce Guided OPL (G-OPL), which suppresses facial attributes using weak supervision from face-presence signals while preserving non-identifying features such as pose and motion. A cosine alignment objective enforces consistent capture and removal of facial information without identity labels or adversarial training. We further present a privacy-aware evaluation framework that jointly assesses detection performance and privacy preservation, and enables analysis of how sensitive information is filtered. Experiments show that embedding privacy constraints into model design reduces sensitive information while maintaining or improving detection accuracy, supporting projection-based architectures as a principled approach for privacy-aware VAD.

analysis.tldr: 提出正交投影层(OPL)和引导版G-OPL，在视频异常检测中通过弱监督抑制面部特征，实现隐私保护与检测精度的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频异常检测系统过度关注准确性而忽视隐私风险，限制了其在真实场景中的部署，尤其是在涉及人脸的监控场景中。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持视频异常检测准确性的同时，有效去除与任务无关的敏感信息（如面部特征），实现隐私保护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出正交投影层(OPL)去除任务无关变化，以及引导版G-OPL利用面部存在信号的弱监督抑制面部属性，同时保留姿态和运动等非识别特征；使用余弦对齐目标强制一致地捕获和移除面部信息，无需身份标签或对抗训练。
contributions: 提出OPL和G-OPL模块，实现隐私感知的视频异常检测。
设计隐私感知评估框架，联合评估检测性能和隐私保护程度。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，将隐私约束嵌入模型设计可减少敏感信息，同时保持或提高检测精度。摘要未提供具体数值或数据集。
limitations: 可能仅适用于人脸相关的隐私场景，对其他敏感信息（如车牌）未涉及。
弱监督信号（面部存在）的获取可能引入额外标注成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出正交投影层(OPL)和引导版G-OPL，在视频异常检测中通过弱监督抑制面部特征，实现隐私保护与检测精度的平衡。

papers.title: AgentCollabBench: Diagnosing When Good Agents Make Bad Collaborators
papers.abstract: Multi-agent systems achieve state-of-the-art outcomes through peer collaboration. However, when an agent in the pipeline silently drops a constraint, the system's final output may look correct even though the reasoning chain was quietly corrupted, and existing outcome-based evaluations are blind to such multi-hop process failures. To make these vulnerabilities measurable before deployment, we introduce AgentCollabBench, a diagnostic benchmark of 900 human-validated tasks spanning software engineering, DevOps, and data engineering. Each task isolates one of four behavioral risks: instruction decay (does a constraint survive peer pressure?), false-belief contagion (does a falsehood spread through consensus?), context leakage (does information bleed between tasks?), and tracer durability (does marked data reach the final agent?). Evaluating four modern LLMs (GPT 4.1 mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, and Llama 3.1 8B Instruct), we expose model-specific vulnerability profiles invisible to outcome-only evaluation; Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, for example, leads on tracer durability and instruction stability, while GPT 4.1 mini leads on leakage containment and false-belief resistance. Beyond per-model differences, communication topology emerges as a primary risk factor that explains 7-40% of the variance in multi-hop information survival. The effect traces to a synthesis bottleneck specific to converging-DAG nodes: an agent weighing competing parent inputs discards constraints carried by a minority branch, a bottleneck structurally absent from linear chains. AgentCollabBench demonstrates that suboptimal topology can silently erase the safeguards of highly capable models, arguing that multi-agent reliability is fundamentally a structural problem and that scaling model intelligence alone is no substitute for architecture.

analysis.tldr: 提出AgentCollabBench基准，诊断多智能体协作中因通信拓扑和约束丢失导致的隐性失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终输出正确性，无法检测多跳推理链中约束被静默丢弃、错误信念传播等过程性失败，导致部署前风险不可见。
analysis.problem: 多智能体系统在协作中，由于通信拓扑和智能体行为（如指令衰减、错误信念传染）导致约束丢失或信息损坏，而现有结果导向评估无法捕捉这些过程性故障。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 不同模型有特定脆弱性轮廓（如Qwen在指令稳定性上领先，GPT 4.1 mini在泄漏抑制上领先）；2) 通信拓扑是主要风险因素，解释7-40%的多跳信息存活方差；3) 汇聚DAG节点存在合成瓶颈，少数分支约束被丢弃。
analysis.method: 构建包含900个人工验证任务的诊断基准AgentCollabBench，覆盖软件工程、DevOps和数据工程，隔离四种行为风险（指令衰减、错误信念传染、上下文泄漏、追踪持久性），并评估四种LLM。
contributions: 提出AgentCollabBench基准，系统诊断多智能体协作中的过程性失败模式。
揭示通信拓扑作为关键风险因素，解释多跳信息存活方差，并发现汇聚DAG合成瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在四种LLM（GPT 4.1 mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, Llama 3.1 8B Instruct）上评估，暴露模型特定脆弱性轮廓，并分析拓扑影响。
limitations: 基准任务限于软件工程、DevOps和数据工程，可能不覆盖其他领域。
仅评估四种模型，泛化性需更多模型验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AgentCollabBench基准，诊断多智能体协作中因通信拓扑和约束丢失导致的隐性失败模式。

papers.title: FlowADMM: Plug-and-play ADMM with Flow-based Renoise-Denoise Priors
papers.abstract: Plug-and-play (PnP) methods for solving inverse problems have recently achieved strong performance by leveraging denoising priors based on powerful generative diffusion and flow models. However, existing diffusion- and flow-based PnP methods typically rely on stochastic renoise-denoise operations, which complicate the analysis of their convergence behavior. In this work, we identify and formalize the deterministic renoise-denoise operator underlying flow-based plug-and-play methods. This perspective reveals that these methods implicitly define a deterministic operator given by the expectation of a denoiser over the latent noise distribution. Building on this insight, we propose FlowADMM, a PnP algorithm that integrates the renoise-denoise operator into the classical alternating direction method of multiplier (ADMM) framework. We establish convergence guarantees for FlowADMM under weak Lipschitz conditions on the underlying flow network, and extend the analysis to non-stationary time schedules. Empirically, FlowADMM achieves state-of-the-art performance among flow-based PnP methods on a range of inverse problems, including denoising, deblurring, super-resolution, and inpainting, while requiring fewer data consistency evaluations than prior approaches.

analysis.tldr: FlowADMM将流模型的重噪-去噪算子整合到ADMM框架中，实现可收敛的即插即用逆问题求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散和流模型的即插即用方法依赖随机重噪-去噪操作，导致收敛行为难以分析，限制了理论保证和实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个具有收敛保证的确定性即插即用逆问题求解算法，同时保持流模型的高性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出流模型即插即用方法隐式定义了一个确定性算子，即去噪器在潜在噪声分布上的期望，这为设计确定性算法提供了理论基础。
analysis.method: FlowADMM将流模型的重噪-去噪算子作为确定性先验，集成到交替方向乘子法（ADMM）框架中，并在弱Lipschitz条件下建立收敛保证，同时扩展到非平稳时间调度。
contributions: 形式化了流模型即插即用方法中的确定性重噪-去噪算子，揭示了其期望形式。
提出FlowADMM算法，将确定性算子与ADMM结合，并给出收敛性分析。
在多个逆问题（去噪、去模糊、超分辨率、修复）上达到流模型即插即用方法的最优性能，且所需数据一致性评估更少。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在去噪、去模糊、超分辨率和修复任务上达到SOTA。
limitations: 收敛性分析依赖于弱Lipschitz条件，可能不适用于所有流网络。
未讨论与其他非流模型即插即用方法的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowADMM将流模型的重噪-去噪算子整合到ADMM框架中，实现可收敛的即插即用逆问题求解。

papers.title: Geometry Guided Self-Consistency for Physical AI
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art physical AI models generate a chunk of actions per inference through diffusion or flow matching, iteratively refining an initial noise sample into an action trajectory. Because this inference process is inherently stochastic, committing to a single trajectory per round is brittle, and this brittleness compounds across the many sequential rounds that comprise a complete episode. We introduce KeyStone, an inference-time self-consistency method for diffusion-based action generation that draws $K$ candidate action chunks in parallel from a shared model context, clusters them in continuous action space, and returns the medoid of the largest cluster -- no additional model required. Two properties make this practical. First, the compact nature of action trajectories makes diffusion inference memory-bandwidth bound, leaving spare compute capacity to run $K$ chains in parallel with no additional wall-clock latency. Second, unlike token or pixel spaces where distance carries no semantic meaning and selection requires a learned judge, action chunks are geometrically structured such that Euclidean distance directly reflects physical similarity, making selection principled and judge-free. Across diverse vision-language-action models (VLAs) and world-action models (WAMs), KeyStone improves task success rates by up to \textbf{13.3\%} over single-trajectory sampling with negligible latency overhead, while having on par accuracy with model-based selectors at no training cost. We open source KeyStone at https://github.com/dywsjtu/keystone.

analysis.tldr: KeyStone 是一种无需额外模型的推理时自一致性方法，通过并行采样多条动作轨迹并选择最大簇的 medoid，显著提升物理 AI 任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理 AI 模型（如扩散/流匹配）生成动作轨迹时具有随机性，单次采样结果脆弱，且多轮交互中错误会累积，导致任务成功率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加额外模型和推理延迟的前提下，提高扩散动作生成模型在物理 AI 任务中的鲁棒性和成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 动作轨迹的紧凑性使得扩散推理受限于内存带宽，存在空闲计算资源；动作轨迹的几何结构使得欧氏距离直接反映物理相似性，无需学习型评判器。
analysis.method: KeyStone 从共享模型上下文中并行采样 K 个候选动作块，在连续动作空间中进行聚类，返回最大簇的 medoid 作为最终动作。
contributions: 提出 KeyStone，一种无需额外模型的推理时自一致性方法，适用于扩散动作生成。
利用动作轨迹的紧凑性和几何结构，实现并行采样无额外延迟，且选择原则性无需训练。
在多种 VLA 和 WAM 模型上验证，任务成功率提升高达 13.3%，与基于模型的选择器精度相当。
analysis.experiments: 在多种视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）和世界-动作模型（WAM）上评估，KeyStone 相比单轨迹采样将任务成功率提升高达 13.3%，延迟开销可忽略，且与基于模型的选择器精度相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于动作轨迹具有几何结构且欧氏距离有意义的场景。
并行采样 K 条轨迹需要足够的内存带宽支持，可能受限于硬件资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KeyStone 是一种无需额外模型的推理时自一致性方法，通过并行采样多条动作轨迹并选择最大簇的 medoid，显著提升物理 AI 任务成功率。

papers.title: Kinematics-Driven Gaussian Shape Deformation for Blurry Monocular Dynamic Scenes
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic 3D scenes from blurry monocular videos is challenging as motion-induced blur entangles object motion and geometry, hindering geometric consistency. We present Kinematics-GS, a kinematics-aware framework that models blur as motion-aligned deformation and introduces a kinematic prior to reparameterize Gaussian shapes along motion trajectories, thereby mitigating degenerate shape collapse without auxiliary motion supervision. To stabilize optimization, we decompose scenes into dynamic and static components using temporal deformation variance and employ a coarse-to-fine deformation strategy to capture both global motion and fine-grained details. We also introduce a challenging real-world dataset of deformable and elastic objects exhibiting non-rigid motion with spatially non-uniform motion blur that obscures geometric cues. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks with realistic motion blur demonstrate that Kinematics-GS outperforms prior methods by a clear margin in monocular dynamic scene reconstruction, highlighting its effectiveness in handling complex and non-rigid motion scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出运动学先验的3D高斯变形框架，从模糊单目视频中重建动态场景，有效缓解形状坍塌。
analysis.research_motivation: 从模糊单目视频重建动态3D场景极具挑战，因为运动模糊将物体运动与几何纠缠，破坏几何一致性，现有方法缺乏有效处理。
analysis.problem: 如何从运动模糊的单目视频中重建动态3D场景，避免形状退化并保持几何一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 运动模糊导致形状坍塌，且非刚性运动中的空间非均匀模糊进一步模糊几何线索。
analysis.method: 提出Kinematics-GS，将模糊建模为运动对齐变形，引入运动学先验沿运动轨迹重参数化高斯形状，分解场景为动态/静态成分，并采用由粗到细的变形策略。
contributions: 提出运动学感知框架Kinematics-GS，利用运动学先验重参数化高斯形状以缓解形状坍塌。
引入动态/静态分解和由粗到细变形策略以稳定优化。
提供包含非刚性运动和非均匀运动模糊的真实世界数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界基准上进行了广泛实验，结果显示Kinematics-GS在单目动态场景重建中显著优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖运动先验的准确性，极端模糊场景下先验估计可能不准确。
数据集规模有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出运动学先验的3D高斯变形框架，从模糊单目视频中重建动态场景，有效缓解形状坍塌。

papers.title: Transforming the Use of Earth Observation Data: Exascale Training of a Generative Compression Model with Historical Priors for up to 10,000x Data Reduction
papers.abstract: Earth observation is becoming one of the largest data-producing activities in science, yet current pipelines still treat compression as a storage and transmission tool rather than a new way to use data. We present a generative compression framework that learns from historical Earth observation archives and enables on-demand 100x to 10,000x data reduction across downstream tasks. Unlike general visual data, Earth observation repeatedly measures the same evolving planet, making historical-prior learning feasible for extreme compression. To realize this paradigm, we train large generative compression models at exascale on the LineShine Armv9 CPU supercomputer, with co-optimization across model design, kernels, memory hierarchy, runtime, and parallelism. Our implementation sustains 1.54 EFLOP/s and peaks at 2.16 EFLOP/s in end-to-end training. This work shows that historical-prior generative compression can turn Earth observation data into an active, task-adaptive foundation for acquisition, delivery, storage, and scientific use.

analysis.tldr: 利用历史先验的生成式压缩模型实现地球观测数据10000倍缩减，并在百亿亿次超算上高效训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球观测数据量巨大，但现有压缩方法仅作为存储/传输工具，未能充分利用数据特性实现任务自适应压缩。
analysis.problem: 如何利用地球观测数据重复测量同一行星的历史先验，实现极端压缩比（100x-10000x）并保持下游任务可用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 地球观测数据重复测量同一演化行星，使得历史先验学习可行，从而支持极端压缩。
analysis.method: 提出生成式压缩框架，利用历史地球观测档案学习先验，在LineShine Armv9 CPU超算上以百亿亿次规模训练，协同优化模型设计、内核、内存层次、运行时和并行性。
contributions: 提出基于历史先验的生成式压缩范式，实现100x-10000x数据缩减。
在百亿亿次超算上实现1.54 EFLOP/s持续性能、2.16 EFLOP/s峰值性能的端到端训练。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定超算架构，通用性待验证。
极端压缩下的下游任务精度损失未量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用历史先验的生成式压缩模型实现地球观测数据10000倍缩减，并在百亿亿次超算上高效训练。

papers.title: PARD-2: Target-Aligned Parallel Draft Model for Dual-Mode Speculative Decoding
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Models (LLMs) inference by using a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens that are verified in parallel by the target model. However, existing draft model training objectives are not directly aligned with the inference-time goal of maximizing consecutive token acceptance. To address this issue, we reformulate the draft model optimization objective, shifting the focus from token prediction accuracy to the overall acceptance length. In this paper, we build upon PARD to propose PARD-2, a dual-mode speculative decoding framework with Confidence-Adaptive Token (CAT) optimization. This approach adaptively reweights each token to better align with the verification process. Notably, PARD-2 enables a single draft model to support both target-dependent and target-independent modes. Experiments across diverse models and tasks demonstrate that PARD-2 achieves up to 6.94$\times$ lossless acceleration, surpassing EAGLE-3 by 1.9$\times$ and PARD by 1.3$\times$ on Llama3.1-8B. Our code is available at https://github.com/AMD-AGI/PARD.

analysis.tldr: PARD-2通过目标对齐的并行草稿模型训练和置信度自适应令牌优化，实现双模式投机解码，显著加速LLM推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 投机解码中草稿模型的训练目标与推理时最大化连续令牌接受率的目标不一致，导致加速效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计草稿模型的训练目标，使其直接对齐推理时最大化接受长度的目标，并支持双模式解码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有草稿模型训练仅关注令牌预测准确率，未直接优化接受长度，导致加速潜力未充分释放。
analysis.method: 提出PARD-2框架，包含置信度自适应令牌（CAT）优化，通过自适应重加权每个令牌以对齐验证过程，并支持目标依赖和目标独立双模式。
contributions: 重新定义草稿模型优化目标，从令牌预测准确率转向整体接受长度。
提出CAT优化方法，自适应调整令牌权重以对齐验证过程。
实现单一草稿模型支持双模式投机解码，提升灵活性和加速效果。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型和任务上实验，PARD-2在Llama3.1-8B上实现高达6.94倍无损加速，超过EAGLE-3 1.9倍、PARD 1.3倍。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件或框架实现双模式切换。
CAT优化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PARD-2通过目标对齐的并行草稿模型训练和置信度自适应令牌优化，实现双模式投机解码，显著加速LLM推理。

papers.title: DRNet: All-in-One Image Restoration via Prior-Guided Dynamic Reparameterization
papers.abstract: All-in-one image restoration aims to handle diverse degradations within a single model. However, existing methods often suffer from three key limitations: 1) per-input computational overhead from dynamic degradation estimation; 2) optimization challenges due to task heterogeneity; and 3) inefficient, frequency-agnostic encoder designs. To overcome these, we introduce the Dynamic Reparameterization Network (DRNet), a novel framework operating on an initialization-stage reconfiguration paradigm that fundamentally eliminates per-input overhead. At its core, a Dynamic Reparameterization MLP (DRMLP) guided by a Task-Specific Modulator (TSM), which effectively mitigates task heterogeneity by orchestrating both specific restoration goals and a versatile general-purpose mode within a unified architecture. Furthermore, we incorporate a Continuous Wavelet Transform Encoder (CWTE) that explicitly leverages frequency characteristics via wavelet decomposition for a lightweight yet powerful design. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DRNet achieves state-of-the-art performance across five restoration tasks with superior parameter efficiency. Crucially, it showcases unique flexibility, excelling as both a highly competitive foundation model for blind restoration and a top-performing user-guided specialist.

analysis.tldr: DRNet通过动态重参数化和小波变换编码器，在单一模型中高效处理多种图像恢复任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全合一图像恢复方法存在三个关键限制：每个输入都需要动态退化估计导致计算开销、任务异质性带来优化挑战、编码器设计低效且忽略频率特性。
analysis.problem: 如何在单一模型中高效处理多种图像退化类型，同时避免每输入计算开销并解决任务异质性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出动态重参数化网络（DRNet），核心包括：1）基于初始化阶段重配置的范式消除每输入开销；2）任务特定调制器（TSM）引导的动态重参数化MLP（DRMLP），协调特定恢复目标和通用模式；3）连续小波变换编码器（CWTE）利用小波分解显式利用频率特性。
contributions: 提出DRNet框架，通过初始化阶段重配置消除每输入计算开销。
设计DRMLP和TSM有效缓解任务异质性。
引入CWTE实现轻量且强大的频率感知编码。
analysis.experiments: 在五个恢复任务上达到最先进性能，参数效率优越，并展示了作为盲恢复基础模型和用户引导专家的灵活性。
limitations: 可能对极端退化类型泛化能力有限。
小波变换编码器可能不适用于所有退化类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DRNet通过动态重参数化和小波变换编码器，在单一模型中高效处理多种图像恢复任务。

papers.title: Reasoning-Aware Training for Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) excel at numerical forecasting but operate as black boxes lacking qualitative reasoning. Conversely, applying LLMs directly to temporal data introduces a modality gap: text tokenizers fragment continuous numerical values, degrading mathematical relationships and exploding sequence lengths, leading to computational overhead. To resolve this, we introduce STRIDE (Strategic Time-series Reasoning Injected via Distilled Embeddings), a novel framework natively integrating LLM reasoning into the continuous embedding space of TSFMs. Instead of discrete tokens, STRIDE distills reasoning traces into a lightweight LLM, dynamically projecting its mean-pooled hidden states as a cross-modal prior into the target numerical encoder. The architecture is jointly optimized using cross-entropy and quantile losses. Evaluations demonstrate STRIDE establishes state-of-the-art numerical forecasting on GIFT-Eval (0.674 MASE, 0.454 CRPS) compared to TSFMs and exhibits superior in-domain and out-of-domain numerical as well as reasoning performance on TFRBench. Specifically, STRIDE acts as a plug-and-play enhancement, consistently improving diverse TSFMs (e.g., Chronos-2, Timer-S1) across various LLM configurations. Thus, injecting semantic reasoning as a continuous prior equips TSFMs with human-interpretable reasoning while fundamentally improving predictive accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出STRIDE框架，通过蒸馏LLM推理嵌入到时间序列基础模型中，提升数值预测精度与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列基础模型缺乏定性推理能力，而直接应用LLM存在模态鸿沟（文本分词破坏数值连续性、序列过长导致计算开销），亟需一种融合LLM推理与TSFM连续嵌入空间的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入离散分词的前提下，将LLM的语义推理能力注入时间序列基础模型，同时提升数值预测准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: STRIDE框架：将推理轨迹蒸馏到轻量LLM中，将其平均池化隐藏状态作为跨模态先验动态投影到目标数值编码器，联合优化交叉熵和分位数损失。
contributions: 提出STRIDE，首个将LLM推理原生集成到TSFM连续嵌入空间的框架，避免模态鸿沟。
在GIFT-Eval和TFRBench上取得SOTA数值预测与推理性能，且可作为即插即用模块提升多种TSFM。
analysis.experiments: 在GIFT-Eval上MASE 0.674、CRPS 0.454，在TFRBench上域内和跨域数值及推理性能均优于基线，且STRIDE可提升Chronos-2、Timer-S1等模型。
limitations: 依赖预训练LLM的推理质量，可能受限于蒸馏数据。
跨模态投影机制可能引入额外计算开销，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STRIDE框架，通过蒸馏LLM推理嵌入到时间序列基础模型中，提升数值预测精度与可解释性。

papers.title: Beyond Toy Benchmarks: A Systematic Evaluation of OOD Detection Methods For Plant Pathology Classification
papers.abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for reliable deployment of deep learning systems, yet the majority of existing methods are evaluated on small, visually homogeneous benchmarks. In this work, we study six OOD detection methods spanning post-hoc scoring, auxiliary objectives, energy-based models, and constrained optimization on the Plant Pathology 2021 dataset, a fine-grained task with natural distribution shifts. Energy-based fine-tuning performs best across OOD settings, improving detection over the softmax baseline while preserving in-distribution accuracy. Analysis shows these gains stem from both a restructuring of the embedding space alongside calibration of the scoring function. We further document practical training instabilities that arise when scaling constrained optimization methods to moderate-sized datasets, findings that are largely absent from existing literature. Our results demonstrate that principled OOD detection is achievable on real-world domain-specific data and that benchmark evaluations alone may not capture the challenges that emerge in practice.

analysis.tldr: 在植物病理学分类任务上系统评估六种OOD检测方法，发现基于能量的微调效果最佳，并揭示了实际部署中的训练不稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测方法大多在小型、视觉同质的基准上评估，缺乏在真实世界、细粒度且存在自然分布漂移的任务上的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 评估不同OOD检测方法在植物病理学分类这一实际应用中的有效性，并分析其性能来源和实际部署中的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于能量的微调在保持分布内精度的同时提高了OOD检测性能，其增益源于嵌入空间重构和评分函数校准；约束优化方法在中等规模数据集上存在训练不稳定性。
analysis.method: 在Plant Pathology 2021数据集上比较六种OOD检测方法，包括后验评分、辅助目标、能量模型和约束优化，并分析能量微调的性能来源。
contributions: 系统评估了六种OOD检测方法在植物病理学分类任务上的表现，发现能量微调最优。
揭示了能量微调性能提升的机制：嵌入空间重构和评分函数校准。
记录了约束优化方法在中等规模数据集上的训练不稳定性，填补了文献空白。
analysis.experiments: 在Plant Pathology 2021数据集上评估六种OOD检测方法，报告了能量微调在OOD设置下的最佳性能，并分析了训练不稳定性。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上评估，泛化性有待验证。
未涉及更复杂的OOD场景（如多源分布漂移）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在植物病理学分类任务上系统评估六种OOD检测方法，发现基于能量的微调效果最佳，并揭示了实际部署中的训练不稳定性。

papers.title: DiagnosticIQ: A Benchmark for LLM-Based Industrial Maintenance Action Recommendation from Symbolic Rules
papers.abstract: Monitoring complex industrial assets relies on engineer-authored symbolic rules that trigger based on sensor conditions and prompt technicians to perform corrective actions. The bottleneck is not detection but response: translating rules into maintenance steps requires asset-specific knowledge gained through years of practice. We investigate whether LLMs can serve as decision support for this rule-to-action step and introduce \ours{}, a benchmark of 6{,}690 expert-validated multiple-choice questions from 118 rule-action pairs across 16 asset types. We contribute (i) a symbolic-to-MCQA pipeline normalizing rules to Disjunctive Normal Form with embedding-based distractor sampling, (ii) five variants probing distinct failure modes (Pro, Pert, Verbose, Aug, Rationale), and (iii) a benchmark of 29 LLMs and 4 embedding baselines. A human evaluation (9 practitioners, mean 45.0\%) confirms \ours{} requires specialist knowledge beyond operational experience. Three findings stand out. The frontier has closed: the top three LLMs lie within one Macro point, with Bradley-Terry Elo placing claude-opus-4-6 30 points above the next model. Yet \ours{}\,Pro exposes brittleness, with every model losing 13--60\% relative accuracy under distractor expansion. \ours{}\,Aug exposes pattern-matching: under condition inversion, frontier models still select the original answer 49--63\% of the time. The deployment bottleneck is not capability but calibration: frontier models handle template-style fault detection but break under structural perturbation.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DiagnosticIQ 基准，评估 LLM 从符号规则推理工业维护动作的能力，发现前沿模型在结构扰动下表现脆弱且存在模式匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业资产监控依赖工程师编写的符号规则，但将规则转化为维护步骤需要多年积累的资产特定知识，成为瓶颈。LLM 能否辅助这一决策过程值得研究。
analysis.problem: 评估 LLM 从符号规则推理出正确维护动作的能力，并揭示其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型在标准设置下表现接近，但在干扰项扩展下相对准确率下降13-60%；条件反转时前沿模型仍以49-63%概率选择原答案，暴露模式匹配问题。
analysis.method: 构建包含6690道专家验证多选题的基准，设计符号到MCQA的流水线（将规则归一化为析取范式，基于嵌入采样干扰项），并开发五种变体（Pro、Pert、Verbose、Aug、Rationale）探测不同失败模式。
contributions: 提出 DiagnosticIQ 基准，包含118个规则-动作对、6690道专家验证的多选题，覆盖16种资产类型。
设计符号到MCQA的流水线及五种变体，系统探测LLM在工业维护动作推荐中的脆弱性。
对29个LLM和4个嵌入基线进行评测，揭示前沿模型在结构扰动下的模式匹配和校准问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖16种资产类型，可能无法代表所有工业场景。
五种变体可能未涵盖所有可能的失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 DiagnosticIQ 基准，评估 LLM 从符号规则推理工业维护动作的能力，发现前沿模型在结构扰动下表现脆弱且存在模式匹配问题。

papers.title: Generalization Bounds of Emergent Communications for Agentic AI Networking
papers.abstract: The evolution of 6G networking toward agentic AI networking (AgentNet) systems requires a shift from traditional data pipelines to task-aware, agentic AI-native communication solutions. Emergent communication, a novel communication paradigm in which autonomous agents learn their own signaling protocols through interaction, is increasingly viewed as a promising solution to address the challenges posed by existing rigid, predefined protocol-based networking architecture. However, most existing emergent communication frameworks fail to account for physical networking constraints, such as bandwidth and computational complexity, and often lack a rigorous information-theoretical foundation. To address these challenges, this paper introduces a novel emergent communication framework that facilitates collaborative task-solving among heterogeneous agents through an information-theoretic lens. We propose a novel joint loss function that unifies the optimization of decision-making functions and the learning of communication signaling. Our proposed solution is grounded on the multi-agent and multi-task distributed information bottleneck (DIB) theory, which allows the quantification of the fundamental trade-off between task-relevant information representation and computational complexity. We further provide theoretical generalization bounds of the emergent communication protocol during decentralized inference across unseen environmental states. Experimental validation on a real-world hardware prototype confirms that our proposed framework significantly improves generalization performance, compared to the state-of-the-art solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于信息瓶颈理论的涌现通信框架，为智能体网络提供泛化界，并在硬件原型上验证了性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 6G向智能体网络演进需要任务感知的通信方案，现有刚性协议架构难以适应，而涌现通信虽具潜力但缺乏物理约束和理论基础。
analysis.problem: 现有涌现通信框架未考虑带宽、计算复杂度等物理网络约束，且缺乏严格的信息论基础，导致泛化性能不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出联合损失函数统一优化决策函数与通信信号学习，基于多智能体多任务分布式信息瓶颈理论量化任务相关信息与计算复杂度的权衡，并推导出涌现通信协议在未见环境状态下的泛化界。
contributions: 提出首个考虑物理网络约束的涌现通信框架，融合信息瓶颈理论。
推导了涌现通信协议在分布式推理中的理论泛化界。
在真实硬件原型上验证了框架相比现有方法的泛化性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在真实硬件原型上进行了实验验证，与最先进方法对比，泛化性能显著提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的智能体网络场景。
理论泛化界可能依赖于较强的假设条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于信息瓶颈理论的涌现通信框架，为智能体网络提供泛化界，并在硬件原型上验证了性能提升。

papers.title: The Echo Amplifies the Knowledge: Somatic Marker Analogues in Language Models via Emotion Vector Re-Injection
papers.abstract: Current language model memory systems store what happened but not how it felt. This distinction -- between semantic memory (knowing about a past event) and episodic memory (re-experiencing it) -- was identified by Tulving as the difference between noetic and autonoetic consciousness. Damasio demonstrated that humans with intact knowledge but absent emotional markers exhibit impaired decision-making. We bridge this gap for language models. Using Gemma 3 1B-IT with pretrained Gemma Scope 2 sparse autoencoders, we identify 310 emotion-exclusive features at layer 22 with psychologically valid geometry. We construct distinctive-feature emotion vectors during experience and partially re-inject them during recall, triggered by context similarity at layer 7. We test four conditions paralleling Damasio's framework: A (no memory), B (semantic labels), C (emotion echo), and BC (semantic + echo). For emotional orientation, the echo alone steepens the threat-safety gradient: the regression slope of threat rating on contextual similarity is 0.80 for C vs 0.56 for A ($p$=0.011, permutation test). For decisions, the echo amplifies knowledge into action: BC=80% good choices vs B=52% ($z$=+2.60, $p$<0.01), while the echo alone has no effect (C=22%, n.s.). The echo changes how the model feels independently, but changes what it does only when combined with knowledge -- replicating Damasio's core finding. The echo amplifies knowledge. It does not replace it.

analysis.tldr: 通过情感向量再注入，语言模型在决策中复现了Damasio的躯体标记假说：情感回响放大知识，但不替代知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前语言模型记忆系统只存储事件内容（语义记忆），不存储情感体验（情景记忆），而人类研究表明情感标记对决策至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型在回忆时重新体验过去的情感，从而改善决策能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 情感回响单独改变情感感知（威胁-安全梯度变陡），但只有与语义知识结合时才提升决策正确率，复现了Damasio的躯体标记假说。
analysis.method: 在Gemma 3 1B-IT模型上，利用Gemma Scope 2稀疏自编码器在层22识别310个情感专属特征，构建情感向量；在回忆时通过层7的上下文相似度触发部分情感向量再注入。
contributions: 首次在语言模型中实现情感回响机制，模拟情景记忆的情感成分。
通过实验复现Damasio的躯体标记假说：情感回响放大知识而非替代知识。
analysis.experiments: 在情感定向和决策任务上测试四种条件（无记忆、语义标签、情感回响、语义+回响），使用置换检验和z检验验证显著性。
limitations: 仅使用单一模型（Gemma 3 1B-IT）和特定稀疏自编码器，泛化性未知。
情感特征识别依赖预训练自编码器，可能遗漏其他情感相关特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过情感向量再注入，语言模型在决策中复现了Damasio的躯体标记假说：情感回响放大知识，但不替代知识。

papers.title: Egocentric Whole-Body Human Mesh Recovery with Prior-Guided Learning
papers.abstract: Egocentric human mesh recovery (HMR) from monocular head-mounted cameras is increasingly important for AR/VR applications, but remains challenging due to the lack of reliable ground-truth (GT) annotations based on parametric human body models such as SMPL and SMPL-X for real egocentric images. Existing egocentric HMR methods typically rely on pseudo-GT and focus on body pose estimation, which limits their ability to recover fine-grained whole-body details such as hands and face. We study egocentric whole-body human mesh recovery and propose a prior-guided learning framework that reconstructs whole-body meshes from a single egocentric image. We construct more accurate optimization-based pseudo-GT aligned with 3D joint supervision, and leverage multiple priors by adapting an exocentric HMR foundation model together with a diffusion-based pose prior. A deterministic undistortion module is further adopted to handle fisheye distortions in egocentric images. Experiments across multiple egocentric benchmarks demonstrate improved whole-body reconstruction compared to state-of-the-art methods, and show that our optimization-based pseudo-GT is substantially more accurate than existing regression-based pseudo-GT. To facilitate reproducibility, the code and dataset annotations are publicly available at https://github.com/naso06/EgoSMPLX.

analysis.tldr: 提出先验引导学习框架，利用优化伪标签和外中心模型先验，从单目头戴相机图像恢复全身人体网格。
analysis.research_motivation: AR/VR应用需要从头戴相机恢复全身人体网格，但真实鱼眼图像缺乏SMPL/SMPL-X标注，现有方法依赖回归伪标签且只关注身体姿态，无法恢复手脸细节。
analysis.problem: 从单目头戴相机图像中恢复包含手和脸的全身人体网格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有回归伪标签精度不足，限制全身细节恢复；外中心模型直接迁移到内中心图像效果差。
analysis.method: 先验引导学习框架：1) 构建基于优化的伪标签，与3D关节监督对齐；2) 适配外中心HMR基础模型和扩散姿态先验；3) 使用确定性去畸变模块处理鱼眼失真。
contributions: 提出首个针对内中心全身人体网格恢复的先验引导学习框架
构建更准确的基于优化的伪标签，优于现有回归伪标签
在多个内中心基准上实现全身重建性能提升，并开源代码和标注
analysis.experiments: 在多个内中心基准上与SOTA方法对比，全身重建效果提升，且优化伪标签准确性显著优于回归伪标签。
limitations: 可能依赖外中心模型先验的泛化能力
优化伪标签计算成本较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出先验引导学习框架，利用优化伪标签和外中心模型先验，从单目头戴相机图像恢复全身人体网格。

papers.title: Lattice Deduction Transformers
papers.abstract: We introduce the Lattice Deduction Transformer (LDT), a recurrent transformer that approximates logically sound deduction by projecting its latent state through a lattice between forward passes. We train on-policy in a process that mirrors deduction in a search-based constraint solver and supervise training via a domain-agnostic, abstract-interpretation-based approximation of the set of solution candidates. An $800$K-parameter LDT achieves $100\%$ accuracy on Sudoku-Extreme and Snowflake Sudoku, at a fraction of the training cost of prior small recurrent reasoners, while remaining empirically sound: the model returns a correct answer or abstains. A $1.8$M-parameter variant reaches $99.9\%$ accuracy on Maze-Hard. Frontier LLMs score $0\%$ on all three benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Lattice Deduction Transformer，通过格投影实现逻辑推理，在数独和迷宫任务上以极小参数达到高准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经推理器在逻辑严密任务上表现不佳，且大型语言模型在约束求解基准上得分为0%，亟需一种高效、可验证的推理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个参数高效且逻辑可靠的神经网络模型，用于解决约束满足问题（如数独、迷宫）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LDT是一种循环Transformer，在每次前向传播之间通过格（lattice）投影其潜在状态，以近似逻辑演绎；采用基于抽象解释的候选解集近似进行在线策略训练。
contributions: 提出LDT架构，结合格投影与循环Transformer实现逻辑推理
在Sudoku-Extreme、Snowflake Sudoku和Maze-Hard上以极小参数达到接近100%准确率，且训练成本远低于先前方法
analysis.experiments: 在Sudoku-Extreme、Snowflake Sudoku和Maze-Hard三个基准上测试，800K参数LDT在数独任务上准确率100%，1.8M参数变体在Maze-Hard上准确率99.9%，而前沿LLM得分为0%。
limitations: 仅验证了约束满足问题，未在更广泛的逻辑推理任务上测试
模型规模较小，可能无法处理更复杂的推理场景
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Lattice Deduction Transformer，通过格投影实现逻辑推理，在数独和迷宫任务上以极小参数达到高准确率。

papers.title: What Will Happen Next: Large Models-Driven Deduction for Emergency Instances
papers.abstract: Traditional simulation methods reproduce occurred emergency instances through presetting to assist people in risk assessment and emergency decision-making. However, due to the lack of randomness and diversity, existing simulation systems struggle to fully explore the potential risk as emergency instances are scarce. In contrast, Large Models (LMs) can dynamically adjust generation strategies to introduce controllable randomness, while also possessing extensive prior knowledge and cross-domain knowledge transfer capabilities. Inspired by it, we propose the LMs-driven World Line Divergence System (WLDS), which enables diversified visualization and deduction of emergency instances in different domains. WLDS leverages LMs to deduce emergency instances in various development directions, and introduces the factual calibration and logical calibration mechanism to ensure factual accuracy and logical rigor during the deduction process. The interactive module can independently select deduction directions to avoid potential hallucinations that are difficult for the system to identify.
