Furthermore, by introducing the visualization module, WLDS forms simulation and deduction that combine text and images, which enhances interpretability. Extensive experiments conducted on the proposed Emergency Instances Deduction (EID) benchmark dataset demonstrate that WLDS achieves high-precision and high-fidelity simulation and deduction of emergency instances in multiple specific domains. Relevant experiments further demonstrate that WLDS can generate more emergency instances deduction data for users and provide support for better decision-making in similar emergency instances in the future.

analysis.tldr: 提出大模型驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），用于应急实例的多样化推演与可视化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统应急模拟方法缺乏随机性和多样性，难以充分探索潜在风险，而大模型具备可控随机性和跨领域知识迁移能力，可弥补这一不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大模型对稀缺的应急实例进行高精度、高保真的多样化推演与可视化，以辅助风险评估和决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LMs驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），利用大模型推演应急实例的多种发展方向，引入事实校准和逻辑校准机制确保准确性和逻辑严谨性，交互模块独立选择推演方向以避免幻觉，可视化模块结合文本和图像增强可解释性。
contributions: 提出WLDS系统，实现大模型驱动的应急实例多样化推演与可视化。
引入事实校准和逻辑校准机制，提升推演过程的准确性和逻辑性。
构建应急实例推演（EID）基准数据集，并验证WLDS在多个特定领域的高精度和高保真推演能力。
analysis.experiments: 在提出的EID基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，表明WLDS在多个特定领域实现了高精度和高保真的模拟推演，并能生成更多推演数据以支持决策。
limitations: 可能依赖大模型的固有偏见和知识边界。
交互模块的独立选择机制可能无法完全消除所有幻觉。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大模型驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），用于应急实例的多样化推演与可视化。

papers.title: Cross-Modal RGB-D Fusion Transformer for 6D Pose Estimation of Non-Cooperative Spacecraft with Stereo-Derived Depth
papers.abstract: On-orbit servicing and active debris removal involving non-cooperative spacecraft require reliable pose estimation to supply accurate position and orientation data for autonomous visual navigation. Learning-based monocular methods have seen widespread adoption in spacecraft pose estimation, yet they suffer from an intrinsic depth ambiguity problem and tend to fail under the harsh illumination conditions routinely encountered in orbit. Active depth sensors could in principle address the geometric ambiguity, but their power and mass requirements make them poorly suited to most spacecraft platforms. This work addresses these issues through a passive stereo vision framework for six-degree-of-freedom (6-DOF) pose estimation of non-cooperative spacecraft. A binocular stereo matching network called TSCA-Stereo is developed to cope with weak-texture surfaces, specular highlights, and severe lighting variations typical of space imagery. A cross-modal fusion Transformer is introduced to combine RGB appearance information with stereo depth features in an adaptive manner, supporting reliable pose recovery. A synthetic binocular multimodal dataset is also built for the experiments, covering stereo disparity maps and 6-DOF pose annotations across a range of illumination scenarios, attitude configurations, and noise levels. Experimental results show that TSCA-Stereo outperforms the baseline across every evaluated metric on this space-specific dataset. The full pose estimation pipeline achieves a mean translation error of 0.0419 m and a mean orientation error of 0.8632° under varied imaging conditions, confirming that the passive stereo approach is both effective and resilient when operating under the demanding visual conditions of the space environment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种跨模态RGB-D融合Transformer，通过被动立体视觉实现非合作航天器的6D姿态估计，在合成数据集上达到低误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 非合作航天器的在轨服务和主动碎片清除需要可靠的姿态估计，但单目方法存在深度模糊且易受轨道恶劣光照影响，而主动深度传感器功耗和质量不适合航天器平台。
analysis.problem: 解决非合作航天器在弱纹理、高光、光照变化等空间环境下，基于被动立体视觉的6D姿态估计问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TSCA-Stereo双目立体匹配网络处理弱纹理和高光，并设计跨模态融合Transformer自适应融合RGB外观与立体深度特征，实现姿态恢复。
contributions: 提出TSCA-Stereo立体匹配网络，应对空间图像弱纹理、高光和光照变化。
设计跨模态融合Transformer，自适应融合RGB和深度特征。
构建合成双目多模态数据集，包含视差图和6D姿态标注。
analysis.experiments: 在自建合成空间数据集上，TSCA-Stereo在所有指标上优于基线；完整姿态估计管线平均平移误差0.0419 m，平均方向误差0.8632°。
limitations: 依赖合成数据集，真实空间场景泛化性未知。
立体匹配计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种跨模态RGB-D融合Transformer，通过被动立体视觉实现非合作航天器的6D姿态估计，在合成数据集上达到低误差。

papers.title: Causal Stories from Sensor Traces: Auditing Epistemic Overreach in LLM-Generated Personal Sensing Explanations
papers.abstract: LLMs are increasingly used to explain personal sensing data, translating traces of activity and mood into natural-language accounts of why an anomalous day may have occurred. However, such explanations can sound coherent and personally meaningful even when the underlying evidence is sparse or missing. We introduce epistemic overreach (EO) as a measure for cases where a generated explanation implies more than the available sensing evidence can justify. To audit how often and in what forms EO occurs, we obtained anomalous-day scenarios from three longitudinal sensing datasets of college students: StudentLife, GLOBEM, and CollegeExperience. Across activity, sleep, and affect anomalies, we generated 14,922 explanations using three LLM families -- Llama, Qwen, and GPT -- under two prompting conditions: one minimally constrained prompt and another prompt explicitly instructing models to bound claims to the data. For each scenario, we varied the amount of behavioral evidence available to the model to examine whether more evidence reduces EO. We evaluated each explanation using a structured rubric, decomposing EO into the dimensions of unsupported causal attribution, unacknowledged data gaps, overconfident language, temporal inconsistency, and diagnostic inference. We find that LLMs routinely attribute anomalous days to causes without sufficient support from the data, and that this pattern replicates across datasets, anomaly types, and model families. Further, providing richer context does not reliably reduce EO; bounded prompting helps but does not eliminate it. These findings suggest that evidential grounding should be a first-order evaluation criterion for LLM-generated personal sensing explanations, alongside fluency and plausibility. We argue that personal sensing explanations require evidential discipline: systems must distinguish what is observed, what is inferred, and what remains unknown.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的个人感知解释常超出证据支持，提出“认知越界”概念并系统审计其表现形式。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被用于解释个人感知数据（如活动、情绪），但生成的解释可能听起来合理却缺乏证据支持，这种误导性在健康、心理等敏感领域可能造成严重后果，现有评估多关注流畅性而忽视证据基础。
analysis.problem: 量化并审计LLM在生成个人感知解释时超出可用传感证据的认知越界（EO）现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM生成的解释普遍存在无充分数据支持的因果归因、未承认数据缺口、过度自信语言、时间不一致和诊断性推断，且增加证据量不能可靠减少EO，约束提示有帮助但无法消除。
analysis.method: 定义认知越界（EO）的五维度评估框架（无支持因果归因、未承认数据缺口、过度自信语言、时间不一致、诊断性推断），从三个纵向数据集获取异常日场景，使用三种LLM家族（Llama、Qwen、GPT）在两种提示条件下生成14,922个解释，并系统评估EO。
contributions: 提出认知越界（EO）概念，用于评估LLM生成解释的证据充分性。
构建五维度评估框架并系统审计多个数据集、异常类型和模型家族中的EO现象。
发现增加证据量不能可靠减少EO，约束提示有帮助但无法消除，强调证据基础应作为首要评估标准。
analysis.experiments: 在StudentLife、GLOBEM和CollegeExperience三个纵向感知数据集上，针对活动、睡眠和情绪异常，使用Llama、Qwen、GPT三种模型在两种提示条件下生成14,922个解释，并通过结构化评分表评估EO。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅基于三个大学生数据集，可能限制泛化性。
EO评估依赖人工设计的评分表，可能存在主观性。
未探索模型规模或训练数据对EO的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的个人感知解释常超出证据支持，提出“认知越界”概念并系统审计其表现形式。

papers.title: S2FT: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning in Sparse Spectrum Domain
papers.abstract: Parameter Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) is a key technique for adapting a large pretrained model to downstream tasks by fine-tuning only a small number of parameters. Recent methods based on Fourier transforms have further reduced the fine-tuned parameters scale by only fine-tuning a few spectral coefficients. Its basic assumption is that the weight change δW is a spatial-domain matrix with a sparse spectrum. However, in this paper, we observe that the spectrum of weight change is not sparse, but instead distributed like power-uniform. This fact implies that fine-tuning only a few spectral coefficients is insufficient to accurately model the weight change with uniform spectrum. To address this issue, we propose to seek an invertible transformation that can transform a latent spatial-domain matrix with sparse spectrum to the weight change, and then perform PEFT on such sparse spectrum domain with few spectral coefficients, called S2FT. To seek such transformation, we first pre-estimate a coarse weight change as a prior. Then, inspired by that sparse spectrum often correspond to locally smooth spatial structures, we regard this transformation as a row and column rearrangement operation on the pre-estimated weight change that smooth spatial structures while keep the structure information of neurons. Finally, we propose to solve the rearrangement search problem in a simple nearest neighbor search manner, thereby obtaining the invertible transformation. Extensive results show our S2FT achieves superior performance by only using 0.08% training parameters.

analysis.tldr: 提出S2FT，通过重排操作将权重变化变换到稀疏谱域，仅用0.08%参数实现高效微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于傅里叶变换的PEFT方法假设权重变化具有稀疏谱，但实际观察发现谱分布均匀，导致仅微调少量谱系数无法准确建模权重变化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可逆变换，使得变换后的权重变化具有稀疏谱，从而仅用少量谱系数进行高效微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到权重变化的谱并非稀疏，而是呈功率均匀分布，说明现有稀疏谱假设不成立。
analysis.method: 先预估计粗粒度权重变化作为先验，然后通过行和列重排操作（以最近邻搜索方式求解）将预估计权重变化变换为局部平滑结构，从而在稀疏谱域进行微调。
contributions: 揭示了现有傅里叶PEFT方法中谱稀疏假设与实际分布不符的问题。
提出S2FT方法，通过可逆重排变换实现稀疏谱域微调，仅用0.08%参数达到优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及广泛实验表明仅用0.08%训练参数即取得优越性能。
limitations: 重排变换的求解依赖最近邻搜索，可能在大规模参数下计算开销较大。
方法有效性可能依赖于预估计权重变化的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出S2FT，通过重排操作将权重变化变换到稀疏谱域，仅用0.08%参数实现高效微调。

papers.title: Kaczmarz Linear Attention
papers.abstract: Long-context language modeling remains central to modern sequence modeling, but the quadratic cost of Transformer attention makes scaling computationally prohibitive. Linear recurrent models address this bottleneck by compressing the context into a fixed-size state, making the rule that forgets, writes, and edits information a central design problem. To address state maintenance, Gated DeltaNet (GDN) combines gated state decay with delta-rule residual writes, using a learnable coefficient to balance forgetting and update magnitude. However, this coefficient is learned empirically rather than derived from the underlying objective, which can lead to suboptimal update magnitudes. We revisit the online-regression objective underlying GDN and, inspired by the Kaczmarz projection method, derive the key-norm-normalized dynamic step size $β_t = η_t / (\|k_t\|_2^2 + ε)$ for residual updates. We propose Kaczmarz Linear Attention (KLA), a one-scalar modification of GDN that preserves the state shape, gates, linear recurrence, and chunkwise parallel algorithm. At the 0.4B scale with a 1B-token budget, KLA achieves the lowest validation perplexity among evaluated linear-time baselines, 8.09 versus 8.50 for GDN, and remains stable up to 65K tokens. On controlled tasks, KLA reaches 100% on single-needle-in-a-haystack retrieval, improves 8x multi-query associative recall by 7.03 points over GDN, and delivers 2.1x higher decode throughput at 32K context. These results suggest that the key-norm-normalized Kaczmarz coefficient is a first-order design axis for delta-rule sequence models: it improves accuracy, extrapolation, and decoding efficiency without changing the recurrent state or hardware kernel.

analysis.tldr: 提出Kaczmarz线性注意力，通过键范数归一化步长改进Delta规则，在长上下文语言建模中超越Gated DeltaNet。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer注意力二次复杂度限制长上下文扩展，线性循环模型通过固定大小状态压缩上下文，但状态维护规则（遗忘、写入、编辑）的设计是关键瓶颈。
analysis.problem: Gated DeltaNet中可学习遗忘系数是经验性的而非基于目标推导，导致更新幅度次优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Gated DeltaNet的遗忘系数学习可能产生次优更新幅度，而基于Kaczmarz投影方法推导的键范数归一化步长能更有效地平衡遗忘与更新。
analysis.method: 基于在线回归目标，受Kaczmarz投影法启发，推导出键范数归一化动态步长β_t = η_t / (||k_t||_2^2 + ε)用于残差更新，提出Kaczmarz线性注意力（KLA），仅修改Gated DeltaNet的一个标量。
contributions: 从在线回归目标出发，利用Kaczmarz投影法推导出键范数归一化步长，为Delta规则序列模型提供理论指导。
提出KLA，仅修改一个标量即提升长上下文建模性能，保持状态形状、门控、线性递归和分块并行算法。
analysis.experiments: 在0.4B参数、1B token预算下，KLA验证困惑度8.09（GDN为8.50），稳定支持65K token；单针检索100%，多查询关联召回提升7.03点，32K上下文解码吞吐量提升2.1倍。
limitations: 实验规模较小（0.4B参数），更大规模效果未知。
仅验证了语言建模任务，其他模态或任务泛化性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Kaczmarz线性注意力，通过键范数归一化步长改进Delta规则，在长上下文语言建模中超越Gated DeltaNet。

papers.title: PromptDx: Differentiable Prompt Tuning for Multimodal In-Context Alzheimer's Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Deep learning models in medical imaging typically operate as parametric memory, diagnosing patients by recalling fixed knowledge learned during training. This contrasts sharply with clinical practice, where physicians employ analogical reasoning to diagnose new cases by referencing similar records from past exemplars. While In-Context Learning (ICL) frameworks such as Tabular Prior-Fitted Networks (TabPFN) offer a promising diagnosis-by-reference paradigm, they are designed with tabular-specific inductive priors and rely on non-differentiable preprocessing pipelines, leading to manifold mismatch and gradient fracture when applied to heterogeneous multimodal data. To address these limitations, we propose PromptDx, a novel diagnosis-by-reference framework that leverages a pre-trained TabPFN as an ICL engine while enabling seamless integration with multimodal representations. Our core contribution is a Differentiable Prompt Tuning (DPT) mechanism that aligns a Masked Multimodal Modeling module with the pre-trained ICL engine. By training a lightweight adapter as a differentiable surrogate for the engine's non-differentiable preprocessors, we enable an end-to-end optimization of multimodal prompts within the ICL paradigm. We validate our method on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset using 3D MRI and tabular biomarkers. Experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms traditional parametric baselines. Notably, our method achieves superior performance using only 1% context samples compared to 30% in standard ICL, demonstrating exceptional manifold condensation ability. We further validate the generalizability of our DPT framework across six tabular datasets with diverse scales. Overall, our method offers a more data-efficient and clinically aligned paradigm for Alzheimer's Disease diagnosis.

analysis.tldr: 提出PromptDx，通过可微分提示调优将TabPFN与多模态表示对齐，实现高效阿尔茨海默病诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学影像深度学习模型依赖参数记忆，与临床医生通过类比推理诊断的方式不符；而现有上下文学习框架（如TabPFN）针对表格数据设计，无法直接处理异质多模态数据。
analysis.problem: 如何将基于表格的上下文学习框架（TabPFN）扩展到多模态医学数据（如3D MRI和表格生物标志物），实现端到端可微的诊断范式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PromptDx框架，包含可微分提示调优（DPT）机制：训练轻量适配器作为TabPFN引擎不可微预处理器的可微替代，结合掩码多模态建模模块，实现多模态提示的端到端优化。
contributions: 提出PromptDx，首个将TabPFN与多模态表示无缝集成的诊断框架。
设计可微分提示调优（DPT）机制，解决非可微预处理导致的流形不匹配和梯度断裂问题。
在ADNI数据集上仅用1%上下文样本即超越传统参数化基线，并在六个表格数据集上验证了泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI数据集（3D MRI和表格生物标志物）上验证，并与传统参数化基线比较；同时在六个不同规模的表格数据集上验证DPT框架的泛化性。
limitations: 仅针对阿尔茨海默病验证，其他疾病适用性未知。
依赖预训练TabPFN，可能受限于其表格先验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PromptDx，通过可微分提示调优将TabPFN与多模态表示对齐，实现高效阿尔茨海默病诊断。

papers.title: Slipstream: Trajectory-Grounded Compaction Validation for Long-Horizon Agents
papers.abstract: To cope with the large contexts that long-horizon LLM agents produce, modern frameworks increasingly rely on compaction -- invoking an LLM to rewrite the accumulated trajectory into a shorter summary that the agent resumes from. Today, compaction runs synchronously on the critical path of agent execution but this can unpredictably degrade accuracy due to a structural validation gap: the compactor must condense context but is fundamentally unaware of precisely what information the agent will need later. Further, because post-compaction agent steps are conditioned on the new summary, targeted validation criteria do not exist and errors silently propagate through coherent but incorrect behavior. Our key insight is that asynchronous compaction efficiently addresses this gap: by running the compactor in parallel with continued agent execution on the original context, the candidate summary and the agent's next steps are generated independently from the same pre-compaction state, yielding a validation signal independent of the summary itself. We build Slipstream, a trajectory-grounded compaction system that uses a judge to validate the candidate summary against the agent's continued reasoning, checking that it preserves both the agent's forward intent and the key facts and constraints it depends on. Across long-horizon coding (SWE-bench Verified) and web-browsing (BrowseComp) workloads, Slipstream improves task accuracy by up to 8.8 percentage points while reducing end-to-end latency by up to 39.7%.

analysis.tldr: 提出异步压缩验证方法Slipstream，通过并行执行压缩与Agent推理来提升长程任务准确率并降低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 长程LLM Agent依赖轨迹压缩来管理上下文，但同步压缩存在结构性验证缺口：压缩器不知道Agent后续需要什么信息，导致错误无声传播。
analysis.problem: 解决长程Agent轨迹压缩中的验证缺口问题，即压缩器无法感知Agent未来需求，压缩后错误会通过看似合理的行为传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同步压缩在Agent执行的关键路径上运行，压缩器对Agent后续所需信息一无所知，导致压缩后错误无声传播。
analysis.method: 提出异步压缩系统Slipstream，将压缩器与Agent继续执行并行化，从同一预压缩状态独立生成候选摘要和Agent后续步骤，然后使用法官验证候选摘要是否保留Agent的前向意图和关键事实约束。
contributions: 识别了长程Agent轨迹压缩中的结构性验证缺口问题
提出异步压缩范式，利用并行执行生成独立验证信号
构建Slipstream系统，通过法官验证实现轨迹接地压缩
analysis.experiments: 在长程编码（SWE-bench Verified）和网页浏览（BrowseComp）任务上，Slipstream将任务准确率提升高达8.8个百分点，端到端延迟降低高达39.7%。
limitations: 依赖法官模型的质量，可能引入额外开销
异步并行执行可能增加计算资源消耗
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异步压缩验证方法Slipstream，通过并行执行压缩与Agent推理来提升长程任务准确率并降低延迟。

papers.title: Probing the Impact of Scale on Data-Efficient, Generalist Transformer World Models for Atari
papers.abstract: Developing generalist systems that retain human-like data efficiency is a central challenge. While world models (WMs) offer a promising path, existing research often conflates architectural mechanisms with the independent impact of model \emph{scale}. In this work, we use a minimalist transformer world model to analyze scaling behaviors on the Atari 100k benchmark, using fixed offline datasets derived from a presupposed expert policy. Our results reveal that environments fundamentally fall into distinct scaling regimes, even when constrained by identical offline data budgets and model capacities. For individual tasks, some environments naturally allow models to pass the interpolation threshold, yielding monotonic improvements in the overparameterized regime, while others remain trapped in the classical regime, where larger world models degrade fidelity. In the unified setting, i.e., a single transformer trained on a suite of 26 Atari environments, we uncover that joint training stabilizes scaling dynamics, ensuring monotonic gains across all environments, regardless of their distinct inherent scaling regimes. Finally, we demonstrate that improved fidelity translates directly to downstream control, with policies learned entirely within the simulated dynamics achieving a median expert-random-normalized score of 0.770. Our findings suggest that future progress lies as much in precise scaling strategies as in architectural innovation.

analysis.tldr: 在Atari 100k基准上，使用最小Transformer世界模型发现环境存在不同缩放机制，联合训练可稳定缩放动态并提升下游控制性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型研究常混淆架构机制与模型规模的独立影响，缺乏对缩放行为的系统分析，而理解缩放规律对构建数据高效的通才系统至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究在固定离线数据集和模型容量下，Transformer世界模型的缩放行为如何受环境特性影响，以及联合训练能否改善缩放动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：单个任务中，部分环境在过参数化区域呈现单调改进（通过插值阈值），而其他环境则陷入经典区域（更大模型降低保真度）；联合训练稳定了缩放动态，确保所有环境单调增益。
analysis.method: 使用最小Transformer世界模型，在Atari 100k基准上基于预设专家策略的固定离线数据集进行缩放行为分析，包括单个任务和联合训练设置。
contributions: 揭示了环境在缩放行为上存在根本不同的机制（插值阈值 vs. 经典区域），即使数据预算和模型容量相同。
发现联合训练可稳定缩放动态，使所有环境实现单调增益，并证明改进的保真度直接转化为下游控制性能（中位专家-随机归一化得分0.770）。
analysis.experiments: 在Atari 100k基准上，使用26个Atari环境的固定离线数据集，评估单个任务和联合训练下的缩放行为，并测试下游控制性能。摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: 仅基于Atari 100k基准，可能无法推广到其他领域或更大规模数据。
使用预设专家策略的离线数据集，未探索在线数据或不同数据质量的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在Atari 100k基准上，使用最小Transformer世界模型发现环境存在不同缩放机制，联合训练可稳定缩放动态并提升下游控制性能。

papers.title: Improving Generative Adversarial Networks with Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: In modern GANs, maintaining an Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of the generator's weights is a standard practice, as such an averaged model consistently outperforms the actively trained generator. However, the EMA generator is used for final deployment only and does not influence the training process. To address this missed opportunity, we introduce Self-Distilled GAN (SD-GAN) that employs the EMA generator as a teacher to guide the active generator (student) via perceptual loss. We prove the local asymptotic stability of SD-GAN in the Dirac-GAN setting and show that it dampens the parasitic cycling behavior that plagues the conventional GANs. Empirical evaluations across established architectures and datasets demonstrate that SD-GAN improves the final image quality on several metrics (FID and random-FID in particular), stabilizes the optimization trajectory and provides additional learning guidance that is not trivially correlated with the conventional adversarial loss. It also proves effective for fine-tuning pretrained GAN models.

analysis.tldr: SD-GAN通过将EMA生成器作为教师，利用感知损失指导活跃生成器，提升了GAN的训练稳定性和图像质量。
analysis.research_motivation: GAN中EMA生成器虽性能更优，但仅在最终部署时使用，未参与训练过程，造成资源浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何利用EMA生成器在训练过程中指导活跃生成器，以提升GAN的性能和稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统GAN存在寄生循环行为，而SD-GAN能抑制该现象。
analysis.method: 提出Self-Distilled GAN (SD-GAN)，将EMA生成器作为教师，通过感知损失对活跃生成器（学生）进行知识蒸馏。
contributions: 首次将EMA生成器作为教师用于GAN训练中的知识蒸馏
理论证明了SD-GAN在Dirac-GAN设定下的局部渐近稳定性
实验表明SD-GAN在多个指标上提升图像质量，稳定优化轨迹，并提供与对抗损失非平凡相关的额外学习指导
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销（需额外前向传播计算感知损失）
感知损失的选择可能影响泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SD-GAN通过将EMA生成器作为教师，利用感知损失指导活跃生成器，提升了GAN的训练稳定性和图像质量。

papers.title: Uncovering Intra-expert Activation Sparsity for Efficient Mixture-of-Expert Model Execution
papers.abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has become the standard for state-of-the-art large language models, owing to its computational efficiency through sparse expert activation. However, sparsity through finer expert granularity is becoming increasingly difficult to achieve due to fundamental training challenges such as expert collapse and load imbalance. In this work, we explore and leverage intra-expert activation sparsity as a complementary and underexplored dimension of sparsity in MoE models. Surprisingly, substantial intra-expert sparsity is readily available in existing pre-trained MoE models, without any modification to the activation function or model parameters, providing up to 90% sparsity within each expert without significant accuracy loss. We explore intra-expert activation sparsity across eight off-the-shelf MoE models ranging from 1B to 400B parameters, and extend the MoE execution pipeline of vLLM to leverage intra-expert activation sparsity by skipping the computations of inactive neurons, on top of its existing optimizations, achieving up to 2.5 times speedup in MoE layer execution and 1.2 times end-to-end speedup compared to the original dense vLLM baseline.

analysis.tldr: 利用MoE模型中专家内部激活稀疏性，通过跳过非活跃神经元计算实现最高2.5倍MoE层加速。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE模型通过稀疏专家激活提升计算效率，但细粒度专家稀疏面临训练挑战（如专家崩溃、负载不均衡），需要探索新的稀疏维度。
analysis.problem: 如何利用现有预训练MoE模型中未被充分开发的专家内部激活稀疏性来加速推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有预训练MoE模型在不修改激活函数或参数的情况下，每个专家内部存在高达90%的激活稀疏性，且不显著损失精度。
analysis.method: 在vLLM的MoE执行流水线中，通过跳过非活跃神经元的计算来利用专家内部激活稀疏性。
contributions: 首次系统探索并利用MoE模型中的专家内部激活稀疏性。
在8个不同规模（1B-400B）的MoE模型上验证了该稀疏性的普遍性。
在vLLM中实现优化，取得最高2.5倍MoE层加速和1.2倍端到端加速。
analysis.experiments: 在8个预训练MoE模型（1B-400B参数）上评估，与原始密集vLLM基线相比，MoE层执行加速最高2.5倍，端到端加速1.2倍。
limitations: 加速效果可能依赖于模型和硬件特性。
未讨论对训练过程的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用MoE模型中专家内部激活稀疏性，通过跳过非活跃神经元计算实现最高2.5倍MoE层加速。

papers.title: Post-hoc Selective Classification for Reliable Synthetic Image Detection
papers.abstract: As synthetic images become increasingly realistic, reliable synthetic image detection techniques are of pressing need to prevent their misuse. Despite satisfactory in-distribution performance, deep neural network-based synthetic image detectors (SIDs) lack reliability in deployment and often fail in the presence of common covariate shifts, resulting in poor detection accuracy. To avoid the risk caused by potential errors, we adopt a selective classification (SC) strategy by allowing SIDs to abstain from making low confidence predictions. For practicality, we focus on post-hoc methods which perform confidence estimation on a given SID without retraining. However, we show that conventional logit-based confidence score functions (CSFs) exhibit pathological behavior under covariate shifts, leading to SC performance close to or even worse than random guessing. To address this, we propose a simple yet effective SC framework for Reliable Synthetic Image Detection (ReSIDe). First, we generalize the notion of logits to an SID's intermediate layers from a centroid matching perspective, extending the use of logit-based CSFs to any layer of an SID. Then, we introduce a preference optimization algorithm that aggregates confidence scores extracted from different layers to a final confidence estimate by minimizing an upper bound of the area under the risk-coverage curve (AURC). Extensive experimental results show that ReSIDe significantly boosts the SC performance of various logit-based CSFs under common covariate shifts, achieving up to 69.55% AURC reduction.

analysis.tldr: 提出ReSIDe框架，通过中间层logit泛化和偏好优化，显著提升合成图像检测器在协变量偏移下的选择性分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成图像日益逼真，现有检测器在部署时因协变量偏移导致准确率下降，需要可靠的不确定性估计来避免错误风险。
analysis.problem: 现有基于logit的置信度评分函数在协变量偏移下表现病态，选择性分类性能接近甚至低于随机猜测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统logit-based CSF在协变量偏移下存在病态行为，导致SC性能差。
analysis.method: 提出ReSIDe框架：1）从质心匹配角度将logit概念泛化到SID中间层；2）引入偏好优化算法，通过最小化AURC上界聚合多层置信度。
contributions: 提出将logit-based CSF扩展到SID任意中间层的泛化方法
设计偏好优化算法聚合多层置信度，显著降低AURC
analysis.experiments: 在常见协变量偏移下，ReSIDe使多种logit-based CSF的AURC降低高达69.55%。
limitations: 仅针对合成图像检测任务，未验证其他分类任务
偏好优化可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ReSIDe框架，通过中间层logit泛化和偏好优化，显著提升合成图像检测器在协变量偏移下的选择性分类性能。

papers.title: Enhancing Consistency Models for Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction
papers.abstract: Diffusion models for multi-agent trajectory prediction are limited by iterative denoising, which causes inference latency that hinders their use in time-critical settings like autonomous driving. Fast-sampling variants using DDIM and informed initial noise distributions partially alleviate this issue, but they either fail to achieve true single-step generation or are constrained by the chosen noise distribution. Consistency Models (CMs) offer high-quality one-step generation by mapping noise directly to data, but are difficult to train from scratch . We propose ECTraj, an enhanced CM pipeline with improved training and conditional generation for trajectory prediction. Our framework extends the student-teacher consistency training scheme: the student produces standard outputs, while the teacher explicitly fuses its predictions with parts of the ground truth to give stronger supervision. We also exploit CMs' direct denoising for top-K multi-shot generation during training. Combining conditional generation with this enhanced consistency objective yields faster inference and improved prediction accuracy, establishing competitive new benchmarks on the large-scale Argoverse 2 dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出ECTraj，通过改进一致性模型的训练和条件生成，实现多智能体轨迹预测的单步快速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在多智能体轨迹预测中因迭代去噪导致推理延迟，难以用于自动驾驶等实时场景；现有快速采样方法无法实现真正的单步生成或受限于噪声分布。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多智能体轨迹预测的高质量单步生成，同时保持预测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ECTraj，扩展学生-教师一致性训练：学生生成标准输出，教师显式融合其预测与部分真实轨迹以提供更强监督；利用一致性模型的直接去噪能力在训练中进行top-K多候选生成。
contributions: 提出增强的一致性模型训练框架ECTraj，实现多智能体轨迹预测的单步快速推理。
在Argoverse 2数据集上建立新的竞争性基准。
analysis.experiments: 在Argoverse 2数据集上评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景的长期预测精度有限。
教师融合真实轨迹可能引入训练-测试不匹配。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ECTraj，通过改进一致性模型的训练和条件生成，实现多智能体轨迹预测的单步快速推理。

papers.title: ACWM-Phys: Investigating Generalized Physical Interaction in Action-Conditioned Video World Models
papers.abstract: Action-conditioned world models (ACWMs) have shown strong promise for video prediction and decision-making. However, existing benchmarks are largely restricted to egocentric navigation or narrow, task-specific robotics datasets, offering only limited coverage of the rich physical interactions required for generalized world understanding. We introduce ACWM-Phys, a new benchmark for evaluating action-conditioned prediction under diverse physical dynamics in a clean, controllable simulation environment with a carefully designed action space. ACWM-Phys contains training and evaluation data spanning rigid-body dynamics, kinematics, deformable-object interactions, and particle dynamics. To evaluate both interpolation and generalization, we design in-distribution and out-of-distribution protocols with controlled shifts in interaction patterns or scene configurations. By building the benchmark in a fully controllable simulator, ACWM-Phys enables precise data collection, reproducible evaluation, and systematic analysis of model capabilities for physically grounded world modeling. Through systematic experiments on ACWM-DiT, we find that OoD generalization depends not only on the physical regime but also on effective task complexity: models generalize well on visually simple, low-dimensional interactions with clear geometric structure, but suffer larger drops on deformable contacts, high-dimensional control, and complex articulated motion. This suggests that the model still relies heavily on visual appearance patterns instead of fully learning the underlying physics. Ablations show that cross-attention improves high-dimensional action conditioning, causal VAEs outperform frame-wise encoders, and larger action spaces are harder to model but can improve generalization by providing richer control signals. These findings guide the design of physically grounded world models.

analysis.tldr: 提出ACWM-Phys基准，用于评估动作条件世界模型在多种物理动力学下的泛化能力，发现模型依赖视觉模式而非真正学习物理规律。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有动作条件世界模型基准局限于自我中心导航或狭窄的机器人数据集，缺乏对丰富物理交互的覆盖，阻碍了通用世界理解的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个涵盖多种物理动力学、可控且可复现的基准来系统评估动作条件世界模型的物理交互预测和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在ACWM-Phys上实验发现，模型在分布外泛化时，对视觉简单、低维且几何结构清晰的交互泛化良好，但在可变形接触、高维控制和复杂关节运动上性能显著下降，表明模型依赖视觉外观模式而非学习底层物理规律。
analysis.method: 构建ACWM-Phys基准，包含刚体动力学、运动学、可变形物体交互和粒子动力学数据，并设计分布内和分布外协议；同时提出ACWM-DiT模型进行系统实验。
contributions: 提出ACWM-Phys基准，覆盖多种物理动力学，支持可控数据收集和可重复评估。
通过系统实验揭示模型在物理泛化中的关键瓶颈，包括任务复杂度、动作空间维度等的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在ACWM-Phys上使用ACWM-DiT模型进行实验，包括分布内和分布外测试，以及消融研究（交叉注意力、因果VAE、动作空间大小）。
limitations: 基准基于模拟环境，可能无法完全反映真实世界的物理复杂性。
仅评估了视频预测任务，未涉及决策制定或下游控制任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ACWM-Phys基准，用于评估动作条件世界模型在多种物理动力学下的泛化能力，发现模型依赖视觉模式而非真正学习物理规律。
